plans.displayName: Azure Develop Core Cloud Solution: 4-day Workshop
plans.summary:
Azure Certification Bundle Exam AZ-201 has the following courses in a three day week, see below:

DE 20101 AZ-201T01, DE 20102 AZ-201T02, DE 20103 AZ-201T03
plans.description:
About this Course

This course will prepare you for the newly launched Microsoft’s Azure Developer certification exam: AZ-203 which is a combination of AZ-200: Microsoft Azure Developer Core Solutions and AZ-201: Microsoft Azure Developer Advanced Solutions. The coursewares cover Azure architecture, Azure technology development solutions, Azure storage services and solutions, Azure Cognitive Services such as Computer Vision, QnA Maker, and natural language processing, Azure service solutions, security solutions, API management services, and much more.

At course completion

After completing this course, students will be able to:

  • Learn common Azure application design and connectivity patterns

  • Measuring and planning throughput, and data access structure

  • Learn about Azure networking topologies

  • Create an Azure app service web app by using Azure CLI, Powershell, and other tools

  • Create documentation for the API by using open source and other tools and more

Course Outline

Day 1

  • Module 1: Develop for asynchronous processing

  • Module 2: Develop for autoscaling

  • Module 3: Develop long-running tasks

  • Module 4: Implement distributed transactions

Day 2

  • Module 1: Enable the search of textual content

  • Module 2: Instrument an app or service and implement logging

  • Module 3: Manage APIs by using API Management

  • Module 4: Configure a message-based integration architecture

Day 3

  • Module 1: Develop an application message model

  • Module 2: Develop Azure Cognitive Services solutions

Day 4

  • Module 4: Create and intergrate bots

  • Module 5: Create and implement IoT solutions

  • Workshop Summary and LABS

plans.summary: Debian 10 with MariaDB 10.5 image of a relational database
plans.description:
Debian 10 with MariaDB 10.5

MariaDB is a very adaptable enterprise database software, which provides the ability to handle transactional, analytical, or hybrid transactional/analytical workloads as well as relational or document data, and the ability to scale from standalone databases and columnar data warehouses to fully distributed SQL databases executing millions of transactions per second and performing interactive, ad hoc analytics on billions of rows.

Some of MariaDB features:

  • MariaDB is using one of the most popular query languages
  • MariaDB supports a wide variety of programming languages
  • MariaDB provides lots of new commands and operations unavailable in MySQL

To support a comprehensive disaster recovery strategy, the MariaDB Platform provides a complete set of tools and capabilities for rapid recovery without data loss – everything from full, incremental, and partial backup/restore to point-in-time rollback (i.e., flashback). Don’t hesitate to start using our highly functional server and easily the productivity of the database.

Virtual Pulse is happy to provide you with a Debian 10 with MariaDB 10.5 Image, fully pre-configured and ready to be deployed in Azure environments just in a few clicks! Deploy & Enjoy!

Disclaimer:Virtual Pulse does not offer commercial licenses of the products mentioned above. MariaDB is a registered trademark of respective companies. No warranty of any kind, express or implied, is included with this software.

value.longSummary: Debian 10 with MariaDB 10.5 provides you the versatility to handle transactional, analytical, and hybrid workloads, and the scalability to grow.

plans.displayName: Debian 10 with SoftEther VPN Server - Free VPN
plans.summary: Multifunctional, cross-platform, and enterprise-grade VPN Server
plans.description:
Debian 10 with SoftEther VPN Server - Free VPN

Perfectly optimized by Virtual Pulse, this SoftEther VPN Server provides you with cost-effectiveness, scalability, and flexibility of VPN Services in Azure Marketplace. This Image is always up-to-date and constantly monitoring for vulnerabilities in order to meet all industry-leading security standards.

SoftEther VPN is a cross-platform, multiprotocol VPN client and VPN server software, VPN protocols such as SSL VPN, L2TP/IPsec, OpenVPN, and Microsoft Secure Socket Tunneling Protocol are provided in a single VPN server.

This VPN software supports NAT traversal, making it useful to run VPN servers on computers that are behind residential gateways, facility routers, and firewalls. Firewalls performing deep packet inspection are unable to detect SoftEther's VPN transport packets as a VPN tunnel because HTTPS is used to camouflage the connection.

Moreover, SoftEther VPN optimizes performance by using full Ethernet frame utilization, reducing memory copy operations, parallel transmission, and clustering. Together, these reduce latency normally associated with VPN connections while increasing throughput.

Subscribe to the industry-leading, multifunctional VPN Server.

Disclaimer:Virtual Pulse does not offer commercial licenses of the products mentioned above. SoftEther is a registered trademark of respective companies. No warranty of any kind, express or implied, is included with this software.

plans.displayName: Debian 10 with ownCloud File Share Server
plans.summary: Ready-to-run and pre-configured Collaboration Server
plans.description:
Debian 10 with ownCloud File Share Server

Virtual Pulse presents ready-to-run and quick deployment file sync, share and content collaboration software that lets teams work on data easily from anywhere, on any device.

ownCloud enables you to share and sync data and keep it safe at the same time, on all platforms. It controls and monitors access and enables collaboration across devices, teams and continents alike. Without risking data loss, theft, or infringement on privacy regulation.

Be confident your data storage and maintenance comply with regulations. Increase security through measures like multifactor authentication, encryption and file lifecycle management.

Give staff an easy, flexible and secure way to share files and folders. Safely involve contacts outside your organization with select documents. Share public links shielded by passwords and expiration dates.

Work simultaneously on documents, create presentations together in real-time, annotate files, and much more, thereby saving time on coordination and feedback processes.

There are other content collaboration platforms out there, but none of them strike the balance between enhanced productivity and hardened security as well as ownCloud does.

Disclaimer:Virtual Pulse does not offer commercial licenses of the products mentioned above. ownCloud is a registered trademark of respective companies. No warranty of any kind, express or implied, is included with this software.

value.displayName: Debian 10 with ownCloud File Share Server
value.longSummary: ownCloud is a software-only product. It does not offer off-premises storage capacity. This is in contrast to the likes of Dropbox, which offers both software and off-premises storage capacity. ownCloud's storage capacity has to be provided on user-owned devices.

plans.displayName: Enterprise Data Security with RMS: 2-week Imp
plans.summary: Cloud 9 Infosystems Inc. has a goal to ensure that our clients can always keep their most valued enterprise data confidential, secure and private.
plans.description:
Organizations no longer operate within their own perimeter as data is traveling between users, devices, apps, and services more than ever before and protecting your perimeter, users, or devices does not guarantee the protection of your data as it travels outside of corporate boundaries.

Our proprietary integration of Office 365 + Azure AD + RMS + Log analytics will provide 24/7 protection for your data using an AES 256 Bit Encryption throughout the life-cycle of the data. This will allow you to send and receive confidential data only to people authorized to view it. The user process is easy and the data is secured by just selecting the labels based on the file sensitivity. This process can be also automated by configuring certain keywords which will automatically label the desired file based on these keywords.

Features:

  • RMS provides one-click functionality to classify data they’re working on.

  • Protect data at the time of creation or modification based on the source.

  • Once data is labeled, additional protection can be applied based on the requirement.

  • Data protection controls are integrated into Microsoft Office and other common applications.

  • Block Copying / Pasting / Screenshots and Printing.

  • Share data safely with users within your organization as well as with your clients and partners.

  • Users can define who can access data and what they can do with it based on the use of rights policy.

  • Users can track all activities on shared data and revoke access if necessary.

  • Analyse data flows to gain insight into your business.

  • Detect risky behaviors and take corrective measures.

  • Track access to documents & prevent data leakage or misuse.

  • IT can use powerful logging and reporting to monitor, analyze, and report on the shared data.

  • Meet your compliance and regulatory requirements, including FIPS 140-2, HSMs, ISO/IEC 27001:2013, SOC, HIPAA BAA, EU Model Clause, PCI DSS, and more. 

Let’s get your data secured!

plans.summary: Manage Event Grid topics with a unified authentication model.
plans.description:
Use Event Domains to manage the flow of custom events to your various business orgs, customers, or applications. Event Domains take the underlying architecture Azure services like Storage and IoT Hub use to publish their events and makes it available for you to use. Partition your tenants with thousands of topics in one place and a managed auth model.

Use Event Domains to:

  • Manage multitenant eventing architectures at scale.
  • Manage your authorization and authentication.
  • Partition your topics without managing each individually.
  • Avoid individually publishing to each of your topic endpoints.

value.longSummary: Use Event Domains to manage the flow of custom events to your various business orgs, customers, or applications.

plans.summary: Manage Event Grid partner configurations.
plans.description: Settings in this resource control the behavior of some aspects of the Partner Events feature. For example, you can allow a parter to create partner topics or partner destinations in your Azure subscripton by adding your authorization to a partner configuration resource.

plans.summary: Manage Event Grid system topics.
plans.description: Use Event System Topic to manage events from Azure services like Storage, IoT and other supported Azure event sources. System topic resource is associated with an existing azure resource which allows customer to subscribe events emitted by that resource.

value.longSummary: Use Event System Topic to receive events from Azure services to your applications.
value.summary: Manage Event Grid system topics.

plans.summary: Send custom events with Azure Event Grid
plans.description:
Send custom events anywhere by using application topics to connect to Azure Event Grid. Application topics provide a SAS authenticated DNS entry point for custom events allowing you to leverage Azure Event Grid's deep integration with other services. You can subscribe to events in your Application Topic just as you would any native Azure resource.

Use Application Topics to:

  • Send custom events to Azure Event Grid.
  • Leverage Azure Event Grid to route and filter custom events.
  • Subscribe to events in your application topic - private to you.
  • Reliably delivery custom events to Azure or 3rd party services.

value.longSummary: Send custom user defined events from your application with Azure Event Grid.

plans.displayName: Gogs - Git Service on Ubuntu 20.04 LTS
plans.summary: Flawless open-source Git solution
plans.description:
Gogs - Git Service on Ubuntu 20.04 LTS

Gogs is a great choice for organizations that need a simple, easy-to-use Git service for their development teams. It runs smoothly even on low-end hardware or virtual private servers, ensuring a fast and responsive user experience. It is also a good choice for those who want to self-host their own Git service, as it is open source and can be easily deployed on any platform.

Gogs has a modern, user-friendly interface. It's easy to get started, and you can find all the features you need in one place. Gogs makes it easy to manage your repositories. You can create new ones, clone existing ones, and manage access control. You can also use Gogs to collaborate with other users.

Gogs also has an integrated issue tracker. You can use it to track bugs and feature requests, and it's easy to set up notifications for when things get resolved. Gogs has a robust security system. It supports two-factor authentication, and you can set up access control for your repositories.

Gogs also offers great performance. It's optimized for speed, and you can run it on low-powered hardware. It also supports multiple databases, so you can scale up as needed. Gogs is also highly extensible. You can write plugins and themes to extend the functionality, and you can use the API to integrate with other services.

Gogs supports webhooks, enabling users to integrate external services and trigger events based on repository actions. This allows for seamless integration with popular CI/CD tools, issue trackers, and other third-party services.

Don’t postpone to start using Gogs - Git Service on Ubuntu 20.04 LTS, host your repositories on the web without extra effort.

Disclaimer: The respective trademarks mentioned in the offering are owned by the respective companies. We do not provide a commercial license for any of these products. Gogs is a complete and separate project from Tidal Media Inc.

plans.summary: Customer health monitoring and health risk management platform for healthcare and medical insurance: 6-week proof of concept
plans.description:
Having delivered complex AI projects in healthcare and medical insurance, WaveAccess offers developing a proof of concept for a custom-made health monitoring and health risk management solution that is hosted in Azure Cloud, making it easily scalable and requiring no physical infrastructure. It processes data using machine learning and provides up-to-date prediction of health issues in your patients.

If you would like the leverage data that your healthcare or medical insurance business has accumulated about your patients, we can make an Azure-based proof of concept on the data provided.

Value of health risk monitoring:

  • Peak cost prediction helps minimize potential losses
  • Using depersonalized data for security
  • Quick setup and intuitive UI
  • Quick client additions: to enable predictions, an EHR with monthly records is used
  • Expert data processing and external database integration due to Azure Cloud hosting.

Service Provided:

During our 6-week PoC, we will build an Azure Cloud-based prototype to prove whether a specific business challenge of your insurance or healthcare business can be solved using the accumulated patient data. We expect you to define one challenge and provide data. For example, you might want to optimize your patient treatment costs - let's check how Azure can help your data be instrumental with that!

Deliverables:

As a result, you will see how Microsoft Azure can be used for data storage and processing, whether your data is relevant for solving the problem, and get relevant business insights. If PoC proves efficient, we can proceed with a full-scale Azure-based project.

plans.summary: SharePoint online collaboration consulting / assessment for 2 weeks
plans.description:
Objective: To improve employee productivity and efficiency by offering professional services towards creating an Azure environment.

How we do it: By accessing the current IT Infrastructure, the way employees communicate internally and externally, current processes and document storage

What we deliver: Post assessment, we submit a detailed proposal in which we define our professional services, the solution, Azure cloud sizing and the tools required.

Benefit the client gets: With the process automation, employees get relieved from mundane and repetitive tasks, communicate and collaborate with employees, access the right information at right time.

plans.summary: Powered by Dynamics 365 and ClickDimensions, this offer is perfect for small businesses looking to go live quickly with a full-featured marketing automation solution.
plans.description:
enCloud9 Marketing Accelerator is a focused implementation of Dynamics 365 Marketing and ClickDimensions Marketing Automation. In as short as seven days, our certified consultants will configure ClickDimensions in your Dynamics 365 environment and work with your marketing team to deliver an email campaign to your leads and customers.

Our Marketing Accelerator package is designed to provide businesses with a simple user experience and to speed up adoption. As your business grows and your needs change, Marketing Accelerator adapts to these changes.

Deliverables

  • An easy to use marketing automation solution
  • Assistance with your first integrated marketing campaign
  • Optimized Dynamics 365 Dashboards, views, and forms for campaign performance monitoring
  • Live training as well as access to training videos

Note

  • Additional Monthly Support Plan Available for purchase

plans.displayName: HPC Pack 2012 R2 on Windows Server 2012 R2
plans.summary: Enterprise-class High Performance Computing solution that is simple to deploy, cost-effective, application-focused, and user-centric.
plans.description: This image contains the Windows Server 2012 R2 Datacenter operating system with HPC Pack 2012 R2 Update 3 installed to create the head node of an HPC Pack cluster. Microsoft SQL Server 2014 Express is also pre-installed. Use this image to create the head node of a Windows high performance computing (HPC) virtual machine (VM) cluster in Azure. We recommend using a VM size with at least 8 vCPUs. If you plan to add cluster compute nodes to the head node, the VM must be created in an Azure virtual network. Configure the network before creating the VM. To use the head node, you will need to join the virtual machine to an Active Directory domain and run the post-configuration script described here. It is strongly recommended to use the Azure Resource Manager (ARM) templates or the HPC Pack IaaS deployment script to automatically create an HPC cluster in Azure with the HPC Pack images. For more information see here.

plans.summary: Easy-to-use open-source NoSQL database
plans.description:
MongoDB Server on Ubuntu 22.04

MongoDB stands out as a powerful and secure database solution, making it an excellent choice for a variety of applications. It is highly scalable, reliable, and easy to use, and offers a number of security features to ensure that data is protected.

MongoDB offers many advantages over traditional relational databases, including scalability, flexibility, and performance. MongoDB uses collections to store a huge amount of data. The next element in the collection are documents that fulfill the similar function of a row in a table in the relational database system.

Moreover, MongoDB is highly flexible, allowing developers to easily store and query data in a variety of ways. This flexibility makes it an ideal choice for diverse applications, spanning from web applications to mobile apps. MongoDB offers authentication and authorization controls, as well as encryption for data at rest and in transit.

Install our MongoDB Server on Ubuntu 22.04, and unlock the potential for effective data management, boosting your team’s productivity. Don't miss out on this chance to revolutionize your data management.

Why applications by Art Group?

Our images are preconfigured and ready to run, they are always up-to-date, reliable, and secure.

Art Group packages images according to industry standards. We monitor the libraries and components for application updates and vulnerabilities tirelessly. When any update or security threat is identified we fix and repackage the VM and push the latest versions to the marketplace.

Disclaimer: The respective trademarks mentioned in the offering are owned by the respective companies. Art Group does not offer commercial licenses for any of the products mentioned above. Many of the products have a free, demo or Open Source license as applicable.

MongoDB Server on Ubuntu 22.04

MongoDB stands out as a powerful and secure database solution, making it an excellent choice for a variety of applications. It is highly scalable, reliable, and easy to use, and offers a number of security features to ensure that data is protected.

MongoDB offers many advantages over traditional relational databases, including scalability, flexibility, and performance. MongoDB uses collections to store a huge amount of data. The next element in the collection are documents that fulfill the similar function of a row in a table in the relational database system.

Moreover, MongoDB is highly flexible, allowing developers to easily store and query data in a variety of ways. This flexibility makes it an ideal choice for diverse applications, spanning from web applications to mobile apps. MongoDB offers authentication and authorization controls, as well as encryption for data at rest and in transit.

Install our MongoDB Server on Ubuntu 22.04, and unlock the potential for effective data management, boosting your team’s productivity. Don't miss out on this chance to revolutionize your data management.

plans.summary: Pythian can help you migrate from Oracle to the best technologies suited for your needs, including Azure SQL Database, Azure SQL Data Warehouse, and SQL Server (cloud and on-premise.)
plans.description:
Migrating from Oracle to Azure can provide many benefits—from lower costs, to improved performance, and the ability to integrate new technologies that drive automation and innovation.

A successful Oracle migration with no disruption requires an end-to-end approach, with a team of both Oracle and Microsoft experts - Pythian’s 24/7 global team of managed services professionals have decades of experience in these environments. We leverage our expertise to help you maximize your migration throughput and mitigate risks while providing the most fitting solution for your business.

In a week-long discovery, we will review your Oracle implementation and plan, create, and present our assessment of the work to move your workloads from Oracle to Azure/Microsoft SQL Server through the following steps:

  1. Analysis: Pythian’s seasoned Oracle DBAs use a proprietary approach to analyzing your existing Oracle database to determine the level of technical difficulty of the migration. Their analysis includes a thorough review of components and features being used, database objects, database resident code, dependencies on external objects, relative data volumes, etc.

  2. Roadmap Creation: The database migration path is then formally captured in a Database Migration Roadmap document which details the work effort including the high-level migration strategy, future state architecture, required players, areas of complexity, risk, estimated migration timelines, and required database outages.

  3. Recommendations: Pythian presents the findings through a collaborative and interactive walkthrough of the Database Migration Roadmap, readying your organization for an immediate next step.

Post-Assessment

Post discovery, we can support you through next steps, including formalizing a project plan, implementing a Proof of Concept using your actual data, planning and implementing a dry run, and performing the final migration, and provide ongoing managed services, if needed.

plans.summary: Handy open-source remote access solution
plans.description:
RustDesk Software Server on Debian 11

RustDesk is a great software that enables you to use and work on your remote devices. RustDesk takes a special place among similar programs due to its simplicity and effectiveness.

To connect to a computer remotely using RustDesk you must enter the ID of the destination computer and click on Connect. Next, the application will request the access password of the computer to which you are going to connect. So, it doesn’t require any special knowledge and skills to start using this instrument.

In addition to the simplicity of use, RustDesk guarantees proper protection of your connection. RustDesk encrypts connections between computers that establish the connection. Also, RustDesk provides sharing files between devices and the ability to create different types of users, each of them with different types of access to the equipment they connect to.

Have a try of our RustDesk Software Server on Debian 11, and discover all the benefits by yourself with your own devices.

Our images are preconfigured and ready to run, they are always up-to-date, reliable, and secure.

plans.displayName: SFTP OpenSSH - FTP Server on Debian 11
plans.summary: Helpful utility for safe data transferring
plans.description:
SFTP OpenSSH - FTP Server on Debian 11

SFTP OpenSSH - FTP is a great way to keep your data secure. All data transferred using SFTP is encrypted, making it difficult for hackers and other malicious actors to access your data. Take control of your data's security by implementing access control lists to add an extra layer of protection.

Time is money, and SFTP helps you save both. With faster speeds compared to FTP and the ability to handle large files seamlessly, SFTP streamlines your data transfer process. Say goodbye to sluggish transfers and embrace the efficiency and security provided by SFTP's encryption protocols. Shield your data from potential threats lurking in the network.

SFTP is a good choice for businesses that need to transfer large amounts of data quickly and securely. It’s also a good choice for individuals who want to protect their data from prying eyes. So, using SFTP can help keep your data safe and secure. Try to use our well-prepared SFTP OpenSSH - FTP Server on Debian 11, and enjoy the easy and secure way to transfer data between computers.

plans.displayName: SFTP OpenSSH - FTP Server on Ubuntu 22.04
plans.summary: Safe and effective file transfer protocol
plans.description:
SFTP OpenSSH - FTP Server on Ubuntu 22.04

SFTP OpenSSH - FTP is a functional internet protocol that is widely used to securely transfer files between computers. It is a secure alternative to the File Transfer Protocol (FTP). SFTP is used to securely transfer large amounts of data and is often used to transfer confidential information.

SFTP works by establishing a secure connection between two computers. It uses the SSH protocol to authenticate and encrypt the data being transferred. Once the connection is established, the user can transfer files between the computers. The server can also be configured to restrict access to certain files or directories.

Experience hassle-free file transfer with our user-friendly SFTP OpenSSH - FTP Server. Whether you're a seasoned professional or new to the world of file transfer, our intuitive interface makes it a breeze to configure and use. Say goodbye to complex setups and hello to simplicity. It can be used with a variety of tools and applications, making it a versatile choice for file transfer.

Join the ranks of satisfied users who have already transformed their file transfer experience. Say goodbye to uncertainty and embrace the peace of mind that comes with our SFTP OpenSSH - FTP Server. Start your journey towards a secure system of file transmission today.

plans.displayName: Free License: SQL Server 2016 SP2 Developer on Windows Server 2016
plans.summary: Developer version of SQL Server 2016 SP2 for transactional, data warehousing, business intelligence, and analytics workloads.
plans.description: This image contains the Developer edition of SQL Server 2016. This free edition (no SQL Server licensing cost) includes all the functionality of Enterprise edition, but it is licensed for development and testing only, not production. It includes the database engine with support for In-Memory transactional processing and analytics, which improves the performance of heavy workloads up to 30x. This edition also includes Always On for +99.99% high availability. Always Encrypted and Row-Level Security for the highest data protection. R Services for integrated advanced analytics. Includes Management Studio for integrated administration and development, Reporting Services for web and mobile reports, Integration Services for moving and transforming data, Analysis Services for data mining, and Master Data Services for data modeling. We recommend that you use a virtual machine size of D8as-v4 or higher for development and functional testing. E16ds-v4 or higher for performance testing.

plans.displayName: Ubuntu 20.04 with SoftEther VPN Server - Free VPN
plans.summary: Perfectly optimized VPN Server that has been packaged to meet industry-leading standards
plans.description:
Ubuntu 20.04 with SoftEther VPN Server - Free VPN

Virtual Pulse presents a super flexible and scalable VPN Server that has been packaged to ensure quick and painless deployment into your Azure Cloud Environments. The Image is always up-to-date, constantly maintaining and scanning for vulnerabilities.

SoftEther VPN Server is an optimum alternative to OpenVPN and Microsoft's VPN servers. It has a clone function of OpenVPN Server and you can integrate from OpenVPN to SoftEther VPN smoothly.

SoftEther VPN Server provides you with the following benefits:

SoftEther VPN is an essential infrastructure to build up IT systems for enterprises and small businesses.

  • Ad-hoc VPN
  • Remote Access to LAN
  • LAN to LAN Bridge

SoftEther VPN can build up flexible and dependable virtual networks around Clouds.

  • Join a Local PC into Cloud
  • Join a Cloud VM into LAN
  • Cloud to LAN Bridge VPN
  • Cloud to Cloud Bridge VPN

SoftEther VPN supports several mobile devices including iPhone and Android. Your smartphone is now a part of your on-premise or Cloud network by using SoftEther VPN.

  • iPhone and Android
  • Windows and Mac Laptops

SoftEther VPN is also an ultra-convenient tool for effective system management by IT professionals in enterprises and system integrators.

  • Remote Management
  • VPN for Network Testing, Simulation and Debugging
  • Building Your Own Cloud

SoftEther VPN is also convenient for home users. You can be proud of using enterprise-class VPN for your home use.

  • Remote Access
  • Comfortable Network Anywhere

SoftEther VPN has a strong function to penetrate troublesome corporate firewalls.

  • Dynamic DNS and NAT Traversa
  • VPN Azure

Deploy one of the most powerful and easiest VPN software in the world that can guarantee easy to establish both remote-access and site-to-site VPN.

Disclaimer:Virtual Pulse does not offer commercial licenses of the products mentioned above. SoftEther is a registered trademark of respective companies. No warranty of any kind, express or implied, is included with this software.

SoftEther VPN Server provides you with the following benefits:

SoftEther VPN is an essential infrastructure to build up IT systems for enterprises and small businesses.

  • Ad-hoc VPN
  • Remote Access to LAN
  • LAN to LAN Bridge

SoftEther VPN can build up flexible and dependable virtual networks around Clouds.

  • Join a Local PC into Cloud
  • Join a Cloud VM into LAN
  • Cloud to LAN Bridge VPN
  • Cloud to Cloud Bridge VPN

SoftEther VPN supports several mobile devices including iPhone and Android. Your smartphone is now a part of your on-premise or Cloud network by using SoftEther VPN.

  • iPhone and Android
  • Windows and Mac Laptops

SoftEther VPN is also an ultra-convenient tool for effective system management by IT professionals in enterprises and system integrators.

  • Remote Management
  • VPN for Network Testing, Simulation and Debugging
  • Building Your Own Cloud

SoftEther VPN is also convenient for home users. You can be proud of using enterprise-class VPN for your home use.

  • Remote Access
  • Comfortable Network Anywhere

SoftEther VPN has a strong function to penetrate troublesome corporate firewalls.

  • Dynamic DNS and NAT Traversa
  • VPN Azure

Deploy one of the most powerful and easiest VPN software in the world that can guarantee easy to establish both remote-access and site-to-site VPN.

plans.summary: Get started with Azure Sentinel with our Proof-of-Concept (POC) Offering and gain a definite understanding on the features and capabilities of the Microsoft’s next generation SIEM and SOAR solution.
plans.description:
Many organizations face challenges in maintaining their security and threat analysis process thereby protecting systems, data and users is always a challenging part in real world. Microsoft Sentinel delivers intelligent security analytics and threat intelligence across the enterprise, providing a single solution for attack detection, threat visibility, proactive hunting, and threat response.

We will help you get started with Azure Sentinel with its Proof of Concept offering and the program running over 5 days. We aim to provide you a definite understanding of how Azure Sentinel can contribute to your business from securing the enterprise to saving the infrastructure cost.

Key Benefits:

  1. Help you to integrate with supported sources by deploying sentinel agents or using sentinel data connectors
  2. Help you to detect threats using Microsoft's analytics and threat intelligence
  3. Help you to hunt for the malicious threats at scale
  4. help you to respond to the threat rapidly using built-in orchestration and automation

Total estimated cost is based on Scope of Work (SOW)

plans.summary: Zones Exchange in a Box allows businesses to migrate their current platform to Exchange Online. As an add-on to Exchange Migrations, we recommend Zones Backup as a Service (ZBaaS) offering.
plans.description:
Zones Exchange in a Box allows businesses to migrate their current platform to Exchange Online. As an add-on to Exchange Migrations, we recommend Zones Backup as a Service (ZBaaS) offering, which provides backup services for all your Microsoft 365 workloads and meets every security and compliance requirement.

Expect good things from Zones Exchange in a Box. • NCE Licensing. • Complimentary Exchange Migrations. Zones will provide the Exchange migration free of cost, following our proven Assess, Design, Implement and Manage (ADIM) delivery methodology. • Zones will back up all your Microsoft 365 workloads using Zones Backup as a Service (ZBaaS), so you do not have to.

Durch das WebPart- "Meine Schnelleinstiege" können Sie Ihre wichtigste Links, die für Ihre Arbeit essenziell sind auf eigenes Linkdashboard hinzufügen. 

Funktionen:
  • Über einen Klick auf den jeweiligen Stern der Linkkachel fügt man bestimmten Link zu "Meinem Dashboard" hinzu oder entfernt diesen wieder.
  • Um die Anzeigereihenfolge der Linkkacheln anzupassen, gibt es den Button "Sortieren". 

Weitere Funktionen können je nach individuelle Anforderung hinzugefügt werden. 
This application is available in german.

plans.summary: The CDI Microsoft Office Configurations sets a standard for deployment of Office Applications using cloud based administrative consoles.
plans.description:
The CDI Microsoft Office Configuration Baseline sets a standard deployment of Office applications within an organization using administrative consoles similar to the Microsoft 365 admin console.

Configuration of Office applications often go overlooked with moving to the cloud, resulting in default configurations and additional attack vectors for bad actors and bloat on end user devices. The Office Configuration baseline ensures these critical settings are not overlooked as these applications are critical to most organizations and typically are installed on a majority of devices.

The Baseline Includes:

  • Inventory cleanup settings
  • Configuration of 133 policies to Microsoft Security recommendations
  • Office Application Deployment configuration
  • Configure Update policies with 3 different update rings
  • Configuration of application preference policies
  • Testing and revision of all configurations
  • Knowledge Transfer of settings and the Office Apps configuration portal.

plans.summary: Organizations require a modern workplace voice solution with phone system calling capabilities enabled to integrate with their video, meeting room and communication eco-system.
plans.description: Diversified’s comprehensive voice, calling, communication, video and device integration expertise provide organizations specialized consultation, implementation and support services required to deliver seamless, collaborative experiences for employees, business partners, and customers. Diversified’s ‘Modernize Communications with Teams Phone Workshop’ is a modular engagement to experience the vision for Microsoft Teams Phone and advanced communication scenarios. This workshop is designed to guide you through the process of a simplified enterprise voice solution with reliable, high-quality, integrated calling. Through ‘Deep Dive’ demonstrations, use-case design, and comprehensive planning you will obtain actionable recommendations and detailed roadmap on how to design, deploy, adopt and support Microsoft Teams Phone.

plans.displayName: "Pay Later" payment platform for GCC retailers
plans.description:
Now, more than ever, retailers require new and innovative methods to engage customers and improve conversion rates in order to recover lost revenue following an unprecedented economic collapse. 

Discounts and interest-bearing payment plans are tactics retailers typically employ to attract e-shoppers and remove barriers to online purchasing. However, the former erodes a retailer’s pricing base and while the latter risks alienating customers sensitive to paying additional fees in these uncertain times.  

This is where Spotii can help! Spotii’s Shop Now, Pay Later offering both boosts Merchants and delights Shoppers. 

Spotii is an innovative payment platform for Fashion, Beauty and Lifestyle that empowers shoppers to Shop Now and Pay Later with no interest, no cost and no catch. 

Our unique “Pay Later” service, which works both online and in-store, enables Shoppers to expand their purchasing power by spreading their payments over time with just a few clicks. 

Spotii offers Merchants a risk-free “Pay Later” payment option that includes several benefits not provided by payment gateways:

  • Spotii assumes all chargeback and fraud liability
  • Spotii actively co-markets with Merchants and drives incremental traffic through the Spotii Shop Directory
  • The Merchant gets paid all upfront by bank transfer

Spotii has already helped many prominent GCC retailers generating additional revenue, including:

  • 40% to 50% revenue increase from new shoppers
  • 50% increase in basket size
  • 5x-15x ROI through improved shoppers’ acquisition

Click the “Get It Now” button to learn more and try Spotii today 😊

plans.displayName: "Smart Consulting" with an Expert: 2-Hours Brefing by Cluster Reply
plans.summary: Cluster Reply, thanks to its strong skills in the manufacturing sector, can help companies to strengthen the relationship with their customers, through the Smart Consulting Solution
plans.description:
This free 2-hours briefing is focused on how the Smart Consulting Solution could be the main pillar of your company, helping you to create a strong relationship with your customers. This solution will involve different Microsoft products starting from Microsoft Teams in order to automatically provide to your customers a Teams meeting on the preselected day; store data and customer information using Power apps or Dynamics 365 and common data service and, least but not the last, analyze customer voice surveys data directly on Dynamics 365 to know their satisfaction rates. The Smart Consulting approach proposed by Cluster Reply provides many advantages such as:

  • improves the relationship between your company and your customers (using Microsoft Teams as a channel to simplify communication),
  • gives customers high quality support (Storing all customer's data in one place Microsoft Teams App, Power Apps or Dynamics 365)
  • boost Sales & Customer service productivity

We will help our companies deliver a real impact for a better experience, better insight, better performance.

This no-obligation informational briefing is designed for manufacturing companies in order to offer/present them our Smart Consulting Solution approach and technologies involved (Teams, Dynamics 365, Power App). After this meeting, our attendees will be able to evaluate how it can be adapted and applied to their processes.

Deliverables:

  • General overview and presentation of Smart Consulting Solution
  • Review of Smart Consulting capabilities and key features

Agenda

  • Our Mission
  • Main customers needs
  • Live Demo of Smart Consulting Solution
  • Smart Consulting features and benefits
  • Involved Technologies (Teams, Dynamics 365, Power Apps)
  • How can "Smart Consulting" be useful in your company?

The Smart Consulting approach proposed by Cluster Reply provides many advantages such as:

  • improves the relationship between your company and your customers (using Microsoft Teams as a channel to simplify communication),
  • gives customers high quality support (Storing all customer's data in one place Microsoft Teams App, Power Apps or Dynamics 365)
  • boost Sales & Customer service productivity

We will help our companies deliver a real impact for a better experience, better insight, better performance.

This no-obligation informational briefing is designed for manufacturing companies in order to offer/present them our Smart Consulting Solution approach and technologies involved (Teams, Dynamics 365, Power App). After this meeting, our attendees will be able to evaluate how it can be adapted and applied to their processes.

Deliverables:

  • General overview and presentation of Smart Consulting Solution
  • Review of Smart Consulting capabilities and key features

Agenda

  • Our Mission
  • Main customers needs
  • Live Demo of Smart Consulting Solution
  • Smart Consulting features and benefits
  • Involved Technologies (Teams, Dynamics 365, Power Apps)
  • How can "Smart Consulting" be useful in your company?

plans.summary: Our Threat protection workshop is designed to create customer intent for deploying advanced Microsoft Security products.
plans.description:
Purpose

Gain visibility into threats to the customer’s Microsoft 365 cloud environment across email, identity and data to better understand, prioritize and mitigate potential vectors of cyberattacks against your organization. Insentra will help you understand how Microsoft 365 security products can mitigate and protect against the threats found during the period of this engagement.

Topics include:

  • Understanding customers’ security goals and objectives
  • Identifying security threats using a Microsoft 365 E5 trial
  • Providing an overview of the Microsoft Security end-to-end story
  • Showcasing product capabilities through newly designed rich demos
  • Developing joint plans and recommending next steps

Agenda

  • Day 1: Kick-off, Microsoft Defender for Endpoint & Microsoft Defender for Identity
  • Day 2: Threat Landscape, Report Generation
  • Day 3: Threat results presentation, Next steps

plans.summary: Engage and empower your staff with a intranet platform complete with rich functionality
plans.description:
#Space is an intranet framework built on SharePoint and Microsoft 365 whereby individuals can enjoy all the key features of an intranet platform at a fraction of the cost of a custom build. Deployed to your Microsoft 365 tenant in an automated fashion, #Space blends your values, people, and technology together to deliver a solution that transforms the way your organisation collaborates.

Features include: OneSearch: Our enterprise staff directory enables your staff to quickly view everyone and their attributes within the organisation

Resource hub: This central space provides a single source of truth for company updates, events and important documents

Integrated workflows: Custom workflows that streamline manual processes can easily be created using Power Platform or Nintex.

Collaboration workspaces: Your employees can enjoy a running start to projects with Teams best practices collaboration templates made for cross-functional team work

Mobile responsiveness: #Space has a fully responsive interface that is optimised for the most popular mobile and tablet devices so your staff can keep updated with company news on the go

plans.displayName: #stratapp - strategic and daily work in one app
plans.description:
#stratapp is an affordable every-employee SaaS app that solves the disconnect between leaders and teams by allowing everyone to collaborate on strategy execution, with structure and context. #stratapp brings together strategy, plans, KPIs, ideas, risks, tasks, meetings and projects into one seamless user experience.

#stratapp adds value to the client's investment in Microsoft Teams and is built on the highly scalable Microsoft Service Fabric architecture, hosted on Microsoft Azure.

Clients elevate business performance, productivity and culture, whilst becoming ready for the next generation workforce.

#stratapp suits all industries across SMC, and progressive divisions within Enterprise. The buyer is usually the CEO, COO or CIO, commencing a 3 week trial of 10-100 people, followed by progressive org-wide roll-outs over 3 months. #stratapp solves strategy execution with an org-wide app, without the sales barrier of displacing existing technology.  In fact, #stratapp's roadmap will add more value to the existing ecosystem of B2B SaaS.

plans.summary: Take advantage of our thorough and affordable Azure migration assessment. Gain valuable insights and key takeaways to learn what specific steps it will take to migrate your on-premise applications.
plans.description:
During your workshop with us you and your organization will gain a deeper understanding of the status and migration readiness of your current systems. We will also gather key requirements and assist you with defining a detailed timeline, next steps and high level roadmap of your migration to Azure with the goal of supporting your long-term IT strategy.

##Agenda

  • Assess your environment to determine where cost savings can be realized
  • Asses your current on-premises applications, servers and solutions, also including storage, backup, disaster recovery, and licensing
  • Discuss and understand your unique priorities and drivers to optimize and modernize your IT
  • Share Azure know-how with you and demonstrate how Azure functions and how a migration to Azure works
  • Discuss on-going needs to support your movement to Azure as well as your needs once you’ve migrated to the cloud

##Deliverables

  • Interview with the key stakeholder to determine cloud strategy
  • On-premise IT environment analysis to determine current status and list of applications and servers
  • Learning session covering Azure basics and Azure migration (1 – 2 hour)
  • Azure documentation packet with the most relevant information and links to get started with Azure and expand your Azure knowledge
  • Report of recommendations and roadmap for your migration to Azure
  • Detailed Azure migration project plan

##Please note:

  • The price of the assessment varies with organization size and complexity of existing on-premises and/or Azure environment(s).

About FMT Consultants

Since 1995 | 5,000+ Successful Microsoft Engagements | Among the 1% of Microsoft Partners

Our Microsoft product offerings include:

  • Azure
  • Office 365
  • Infrastructure Security
  • Dynamics 365 Business Central (Mid-Market)
  • Dynamics 365 for Sales (CRM)
  • Dynamics GP
  • SharePoint
  • PowerBI
  • System Integration

plans.description: The standardplan covers the &money platform. Please contact us to configure this platform with the required services.

value.longSummary: A comprehensive platform for managing meetings with intelligent scheduling, performance & AI tools.
value.description:
Description

&money EngageMe Platform is a configurable end-to-end solution that digitalizes and optimizes the entire meeting process within banking, insurance, and pension sectors — directly inside your existing CRM system.

The platform has 4 main services where all services are integrated to the customers CRM system:

  1. BookMe – Advanced scheduling engine for customers, advisors, and partners, maximizing availability for valuable customers, while ensuring the most effective use of advisor resources and competencies.
  2. PrepareMe – Automated pre-meeting process combining AI-driven preparation, customer qualification, and seamless document collection and verification to ensure every meeting starts fully informed and compliant
  3. MeetMe – An AI-powered live assistant that supports advisors in real time during customer meetings — ensuring meeting goals are achieved, relevant products are presented, and sales opportunities are identified. After each meeting, MeetMe delivers personal feedback, enabling continuous advisor development and measurable performance improvement.
  4. AssistMe – Automates creation of leads, cases, and opportunities, and ensures consistent follow-up actions. Summaries and customer focused messages are generated instantly after each meeting.

All modules are no-code configurable via the platform’s Management UI.


Benefits


For Employees

  • A modern, integrated and intuitive CRM experience that reduces administrative effort across the entire meeting lifecycle.
  • Seamless synchronization between Outlook and CRM systems.
  • Real-time AI insights and post-meeting feedback drive measurable improvement in advisory quality and sales performance.


For Customers

  • Digital, frictionless and personalized meeting experiences.
  • Meetings tailored to their specific needs, with clear summaries and actionable next steps delivered automatically.
  • Greater understanding of financial options and transparency in advisory outcomes.

Needs and Pains Addressed


Needs

  • Intuitive, time-saving meeting process integrated with CRM
  • Consistent synchronization across Outlook and CRM
  • Structured, measurable and compliant advisory flow

Pains Solved

  • Time-consuming, fragmented meeting preparation and follow-up
  • Generic, inside-out customer presentations that fail to engage
  • Delayed or missing post-meeting summaries and next steps
  • Reactive instead of proactive advisory approach

plans.summary: "The Nous AI Suite offers impactful AI solutions, transforming industries with innovation. Rapidly embrace AI with our five pillar offerings, turning ideas into tangible business value."
plans.description:
Comprehensive AI Solution Framework

Landing Zone Overview:

The 'House of AI' landing zone provides a comprehensive framework for organizations to adopt and implement AI solutions on Microsoft Azure effectively. Nous’s professional services are designed to help customers get started or extend their use of Azure by offering expert guidance, tailored assessments, and hands-on support throughout the AI adoption process providing the necessary expertise and capabilities, from initial assessment and architecture planning to deployment and ongoing optimization, ensuring organizations can fully leverage Azure’s AI and cloud services for a successful AI journey

Our consulting services help customers get started with or expand their use of Microsoft Azure by providing the expertise and capabilities needed for successful AI adoption

Benefits of Using the Landing Zone:

  • Accelerated AI Adoption: Provides a structured framework for rapid and effective AI implementation.
  • Risk Mitigation: Mitigates potential risks associated with AI adoption, such as technical challenges and governance issues.
  • Enhanced Business Outcomes: Delivers tangible benefits, including increased efficiency, reduced costs, and improved decision-making.
  • Tailored Approach: Offers flexibility to choose individual components or the complete "House of AI" package based on organizational needs.

AI Readiness Assessment:

Activities:

  • Evaluate the organization's current AI maturity, including data infrastructure, existing ML models, and alignment with business objectives.
  • Identify key pain points and opportunities for AI-driven improvements.

Business Outcomes:

  • Measures the alignment of your IT infrastructure with AI adoption requirements.
  • Potential improvement in KPIs such as efficiency, productivity, or customer satisfaction after AI implementation.

AI Strategy & Planning:

Activities:

  • Develop a comprehensive AI strategy & governance framework, outlining how to leverage AI technologies to achieve strategic business goals.
  • Create a detailed implementation roadmap, specifying AI model development, deployment timelines, and resource allocation.

Business Outcomes:

  • Establish a clear roadmap and identify opportunities for AI-driven automation and process improvements, leading to increased efficiency and reduced operational costs.
  • Develop strategies to manage and mitigate risks associated with AI adoption, ensuring secure and compliant AI deployment.

AI Solution Design & Development:

Activities:

  • Architect and develop AI models and solutions tailored to the organization's specific needs.
  • Finalize AI model design, data pipelines, technical specifications, and workflows, ensuring readiness for deployment.

Business Outcomes:

  • 30% reduction in potential development risks by identifying and addressing technical challenges early in the design phase.
  • Accelerated Time-to-Market in Development and Deployment phase.

AI Implementation & Deployment:

Activities:

  • Execute the AI strategy by deploying AI models and integrating them into existing systems.
  • Ensure seamless deployment of AI solutions with a focus on performance, scalability, and compliance.

Business Outcomes:

  • Benefit from clear, quantifiable improvements in productivity, cost savings, and customer satisfaction for a strong return on investment.
  • 15% reduction in operational costs by automating routine tasks and optimizing processes with AI.

Post-Implementation AI Support & Monitoring:

Activities:

  • Provide continuous support for deployed AI models, including performance monitoring, retraining, and optimization.
  • Implement robust monitoring frameworks to ensure AI models remain effective, accurate, and aligned with business objectives over time.

Business Outcomes:

  • Ensure continuous optimization of AI solutions, adapting to new data and needs.
  • Maximizes the long-term value and impact of your AI investments, ensuring ongoing organizational benefits.

Engagement Model

Whether you are looking to enhance specific areas with individual components or harness the full capabilities of a complete AI package with “House of AI,” the choice is yours. Tailor your AI journey by selecting the offers that meet the best needs of your organization, or unlock your full potential by opting for our all-inclusive package.

plans.summary: ‘Secure Multi-Cloud Environments’ Workshop is designed to get a customized threat and vulnerability analysis of your hybrid and multicloud environment, with Microsoft Defender for Cloud + E-Visor.
plans.description:
The 'Secure Multi-Cloud Environments' Workshop is an engagement that helps you assess your security landscape, address your most pressing security goals and challenges, and provide an immersive experience that brings the Microsoft security vision and capabilities to life, by using Microsoft Defender for Cloud to discover threats and security vulnerabilities affecting hybrid and multi-cloud workloads.

In this workshop, we will dive into the technologies and strategies needed to create a secure multi-cloud infrastructure, enhanced by advanced technologies like Microsoft Defender for Cloud. Whether you are an IT professional, a cloud architect, or simply interested to improving your multi-cloud security posture, this workshop is aimed at providing valuable insights and recommendations.

This workshop is held online and led by our security experts, who will guide you step-by-step in the implementation of Microsoft Defender for Cloud features. This one-to-one format provides ample time for questions, use cases discussion, and personalized recommendations according to your requirements and best practices to get the most out of these security solutions, and, at the end of the workshop, you will receive a complete report of findings, recommendations, and next steps.

Benefits for your organization: • Threat and vulnerability analysis of your hybrid and multi-cloud environment. • Learn how to build a more robust cloud security system. • Prioritize and mitigate potential threats, while reducing the attack surface area. • Define next steps based on your needs.

The workshop is composed of 4 phases:

PHASE 1: Validate and enable Microsoft Defender for Cloud according to your Azure subscription status.

PHASE 2: Activate the solution and enable Amazon Web Services and Google Cloud Platform connectors.

PHASE 3: Data collection, analysis, and correlation.

PHASE 4: Disable Microsoft Defender for Cloud components and generate the final report.

WHAT WILL YOU RECEIVE AT THE END OF THE WORKSHOP? Synergy Advisors has developed a new version of its E-Visor solution to provide you with a complete report that shows you enriched analytics through correlation of data resulting from discoveries made by Microsoft Defender for Cloud during the assessment.

Through 'E-Visor for Microsoft Defender for Cloud' you will have different views to control:

  • Active and scanned subscriptions.

  • Active alerts in the Microsoft Defender for Cloud portal.

  • Active alerts categorized by high, low, and medium severity levels.

  • Affected resources and locations.

  • Secure Score to help you improve the security posture of Azure resources, hybrid workloads, and multi-cloud environments.

  • Total evaluated resources.

  • Total recommendations provided by Microsoft Defender for Cloud to enhance the security of affected resources.

  • Detailed information about the generated alerts.

  • Table of global recommendations from Microsoft Defender for Cloud for the entire tenant.

  • Insights into your compliance posture based on how you are meeting specific compliance requirements.

plans.summary: 10-Day 'veni, vidi, vici' package to conquer Power BI and improve your data experience!
plans.description:
10-Day 'veni, vidi, vici' package to conquer PowerBI.

In your life you are guided by confidence and your business decisions turn into victories? You want the tool tailored to your needs and full knowledge how to use and develop it with time? This offer is dedicated to you! Veni, vidi, vici - 'I came, I saw, I conquered' - 3 steps to quick victory on the market you are interested in.

Veni - is the first step when you come to us for the pre-implementation analysis. Thanks to it you will get the full picture of implementation with recommendation and requirements. Vidi - is the second step when you see your Power BI system working - the result of our Proof of Concept implementation. Vici - last but not least step when you conquer Power BI by undergoing dedicated training based on your data in your Power BI reporting system.

The scope of the analysis (2 days of the Veni, vidi, vici package):

•2-day pre-implementation analysis covering up to 4 areas within company, completed by providing documentation of the work carried out together with the Power BI implementation plan report and the required system architecture.

  • the exact schedule of the pre-implementation analysis divided into areas will be agreed with the Client before the implementation date.

The scope of the Proof of Concept (6 days of the Veni, vidi, vici package): •6-day implementation based on analysis and materials provided, required to build significant part of the entire system. This stage would show effectiveness of EBIS employees and how much of the fully productive system can be completed within a given period.

The scope of the workshops: (2 days of the Veni, vidi, vici package)

•Analysis of problems in currently existing models •Creating reports and dashboards - advanced methods •Power BI administration - groups, sharing reports •Data modeling •Power BI solution architecture •Work on Power BI models currently existing at the Client's Company - problem solving

plans.description:
Reassure both employers and employees that their working environment is safe.

‘Where’s Free?’ extends the capabilities of MS Outlook, making it easier to arrange meetings, book rooms and find desks. In combination with a Real Time Locating System, it is also able to provide employers and employees with comprehensive visibility of ‘Where’s safe?’ in the new workplace.

Key benefits (‘Where’s Free?’ standalone)
• At a glance visibility of room and desk availability and quick scheduling
• ‘When’s Good?’ intelligent computation of optimum times to hold meetings based on people and room availability
• Desk and room availability removal/enablement to implement social distancing and sanitising schedules
• Space usage analytics
• Support for ’hoteling’ models in which the workplace is shared by members of multiple organisations 

Key benefits (Real Time Locating System standalone)
• Proximity logging providing notification of social distance breaches and their durations with a high degree of reliability
• Geo-fencing to demark sensitive/restricted areas – valuable if operating ’hotelling’ and/or ‘Office Airbnb’ models in the workplace

Key benefits (‘Where’s Free?’ in combination with Real Time Locating System)
• all standalone benefits for both systems (listed above) plus:
o Real-time visibility of social distance breaches
o Historic reporting of social distance breaches
o Auto-cancellation if ‘no show’ bookings
o Auto-curtailment of bookings where the meeting finishes ahead of its scheduled end-time

• Desk and room availability removal/enablement to implement social distancing and sanitising schedules
• Space usage analytics
• Support for ’hoteling’ models in which the workplace is shared by members of multiple organisations 

Key benefits (Real Time Locating System standalone)
• Proximity logging providing notification of social distance breaches and their durations with a high degree of reliability
• Geo-fencing to demark sensitive/restricted areas – valuable if operating ’hotelling’ and/or ‘Office Airbnb’ models in the workplace

Key benefits (‘Where’s Free?’ in combination with Real Time Locating System)
• all standalone benefits for both systems (listed above) plus:
o Real-time visibility of social distance breaches
o Historic reporting of social distance breaches
o Auto-cancellation if ‘no show’ bookings
o Auto-curtailment of bookings where the meeting finishes ahead of its scheduled end-time

plans.description: Itineris software private plan for Microsoft customers. Contact us directly at ruben.pot@itineris.net to make sure you benefit from the best pricing options.

value.longSummary: A Generative AI chatbot that analyzes an utility bill and explains its cost components on the spot
value.description:
30-50% of incoming calls from citizens to Customer Service Representatives at a utility are related to bill inquiries.

To increase CSR productivity we developped a conversational chatbot that analyzes a customer bill on the spot. The chatbot analyzes consumption, billing and payment data of the customer and presents the analysis in an easy summarization. It provides detailed insights into the factors contributing to higher bills.

Key Features:

  • Comprehensive analysis of billing data to identify cost drivers.
  • Clear explanations on the spot
  • Personalized recommendations to reduce future billing discrepancies.

For more questions please contact us.
This application is only available in English.
 

https://www.wetransact.io/

plans.summary: Migrate to VMware vSphere private clouds built on Azure
plans.description:
VMware’s virtual compute, networking, and storage capabilities have provided familiar reliability, but the need for modern cloud services has grown. Modern organizations require greater elasticity, faster provisioning, flexible consumption models, broader scale, expanding geographic reach, and the lower TCO that comes when leveraging native cloud services for AI, analytics, and security. Bring the benefits of these worlds together by deploying your workloads into Azure leveraging 3Cloud and Azure VMware Solution (AVS).

Key Benefits: -Accelerated time to value leveraging existing VMware investments, skills, and tools, including VMware vSphere, vSAN, and vCenter. -Lower costs for Windows and SQL Server, and free extended security updates for older Windows and SQL Server versions. -Migration speed that turns weeks into days when migrating VMware resources into Azure. -Scale, automation, and fast provisioning for VMware workloads on Azure’s global infrastructure. -Lowest possible downtime when migrating resources from current VMware environments to Azure. -Lower TCO compared to on-premise datacenters, with a higher consolidation ratio running vSphere in the cloud. -A single pane of glass to manage vSphere-based and Azure native VMs. -A seamless VMware migration to Azure with 3Cloud, a multiple Microsoft ‘Partner of the Year’ award winner

Popular Use Cases: -Cloud Migration (Rapidly mitigate unforeseen datacenter exits. Transition CapEx to OpEx. Adhere to corporate mandates on cloud migration. Increase uptime of core business functions.) -Datacenter Extension (On-demand capacity for planned or unplanned spikes. Provision/de-provision non-production environments. Provision/de-provision environments for specific projects. Get extended support for legacy Microsoft environments.) -Virtual Desktops in the Cloud (Quickly grow or shrink remote desktop populations. Shorten desktop and cloud applications physical proximity.) -Disaster Recovery (Add sites for both virtual desktop and server environments.)

plans.description:
Important Notice

Maptaskr Power Maps — the next-generation release of Maptaskr — is now available on the Microsoft Marketplace.

It delivers enhanced performance, 3D terrain and elevation, offline support, and AI-powered features.

View and install the 30 day free trial of Maptaskr Power Maps from the Microsoft Marketplace


Maptaskr for Dynamics 365: Unleash the Power of Location Intelligence


Discover new insights and manage your assets and stakeholders more effectively with Maptaskr, a leading geospatial and location intelligence platform for MicrosoftDynamics 365. By integrating cutting-edge mapping technology with your Dataverse, Maptaskr empowers your business to search, visualise, analyse, and strategise like never before. From communicating with customers to planning sales territories and enabling advanced analytics, Maptaskr brings a new dimension of insight to your data.

Key Features:

  • Discover Insights with Location Data: Visualise your Dynamics 365 data on interactive maps to unlock geospatial insights and manage your customers and processes more effectively.
  • Communicate with Customers: Easily search for customers, leads, or contacts to send announcements or manage outages. Add bulk customers to Marketing Lists for targeted communications.
  • Enhance with ESRI ArcGIS Integration*: Combine the power of Dynamics 365 and ESRI ArcGIS, allowing staff to interact with and take action on business-critical data.
  • Enable Advanced Analytics: Overlay government and agency data, including transport, health, demographics, and real-time weather forecasts. Incorporate aerial imagery from Nearmap & MetroMap for detailed ground intelligence.
  • Efficient Route Planning and Accounts Near Me: Use the 'Accounts Near Me' feature for real-time radius searches and optimize your travel routes with easy trip planning tools.
  • Elevate Sales Territories Management: Enhance Dynamics 365 Sales Territories with geographic data, allowing for the assignment of postcodes and the drawing of custom boundaries.
*Requires Maptaskr Enterprise licensing

Benefits:

  • Strategic Decision-Making: Leverage location intelligence for smarter, data-driven decisions.
  • Enhanced Customer Engagement: Improve communication and service delivery with precise, location-based insights.
  • Operational Efficiency: Optimize routes and manage territories more effectively, saving time and resources.
  • Comprehensive Data Analysis: Combine multiple data sources for a holistic view of your operations and their impact on customers.

Technical Details:

Maptaskr supports a range of technical standards and platforms, ensuring seamless integration and data sharing:

  • ESRI ArcGIS layer Support (Requires Maptaskr Enterprise licensing)
  • Geocoding with BING, ESRI, & OpenStreetMaps
  • Base Maps from BING, ESRI, OpenStreetMaps, & Azure Maps
  • Support for OGC Formats: WMS, WFS, WMTS, KML, GeoJSON, TopoJSON, CS

Important Installation Requirements for Maptaskr for D365

Please note that Maptaskr for Dynamics 365 can only be installed into an environment that includes one or more of the following Business Applications: Sales, Field Service, Customer Service, and Marketing. Additionally, your environment must be configured to allow file sizes up to 42Mb (43,008Kb). For detailed instructions, please refer to the following Microsoft documentation or visit Maptaskr Docs.

Ensure your system meets these criteria before proceeding with the installation.

Contact Us:

For more information, sales inquiries, or support, please contact us:

  • Email: hello@maptaskr.com | support@maptaskr.com
  • Website: https://www.maptaskr.com/
  • Documentation: https://docs.maptaskr.com/

Maptaskr for Dynamics 365 is also available built specifically for use with Dynamics 365 Business Applications: Sales, Field Service, Customer Service, and Marketing - Click here to install, or Contact Us for a free trial solution.

Key Features:

  • Discover Insights with Location Data: Visualize your Dataverse data on interactive maps to unlock geospatial insights and manage your customers and processes more effectively.
  • Communicate with Customers: Easily search for customers, leads, or contacts to send announcements or manage outages. Add bulk customers to Marketing Lists for targeted communications.
  • Enhance with ESRI ArcGIS Integration*: Combine the power of Power Platform and ESRI ArcGIS, allowing staff to interact with and take action on business-critical data.
  • Enable Advanced Analytics: Overlay government and agency data, including transport, health, demographics, and real-time weather forecasts. Incorporate aerial imagery from Nearmap & MetroMap for detailed ground intelligence.
  • Efficient Route Planning and Accounts Near Me: Use the 'Accounts Near Me' feature for real-time radius searches and optimize your travel routes with easy trip planning tools.
*Requires Maptaskr Enterprise licensing

Benefits:

  • Strategic Decision-Making: Leverage location intelligence for smarter, data-driven decisions.
  • Enhanced Customer Engagement: Improve communication and service delivery with precise, location-based insights.
  • Operational Efficiency: Optimize routes and manage activities more effectively, saving time and resources.
  • Comprehensive Data Analysis: Combine multiple data sources for a holistic view of your operations and their impact on customers.

Technical Details:

Maptaskr supports a range of technical standards and platforms, ensuring seamless integration and data sharing:

  • ESRI ArcGIS layer Support (with Maptaskr Enterprise licensing)
  • Geocoding with BING, ESRI, & OpenStreetMaps
  • Base Maps from BING, ESRI, OpenStreetMaps, & Azure Maps
  • Support for OGC Formats: WMS, WFS, WMTS, KML, GeoJSON, TopoJSON, CSV

Get Started:

Maptaskr integrates seamlessly with the Power Platform, bringing the power of geospatial intelligence straight to your business solution. Click the ‘Free Trial’ button above to embark on a journey of discovery and enhanced customer management with Maptaskr. Enhance your Dynamics 365 experience with the power of location intelligence. Start your free trial of Maptaskr today and unlock the full potential of your data.

Important Installation Requirements for Maptaskr for Power Apps

Your environment must be configured to allow file sizes up to 42Mb (43,008Kb). For detailed instructions, please refer to the following Microsoft documentation.

Ensure your system meets these criteria before proceeding with the installation.

Contact Us:

For more information, sales inquiries, or support, please contact us:

  • Email: hello@maptaskr.com | support@maptaskr.com
  • Website: https://www.maptaskr.com/
  • Documentation: https://docs.maptaskr.com/

Transform the way employees handle daily tasks by integrating speed, intelligence, and automation into every workflow. Our no-code platform is built to increase employee productivity through a suite of prebuilt, AI-powered workflows that simplify and accelerate work processes.

Quickly search for and access information, generate and personalize content, summarize complex data, and automate repetitive or time-consuming tasks without any need to write code. Unlock immediate value with prebuilt AI capabilities that are quick to deploy—empowering every team to build and launch their own solutions, fostering a culture of innovation and continuous growth.

Key Features:
Intelligent Orchestrator
Our platform works seamlessly across desktop, mobile, and can be embedded directly into enterprise applications. It maintains full context across complex workflows and coordinates multiple specialized AI agents to work together effortlessly.

Smart Enterprise Search
Our RAG-based architecture provides access to knowledge from both structured and unstructured sources, delivering context-aware, personalized
answers that understand user intent and business language.

Pre-Built Agents
Access a library of 150+ AI agents designed to integrate seamlessly with enterprise systems and automate key HR and IT tasks. Ready to deploy across your business applications, this agent workforce accelerates automation and boosts operational efficiency.

plans.description:
Please note that this application is now in legacy status and may no longer receive updates, bug fixes, or technical support going forward. Please use our updated application, Chronograph xConnectJS.

Chronograph xConnect provides clients of Chronograph with an intuitive interface through which to access their database, and find investment entities and their attributes within Excel.

FIND AN ENTITY

Using the “Find an Entity” tool, clients can search their whole database to find companies, fund commitments, or other investments easily. Helpful tools and descriptions make choosing the correct entity simple. When an entity is selected, users can easily insert that entity’s ID into Excel, or can continue to construct a formula using that entity.

FIND AN ATTRIBUTE

Chronograph captures all of the data related to your investments, and the “Find an Attribute” tool makes searching and browsing those data points fast and easy. The list of available attributes automatically updates based on the currently selected entity, or conversely shows the entities on which an attribute is available. Selected attributes can be inserted directly into Excel, or can be used in the Formula Builder.

FORMULA BUILDER

The “Formula Builder” automatically updates as you select entities and attributes, and guides users to the parameters required by each attribute (e.g. date, period, currency). Users can test formulae without entering each formula into Excel, or can insert the pre-constructed formula directly into the active cell.

ABOUT CHRONOGRAPH

Chronograph provides cloud-based analytics, data management, and collaboration tools for private equity investors. For more information or to request a demo, please visit https://www.chronograph.pe/.

Note: Chronograph xConnect is a tool intended for use by clients of Chronograph alongside Chronograph’s xConnect Functions (distributed separately), and requires a valid Chronograph account.

value.displayName: (Outsmart Health) Cancercare Follow up and Management
value.longSummary: Improving cancer surveillance for better life.
value.description:
Cancercare Follow-up and Management (CFAM) is a holistic solution co-developed together with a leading Nordic university hospital and it’s oncologists and cancercare nurses. CFAM is a holistic solution that automates the management and execution of breast cancer follow-up. Ultimate goal for Digital Workforce when developing this solution was to provide our client with a solution that ensures that right things happen at the right time to the right patients – without human involvement.

We are extremely pleased to present our solution to the wider audience, and more importantly, give wider audience access to our solution in order to support your patients. Patients will be assured of consistent quality follow-up according to a defined protocol throughout their follow-up journey. CFAM allows providers to improve breast cancer surveillance based on patient preferences, new treatment practices or risk stratification, for example, by creating new care pathways. The benefits of our solution include patient safety, consistent care, transparency of monitoring, and the elimination of manual human resources in the areas where solution applies.

The solution provides oncology and breast cancer physicians, nurses and other stakeholders with a real-time view of the progress of planned care path for a patient group as well as enabling data management and data utilization in cancer care research.

Key KPIs to impact based on the first deployment:

  • Number of manual tasks handled by clinicians.
  • Visit wait-times
  • Patient satisfaction
  • % of patients using digital channels
  • Time for result to patient notification
  • Oncologist time used with patients (for those needing it the most)
