plans.description:
A suite of digital tools designed to enhance the quality of life in urban and rural areas.

The (r)urban platform revolutionizes community living with a suite of digital tools designed to enhance the quality of life in urban and rural areas. From real-time traffic analysis to smart waste management, our platform supports sustainable development and efficient resource management, ensuring a greener and more connected community.

Developed in collaboration with public administrations across Europe, leveraging experience from many pilot deployments, the (r)urban platform is adaptable to diverse community needs and integrates seamlessly with existing systems.

The platform integrates a variety of smart city solutions to enhance operational efficiency and citizen engagement. It includes comprehensive City Infrastructure Management, which leverages IoT sensors for real-time asset tracking and predictive maintenance, extending the lifespan of critical infrastructure. Our Display and Facility Management tools streamline content delivery and automate maintenance tasks, reducing downtime and operational costs. To optimize urban mobility, our AI-powered traffic management solutions—such as Real-time Traffic Analysis and Parking Monitoring—improve traffic flow and resource management, leading to reduced congestion and increased road safety. In addition, the platform offers proactive environmental monitoring through systems that assess air, soil, water, and noise quality. Citizen engagement is enhanced with the City Co-Pilot, an AI-driven tool that provides easy access to city services and information through an AI Chatbot, fostering active participation in local governance. Furthermore, our AgriFood Solutions support sustainable farming by integrating Precision Agriculture Tools with a Local Marketplace, allowing farmers to monitor crop health and connect directly with consumers, thereby strengthening local economies and promoting rural-urban linkages. Last, but not least, the Local Enterprise solution promotes entrepreneurship and community involvement, building stronger connections between citizens, businesses, and local governments.

plans.description:
+Doctor Practice and Clinic Management Software is tailor-made to address your specific needs according to your specialization helping all Medical Practitioners to build and grow their private practice. +Doctor is well-integrated and intelligent software connecting the dots between Patient, Staff and Medical Practitioners. +Doctor allows you to nurture meaningful patient relationships while building a sustainable and financially-viable private physician practice.

Best Features

  • Appointment and scheduling : Easily create new appointments and avoid schedule conflicts. Manage multiple appointments for practitioners who can see more than one patient at a time. Set recurring appointments and view or edit schedules for patients and therapists effortlessly.

  • Patient management : Our software offers a user-friendly patient administration dashboard that provides a summary of patient details, giving consultants a quick overview. This digital patient database includes essential information with clickable functionality for detailed descriptions. Access patient information, appointments, diagnosis details, notes, treatment specialist names, treatments, insurance, referral codes, and more.

  • Invoices and billing : Automatically generate invoices or treatment receipts after consultations. The system manages appointment information, sorts it, and archives it in the patient electronic and accounting interface. Create and dispatch invoices directly to patients seamlessly. Filter invoices by attending practitioners, insurance, date range, and invoice number for convenience.

  • Reports generation : Avoid redundant or misplaced patient records and documents. +Doctor Healthcare software ensures no loss of documents by generating electronic records that are easily stored, backed up, and synced.

  • Custom configuration : This module helps practitioners keep detailed information about patients and the therapies provided.

Some other attractive features of this Physiotherapy software include -

  • Patient - Doctor's information : Stores and manages detailed profiles of patients and doctors for seamless interaction and record-keeping.

  • Treatments & Rates : Maintains a catalog of available treatments with corresponding pricing for easy billing and transparency.

  • EHR Security : Ensures the protection of Electronic Health Records (EHR) with secure access and compliance with privacy regulations.

  • Diagnosis Reports : Allows practitioners to generate, store, and access patient diagnosis reports for better treatment tracking.

  • Locations setting : Supports multiple clinic locations, enabling practitioners to manage operations across different sites.

  • Policy Management : Helps define and enforce clinic policies, including treatment guidelines, cancellations, and payment terms.

plans.description:
+Physio is a comprehensive, reliable Physical Therapy software that streamlines the entire workflow, and offers several benefits for physiotherapists including swift, secure access to operations at any time, seamlessly integrate appointment scheduling, clinical workflow, patient engagement, invoices, and billing. Thus, ensures you get the best returns for your clinic.

Best Features

  • Appointment and Scheduling : Create a new appointment easily and quickly. It automatically prevents schedule clashes and manages to schedule multiple appointments for practitioners who can see more than one patient at a time. With this ERP for doctors, set recurring patient appointments, and easily view and edit schedules of patients and therapists.

  • Patient Management : Our Physiotherapy software provides a simple yet flexible patient administration dashboard. It gives a summary of the patient’s details, that briefs the consultant about the patient at a glance. This digital patient database has all the essential information of a patient entered with a clickable functionality, that can redirect the user to a more detailed description of the patient’s information. The user can thus access patient information, appointments, diagnosis details, patient notes, treatment specialist’s name, treatment, insurance, referral code, etc

  • Invoices and Billing : After consultation, the user/physiotherapist can automatically generate invoices or treatment receipts. The system itself manages the appointment information, sorts it, and archives it in the patient electronic and accounting interface. All the invoices can be created and dispatched directly to the patient seamlessly.The software also has other filter options to filter invoices as per the attending physiotherapists, Insurance, Invoice date range, and Invoice range number which are displayed for your convenience

  • Reports Generation : A common problem faced by most physiotherapists today is redundant or misplaced Patient records and/or documents. +Physio Healthcare software ensures that there is no loss of documents or records by keeping patient information and generating electronic documents that are easily stored, backed up, and synced

  • Custom configuration : This setup and administration module aid the physiotherapists to keep detailed information about the patient and the therapies provided to that particular patient.

    Some other attractive features of this Physiotherapy software include -

    Patient - Doctor's information

    Treatments & Rates

    EHR Security

    Diagnosis Reports

    Locations setting

    Policy Management

plans.summary: In this 2-week assessment, Insight technical experts will work with the client to evaluate .NET solutions to determine how well they adhere to best practices while identifying areas for improvement.
plans.description:
Make developer efforts within Microsoft Azure more productive with this assessment designed to help organizations optimize .NET solutions for enterprise software development within the Azure environment. This assessment identifies areas in which your .NET solution can be realigned to best practices, providing guidance and/or validation of your priorities for strengthening your .NET solution implementation.

WHAT TO EXPECT: Our team’s close relationship with Microsoft and in-depth knowledge of both Azure and .NET will help you extend the value you your developers can achieve from your Azure environment by optimizing your .NET approach to align with Microsoft Azure consumption and capabilities. This assessment provides recommendations that will be prioritized in alignment with the organization’s goals and architectural guidance related to the solution’s inputs and outputs.

CLIENT PREP (before assessment begins)

  • Identify SMEs with detailed knowledge of application architectures, hardware/software dependencies, system dependencies, security, etc.
  • Collect available architecture diagrams and documentation
  • Prepare access to development environments, source code, & CI/CD pipelines, if available

PROJECT KICKOFF

  • Introductions & process overview
  • Initiation call with project sponsor and participants
  • Distribute application architecture questionnaire

ASSESSMENT

  • Evaluation of short-term and long-term goals
  • Analyze .NET code base and compare with best practices
  • Review business strategy & application questionnaires
  • Review architecture strategy related to .NET solutions

RECOMMENDATION REVIEW

  • Review recommendations and present next steps

plans.summary: Kin + Carta will assess the current state of your applications & software development processes to create a baseline that will help measure progress as you move forward to .NET App Modernization.
plans.description:
Kin + Carta will assess the current state of your applications & software development processes to create a baseline that will help measure progress as you move forward to .NET App Modernization. We will help you create a plan you can actually implement that will meet your business goals.

Challenges:

  • Organizations have on-premises applications that would benefit from the rapid innovation, scalability, and reduced maintenance of the cloud but lack migration experience and how to best configure & maintain the Azure environments to support them.
  • Organizations understand the value of Platform-as-a-Service but lack the knowledge of how best to set up infrastructure-as-code and CI/CD pipelines that are efficient, secure, and enable rapid delivery of value.

Solution:

  • We will collaborate with your application stakeholders, IT organization, Security, Finance and Governance to identify apps that would benefit from a migration to Azure
  • We will recommend an architecture and tech stack that will meet the needs of your organization
  • We will create a scorecard that will show your maturity as a modern software development organization in comparison to industry standards that you can use a baseline to help identify gaps in your organization.
  • We will work with you to create a roadmap for migrating your applications and a playbook to migrate the first workload.

Assessment/Workshop Activities:

  • Walk through Azure Developer Velocity Assessment
  • Understand business goals
  • Understand current state processes and any existing integrations required on current Azure deployments.
  • Analyze app portfolio to identify & prioritize candidates to move to Azure App Services
  • Analyze & assess current DevOps & CloudNative development skills within team
  • Create alignment between business goals and app migration plan
  • Define measurable outcomes for application migration

DELIVERABLES

  • Assessment of Cloud-Native Maturity
  • Assessment of Application Estate
  • Identification of Gaps & Opportunities
  • Roadmap for Application Migration
  • MVP workload identified and playbook for moving to Azure
  • Outline approach to deployment options following Microsoft Best Practices

plans.summary: Accelerate Your .NET Application Modernization with Accolite
plans.description:
Seamlessly Transition Your .NET Applications to the Cloud with Expert Guidance

In today's digital landscape, businesses are powered by robust applications. Yet, the maintenance of legacy applications consumes a significant portion of IT budgets, making it challenging to stay current with necessary upgrades and migrations. This often depletes resources before any tangible business benefits are realized. To thrive in the fast-paced business environment, applications require modernization to meet the evolving demands of the digital era. Accolite stands ready to guide your organization through the .NET application modernization journey, ensuring your applications are cloud-ready and aligned with your business and technology objectives.

Our Comprehensive Approach to Modernization.

Accolite offers a tailored approach to modernization, starting with a thorough Portfolio Assessment to review and create a strategic application disposition roadmap. Our services are designed to meet your organization at its current state and propel it towards achieving its future goals:

● Framework Modernization: Upgrade your .NET applications to the latest .NET Core technology.

● Legacy Platform Modernization: Transition to modern platforms such as .NET Core, .NET Core Blazor, and .NET MAUI.

● Monolith to Microservices: Apply the Strangler Fig pattern to methodically reduce risk and modernize your applications

● Customized Hosting Solutions: Design an optimal hosting strategy utilizing Azure App Service, Azure Container Apps, Azure Functions, AKS, and more.

Aligning with Microsoft’s Well-Architected Framework Our architecture designs are crafted to align with Microsoft’s Well-Architected Framework, focusing on the five pillars of Reliability, Security, Cost Optimization, Operational Excellence, and Performance Efficiency. This ensures that your applications are not only modernized but also optimized for the cloud environment.

.NET Application Modernization Assessment Accolite’s .NET Application Modernization Assessment is a cornerstone of our approach, offering:

● A detailed assessment of your current application landscape.

● A review of the current state architecture and a blueprint for the future state.

● A strategic plan to develop a proof of concept, demonstrating the value and effectiveness of the proposed modernization strategy.

By partnering with Accolite on your Azure migration journey, we commit to modernizing your .NET applications to accelerate your organization’s business objectives, leveraging our deep expertise and the latest technologies to ensure a seamless transition to the cloud.

Empowering Your Journey with Accolite Accolite is more than a service provider; we are your partner in innovation and growth. Our methodologies and solutions are designed to empower your organization, allowing you to focus on business growth while we handle the complexities of application modernization. Accolite brings a wealth of knowledge, specialized skills, and a commitment to excellence in every project. Our approach is not just about migrating and modernizing; it's about transforming your applications to be future-ready, ensuring they are scalable, secure, and aligned with your strategic goals. For a partnership that moves you forward, choose Accolite. Together, we will navigate the complexities of modernization, ensuring your .NET applications are primed for the cloud era. Visit us to learn more and embark on your modernization journey with confidence https://www.accolite.com/

Please note the price may vary based on scope of work.

plans.summary: Microsoft’s .NET Modernization one-day workshop is to get you started on modernizing .NET apps using Azure.
plans.description:
*Offer Description

Microsoft’s .NET Modernization in a Day workshop is built to help you evaluate your applications, prepare them for migration and host them on managed tools in Azure that were purpose-built for .NET. we will go through the story for the web applications sales play, with a pitch designed for customers looking to migrate web applications to the cloud. We will focus on the value of fully managed services in Azure – with a special focus on App Service, the hero service for web applications – as well as how customers can incorporate innovation in their apps after going through their migration journey.

In our workshop, you will better understand:

• How to evaluate and prioritize .NET applications for modernization • How Microsoft technologies can help you increase .NET application resiliency and allow them to scale easily • How to modernize your existing applications with minimal interruptions

The morning session will focus on best practices, design patterns and common obstacles to avoid, and mapping out your migration/modernization strategy. The afternoon session will be dedicated to hands-on training with our Migration Assistant and the easy to use Azure App Service and Azure SQL Database offerings that have been custom built to host and power .NET applications.

plans.summary: NET SDK is a set of libraries and tools that allow developers to create .NET applications and libraries.
plans.description: .NET is a popular software development framework developed by Microsoft. It provides a platform for building and running various types of applications, including web, desktop, mobile, cloud, and gaming applications.

value.longSummary: .NET is a popular software development framework developed by Microsoft. It provides a platform for building and running various types of applications, including web, desktop, mobile, cloud, and gaming applications.
value.summary: Version 9.0.300 + Free Support on Ubuntu 20.04
value.description:
The .NET SDK is a powerful software development kit that provides developers with the tools, libraries, and templates necessary for building modern, scalable, and secure applications. Whether you're creating desktop, web, or cloud-based solutions, the .NET SDK ensures robust application development and deployment capabilities.

Features of the .NET SDK:
  • Comprehensive libraries for developing cross-platform applications.
  • Integrated tools for debugging, testing, and deployment.
  • Support for multiple programming languages including C#, VB.NET, and F#.
  • Seamless integration with Visual Studio and other popular IDEs.
  • Extensive documentation and community support for developers.
  • Built-in support for cloud services like Azure for scalable deployments.
  • Enhanced performance and security features for enterprise-grade applications.
  • Open-source flexibility with contributions from a global developer community.

To check the .NET SDK version: $ dotnet --version

Disclaimer: The .NET SDK is an open-source software distributed under the MIT License. plans.description: The .NET SDK (Software Development Kit) is a collection of tools, libraries, and compilers that developers use to build, run, and publish applications on the .NET platform. It includes the .NET runtime (which executes apps), the C# and F# compilers, the dotnet CLI tool for project management, and libraries for building different types of apps like web, desktop, cloud, and mobile. In simple terms, the SDK provides everything needed to develop applications, while the runtime alone is only for running them.

value.description:
The .NET SDK, or Software Development Kit, is a comprehensive collection of tools, libraries, and components provided by Microsoft to support the development of applications on the .NET platform. It enables developers to build web applications, desktop software, mobile apps, cloud-native services, microservices, and more using modern programming languages such as C#, F#, and Visual Basic.

Features of the .NET SDK:

  • Comprehensive toolchain for building, running, testing, and publishing .NET applications.
  • Cross-platform support for application development on Windows, macOS, and Linux.
  • High-performance runtime environment with JIT (Just-In-Time) compilation and automatic memory management.
  • Extensive base class libraries for handling networking, file operations, data processing, and more.

.NET SDK is an open-source, cross-platform development kit used for building, running, and deploying modern applications across web, desktop, mobile, cloud, IoT, and gaming platforms. It provides a unified and high-performance framework along with a rich set of libraries, tools, and compilers to boost productivity and simplify application development.

Features of .NET SDK:

  • The .NET SDK offers a robust compiler and runtime supporting C#, F#, and Visual Basic, enabling the creation of scalable and secure applications.
  • Its high-performance execution engine and optimized garbage collection allow building lightweight, cloud-native, and enterprise-grade solutions efficiently.
  • The SDK includes an extensive package ecosystem via NuGet, giving developers access to thousands of reusable libraries and integrations.
  • It simplifies development workflows through command-line tools, project templates, cross-platform builds, and seamless deployment automation.

plans.displayName: .NET and Java Apps Modernization & Migration to Azure
plans.summary: Modernize your .NET and Java applications with a fast, low-risk, engineering-led migration to Azure AKS and App Service by WCT.
plans.description:
𝗣𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝗰𝘁𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲, 𝗦𝗲𝗰𝘂𝗿𝗲, 𝗘𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗽𝗿𝗶𝘀𝗲-𝗚𝗿𝗮𝗱𝗲 𝗔𝗽𝗽 𝗠𝗼𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗻𝗶𝘇𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗯𝘆 𝗪𝗖𝗧

Modernize your .NET and Java applications with a fast, low-risk, engineering-led migration to Azure AKS and App Service by WCT. We containerize and optimize your existing workloads without changing business logic to deliver higher scalability, resilience, and release velocity.

Our program upgrades your on-prem or multi-cloud apps into cloud-native solutions with built-in performance tuning, cost controls, and zero-downtime deployment strategies.

𝗪𝗖𝗧'𝘀 𝟱-𝗣𝗵𝗮𝘀𝗲 𝗔𝗽𝗽 𝗠𝗼𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗻𝗶𝘇𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗙𝗿𝗮𝗺𝗲𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸

• Discovery & Assessment — Week 1: Application portfolio analysis, dependency mapping, and cloud-readiness evaluation

• Architecture Design (Week 1-2): Target state architecture (AKS vs. App Service), containerization strategy, and modernization roadmap

• Containerization & Refactoring (Week 2-3): Application packaging, configuration externalization, and cloud-native optimization

• Migration & Deployment  (Week 3-5): Automated CI/CD pipeline setup, staged migration, and production deployment

• Optimize & Transition (Week 5-6): Performance tuning, cost optimization, monitoring setup, and knowledge transfer

𝗪𝗵𝘆 𝗪𝗖𝗧 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗔𝗽𝗽 𝗠𝗼𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗻𝗶𝘇𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻?

We don't just lift-and-shift, we optimize. Our team brings deep expertise in both legacy app architectures and modern cloud-native patterns, ensuring your migration delivers immediate value while positioning you for future innovation without change in business logic.

• 𝗔𝗽𝗽-𝗳𝗶𝗿𝘀𝘁 𝗮𝗽𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗮𝗰𝗵: We understand your business logic, not just infrastructure

• 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝘃𝗲𝗻 𝗰𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗻𝗲𝗿𝗶𝘇𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗲𝘅𝗽𝗲𝗿𝘁𝗶𝘀𝗲: More than 220 apps migrated across industries

• 𝗙𝗹𝗲𝘅𝗶𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝗺𝗶𝗴𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗽𝗮𝘁𝗵𝘀: From simple rehosting to full microservices transformation

• 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻-𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗱𝘆 𝗱𝗲𝗽𝗹𝗼𝘆𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀: Complete observability, logging, and operational runbooks

• 𝗠𝗶𝗰𝗿𝗼𝘀𝗼𝗳𝘁 𝗽𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗻𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗵𝗶𝗽:Delivery grounded in Azure Engineering best practices

𝗠𝗶𝗴𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗔𝗽𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗮𝗰𝗵 𝗢𝗽𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀

𝗢𝗽𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝟭: 𝗥𝗲𝗵𝗼𝘀𝘁 (𝗟𝗶𝗳𝘁 & 𝗦𝗵𝗶𝗳𝘁)

• Containerize applications with minimal changes for rapid cloud adoption—ideal for time-sensitive migrations or legacy applications.

𝗢𝗽𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝟮: 𝗥𝗲𝗽𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺 (𝗢𝗽𝘁𝗶𝗺𝗶𝘇𝗲 & 𝗠𝗶𝗴𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗲)

• Modernize applications during migration with cloud-native services, configuration externalization, and performance improvements.

𝗢𝗽𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝟯: 𝗥𝗲𝗳𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗼𝗿 (𝗖𝗹𝗼𝘂𝗱-𝗡𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗧𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘀𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻)

• Redesign applications as microservices with full Azure PaaS integration, event-driven architectures, and serverless components.

𝗦𝘂𝗽𝗽𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗻𝗼𝗹𝗼𝗴𝗶𝗲𝘀

• .NET Stack: ASP.NET MVC, Web API, .NET Framework 4.x, .NET Core, .NET 5/6/7/8, Blazor, WCF services

• Java Stack: Spring Boot, Tomcat, WebLogic, JBoss EAP, WebSphere, Jakarta EE

• Databases: SQL Server to Azure SQL, Oracle to PostgreSQL, MongoDB to Cosmos DB

• Integration: Azure Service Bus, Event Hubs, API Management, Logic Apps

𝗚𝗲𝘁 𝗬𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗔𝗽𝗽𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗥𝗼𝗮𝗱𝗺𝗮𝗽

Start with a complimentary 30-minute application assessment, we'll evaluate your application portfolio, recommend the optimal Azure target platform, and outline a phased modernization strategy.

Contact WaferWire Cloud Technologies (WCT) at 𝗶𝗻𝗾𝘂𝗶𝗿𝘆@𝘄𝗮𝗳𝗲𝗿𝘄𝗶𝗿𝗲.𝗰𝗼𝗺

Accelerating your journey to cloud-native excellence.

plans.description:

Modernize your .NET and Java applications with a fast, low-risk, engineering-led migration to Azure AKS and App Service by WCT. We containerize and optimize your existing workloads without changing business logic to deliver higher scalability, resilience, and release velocity.

Our program upgrades your on-prem or multi-cloud apps into cloud-native solutions with built-in performance tuning, cost controls, and zero-downtime deployment strategies.

𝗪𝗖𝗧'𝘀 𝟱-𝗣𝗵𝗮𝘀𝗲 𝗔𝗽𝗽 𝗠𝗼𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗻𝗶𝘇𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗙𝗿𝗮𝗺𝗲𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸

• Discovery & Assessment — Week 1: Application portfolio analysis, dependency mapping, and cloud-readiness evaluation

• Architecture Design (Week 1-2): Target state architecture (AKS vs. App Service), containerization strategy, and modernization roadmap

• Containerization & Refactoring (Week 2-3): Application packaging, configuration externalization, and cloud-native optimization

• Migration & Deployment  (Week 3-5): Automated CI/CD pipeline setup, staged migration, and production deployment

• Optimize & Transition (Week 5-6): Performance tuning, cost optimization, monitoring setup, and knowledge transfer

• 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻-𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗱𝘆 𝗱𝗲𝗽𝗹𝗼𝘆𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀: Complete observability, logging, and operational runbooks

plans.displayName: .NET to Azure OpenShift 4-Week Proof of Concept
plans.summary: Take your ASP.NET app to the cloud with Perficient and Azure Red Hat OpenShift
plans.description:
In just 4 weeks, Perficient will get your ASP.NET MVC app up and running in an Azure Red Hat OpenShift (ARO) cluster. Your app will be running inside of a fully-managed Kubernetes cluster on Azure, which will set up your app up beautifully for a microservices architecture moving forward. Perficient brings app development and DevOps expertise and will guide your app onto Azure ARO. This POC includes full DevOps YAML CI/CD pipelines.

Have a legacy ASP.NET MVC app running on the .NET Framework instead of .NET Core? No problem, we will port it over to .NET Core for you.

4 Weeks to a .NET Core App in ARO

Project Basics

  • Fully managed Azure Red Hat OpenShift (ARO) cluster
  • Port app from .NET to .NET Core
  • Refactor configuration and dependencies

Outcome and Deliverables

  • Fully-provisioned ARO cluster
  • CI/CD Azure DevOps YAML pipelines
  • Infrastructure-as-code OpenShift YAML template files
  • Knowledge transfer session
  • Application POC

Key Activities

  • Porting app to .NET Core (if necessary)
  • Architecting and designing your app's necessary OpenShift resources
  • Building and executing Azure DevOps pipelines
  • Documentation for how to build and deploy your app to OpenShift

plans.summary: Azure app modernization accelerates enterprise transformation, and ensures seamless Azure migration, enhanced by DevOps CI/CD and governed by Azure Governance.
plans.description:
Presenting the Modernization Bootcamp

A 4-week POC program for revitalizing .NET/Java/OSS applications. Our comprehensive app modernization initiative extends beyond adaptation, leveraging Azure Container App and Azure App Services for a seamless transition. The bootcamp focuses on a smooth migration to Azure, ensuring a shift and a strategic move towards future-ready, scalable operations.

Nous offers tailored app modernization services, addressing unique business needs. Our process goes beyond Azure migration, optimizing and future-proofing applications. Azure integration services are pivotal in creating a dynamic, interconnected digital infrastructure that adapts to evolving business needs.

Engagement Plan

Week 1

  • App modernization bootcamp
  • Engagement scope and target application* definition
  • Review app architecture, resource usage, dependencies, etc.
  • Assessment, analysis, and requirements baselining
  • Analyze architectural options; identify end-state architecture

Week 2

  • Define/build microservices architecture for identified application(s) in scope
  • Migrate application(s) and integrate into Azure App Services
  • Deploy Azure DevOps CI/CD pipeline for development services

Week 3

  • Test run, validation, verification
  • Release management workflow
  • Blue-Green deployment strategy

Week 4

  • Azure control plane telemetry and log dashboards
  • Declarative resource management – continuous monitoring, alarm setup, incident mgmt. workflows
  • Auto-scaling
  • Governance, security, support framework definition

Deliverables

  • Azure App Services Bootcamp
  • Modernization approach documentation
  • Azure governance, policies and security blueprints
  • Fully architected and modernized application in customer Azure account for selected application(s) and use case(s)
  • Azure DevOps CI/CD pipeline with automated tasks
  • Best practice guide to operating and manage Azure App Services environment

  • Best practice guide to operating and manage Azure App Services environment

value.summary: Azure app modernization accelerates enterprise transformation, and ensures seamless Azure migration, enhanced by DevOps CI/CD and governed by Azure Governance.
value.description:
Presenting the Modernization Bootcamp

A 4-week POC program for revitalizing .NET/Java/OSS applications. Our comprehensive app modernization initiative extends beyond adaptation, leveraging Azure Container App and Azure App Services for a seamless transition. The bootcamp focuses on a smooth migration to Azure, ensuring a shift and a strategic move towards future-ready, scalable operations.

Nous offers tailored app modernization services, addressing unique business needs. Our process goes beyond Azure migration, optimizing and future-proofing applications. Azure integration services are pivotal in creating a dynamic, interconnected digital infrastructure that adapts to evolving business needs.

Engagement Plan

Week 1

  • App modernization bootcamp
  • Engagement scope and target application* definition
  • Review app architecture, resource usage, dependencies, etc.
  • Assessment, analysis, and requirements baselining
  • Analyze architectural options; identify end-state architecture

Week 2

  • Define/build microservices architecture for identified application(s) in scope
  • Migrate application(s) and integrate into Azure App Services
  • Deploy Azure DevOps CI/CD pipeline for development services

Week 3

  • Test run, validation, verification
  • Release management workflow
  • Blue-Green deployment strategy

Week 4

  • Azure control plane telemetry and log dashboards
  • Declarative resource management – continuous monitoring, alarm setup, incident mgmt. workflows
  • Auto-scaling
  • Governance, security, support framework definition

Deliverables

  • Azure App Services Bootcamp
  • Modernization approach documentation
  • Azure governance, policies and security blueprints
  • Fully architected and modernized application in customer Azure account for selected application(s) and use case(s)
  • Azure DevOps CI/CD pipeline with automated tasks
  • Best practice guide to operating and manage Azure App Services environment

  • Purpose-built applications, operational systems, and client portals.

plans.summary: Evaluate .NET solutions running On-premises or Azure environment to determine how well the applications adhere to best practices and identify areas for improvement.
plans.description:
This assessment designed to help organizations optimize .NET solutions for enterprise software development running On-premises or Azure environment. This assessment identifies areas in which .NET solution can be realigned to best practices, providing guidance and/or validation of priorities for strengthening .NET solution implementation.  Evaluate .NET solutions to determine how well the applications adhere to best practices while identifying areas for improvement.

Yash team will perform the following activities as part of this assessment

  • Evaluation of short-term and long-term goals
  • Analyse .NET code base and compare with best practices
  • Special emphasize on any below 5 categories
    • Correctness
    • Efficiency
    • Integrity
    • Reliability
    • Usability
    • Maintainability
    • Flexibility
    • Testability
    • Portability
    • usability
    • Interoperability
    • Security
  • Review business strategy & application questionnaires
  • Review architecture strategy related to .NET solutions

Following are some of the benefits of this assessment

  • Get a prioritized list of architecture and codebase improvements to be made.
  • Receive detailed recommendation on immediate blockers
  • Receive validation on improvement areas in existing code base.
  • Gain clarity on Azure Modernization approach

Following are some of deliverables of the assessment

  • Assessment Report containing best practices, evaluation criteria and recommendations
  • Guideline and implementation roadmap

plans.summary: Cyber Infrastructure, CIS, is a Top Application Development company offering Azure based software development and migration services with 1000+ team size in USA, India, UK and Africa offices.
plans.description:
This is a 5 days Assessment of .Net Consulting & Application Development services, for custom quotes please contact us.

Cyber Infrastructure, "CIS" a Microsoft Gold Partner and globally trusted Microsoft Development Company provides dependable Azure, Office 365, Microsoft Dynamics 365, SharePoint & .Net development (MVC, Core, C#) services helping you in deploying hybrid and on cloud solutions on the myriad of technologies associated with Microsoft Azure Platform.

HOW IT WORKS

  • Tell us what kind of talent you need.
  • After we get the information, our internal team of experts will review it and connect with you in order to answer any questions and to get an even better understanding of your exact needs.
  • We’ll find you the perfect match.

CIS OFFERINGS

  • Azure:- we provide App development services such as Web Apps, Mobile Apps, Logic Apps, Azure Functions, Azure WebJobs, Azure Storage, Azure API.
  • .Net:- We provide the web and desktop based solution as per business requirement.
  • Sharepoint:- We help you to manage your documents using Microsoft secured, documents management model.
  • Microsoft Dynamics CRM:- Microsoft Dynamics CRM:- Provide Customization, Configuration, Migration, and integration for the different module, such as Sales, Service, Marketing, Field and Project Service Automation. And helps to boost your business.
  • Xamarin Mobile App:- We provide a mobile-based solution for your business enterprise.

DELIVERABLE

By the end of this 5-days assessment, the client would have received

  • Scope Identification
  • Requirement Clarification
  • Requirement Understanding document (Wire-frame)
  • Estimation of Work
  • Resource Identification

This engagement is delivered remotely. Travel is optional (if required).

plans.description: Access the core .legal platform with user management, basic documentation, and collaboration features. Add modules as your needs grow. Read more

value.longSummary: Streamline governance, risk, and compliance with the .legal GRC Platform.
value.description:
.legal - Unified Digital Compliance Platform

[BOOK DEMO]

Manage IT security standards and legal requirements in one intuitive platform, built for collaboration across your entire organisation.

Why .legal?

.legal brings together information security, data protection, contracts, and vendor management in a unified platform that actually makes sense. Whether you're working with ISO 27001, GDPR, NIS2, or managing supplier audits, everything connects where it should. One data breach assessment informs your risk register, GDPR compliance, and vendor reviews automatically.

.legal is designed for teams, not just compliance experts. IT security professionals, legal teams, and leadership work from the same source of truth, with unlimited users and full onboarding support included.

Integrated with Microsoft Entra ID for seamless single sign-on, .legal fits into your existing Microsoft environment without adding complexity.

Solutions

Frameworks
Navigate multiple compliance frameworks from a single control library. Map requirements across ISO 27001, NIS2, GDPR, AI Act, Data Act, CIS18, and more to see where your work overlaps. Track implementation progress, assign responsibilities, and demonstrate compliance without duplicating effort across standards. Read more.

Information and Cyber Security
Build and maintain your ISMS with practical tools for risk management, asset tracking, and control implementation. Document security measures, conduct risk assessments, and generate audit-ready reports. Your security work feeds directly into other compliance areas where relevant. Read more.

Data Protection
Handle GDPR, data processing agreements, and records of processing activities in context with the rest of your compliance work. When you assess a vendor, your data protection review connects to your security risk register and contract management automatically. Read more.

Vendor Management and Audits
Centralise supplier assessments, security questionnaires, and audit documentation. Track vendor risks, manage review cycles, and maintain evidence for regulatory requirements. Vendor data flows into your risk assessments and compliance reporting where needed. Read more.

Contracts
Manage contracts with built-in compliance context. Link agreements to relevant frameworks, processing activities, and vendor assessments. Search across your contract library, set review reminders, and maintain oversight without switching between systems. Read more.

Modular and Transparent

Choose only the modules you need right now. Add others when your requirements grow. Every module works independently but connects seamlessly when you need the bigger picture.

Unlimited users, onboarding, and support are included. You pay for functionality, not headcount, with transparent pricing and no hidden costs. Read more.

[BOOK DEMO]

Learn more at dotlegal.com

plans.description:
.one è un unico hub digitale, potenziato dall'intelligenza artificiale, che abbraccia l'intera supply chain: raccoglie infatti tutti i dati necessari per far funzionare le vendite e la distribuzione dei prodotti di largo consumo, sia per le aziende che distribuiscono all’ingrosso, sia per quelle che distribuiscono al dettaglio.

.one è stata pensata per soddisfare i bisogni di settori di mercato diversi: contattaci per approfondire la proposta mirata alle tue esigenze.

value.longSummary: L'hub digitale per la gestione dei processi di vendita e distribuzione dei prodotti di largo consumo
value.description:
This application is available only in Italian, English


.one è il nuovo tavolo virtuale che riunisce gli stakeholder di un’organizzazione abbattendo i silos informativi che spesso rendono difficile la collaborazione tra team.

Nasce come unico hub digitale che abbraccia l'intera supply chain: raccoglie infatti tutti i dati necessari per far funzionare le vendite e la distribuzione dei prodotti di largo consumo, sia per le aziende che distribuiscono all’ingrosso, sia per quelle che distribuiscono al dettaglio.


È costituito da un insieme di applicazioni che soddisfano le esigenze di stakeholder diversi e consentono di:

  • avere una visione completa dell’intero parco clienti e della storia delle loro transazioni: ordini di vendita, ordini di acquisto, fatture, documenti di spedizione, ticket, task programmati
  • costruire le relazioni con i clienti e gestire l’intero processo di sviluppo del business: nuovi clienti, upselling e cross-selling
  • arricchire il patrimonio aziendale con i dati dei prodotti: prezzo, condizioni commerciali, trade promotion management, attivazione campagne, materiale di corredo per certificarne la qualità, supportarne il post-vendita o la distribuzione logistica
  • organizzare il commercio al dettaglio, sia in sede, sia nei punti vendita: pianificazione delle operazioni di riordino, inventario in tutte le sue forme, tracciamento di tutte le attività di supporto all’interno del negozio, gestione dei compiti assegnati alle singole persone o ai gruppi di lavoro, assistenza alla vendita, vendita
  • garantire la tracciabilità dei prodotti lungo la catena di fornitura verso l’ingrosso e il dettaglio
  • consentire la collaborazione tra le persone favorendo lo scambio di informazioni, rispondendo ai bisogni espressi in linguaggio naturale grazie alle funzionalità abilitate dall’intelligenza artificiale.

plans.description:
This application is available in english and german. 

.rooms is a mixed reality solution designed for everyone who wants to create revolutionary new visions for interior design in industrial, residential, and real  estate settings.
Designing interior spaces had not changed much for generations and are sometimes very stressful and difficult for the end customer. People are spending a lot of money, but they must try to imagine how everything will look based on just a few sketches and product photos, and then they have to wait a long time to see the outcome.
Using a unique combination of the Microsoft HoloLens 2 and the .roomstablet app, Island Labs has found a way to design interior spaces that allows customers to holographically experience interior designs in any location through mixed reality glasses, way before the actual production has even begun. For the first time, this offers customers the opportunity to interactively and "playfully" participate in designing their interiors in actual sizes and real dimensions. Cabinet heights and passage widths can be tried out virtually, adapted to ergonomic requirements and the individual spatial perception. Future structural changes such as wall openings, architectural alterations or the future colour scheme can also be visualised via the technology.

Scalability 
.rooms is ultra mobile and ultra scalable solution that could grow along with the customers business, enabling them to expand into new territories andmarket sectors.

Cross-platform solution 
.rooms is a collaborative, mixed-reality solution built on Microsoft Azure and HoloLens  2, which is a game changer in terms of customer-centric interior design and the ability to visualize expensive, complex projects. It provides a unique immersive experience for customers and is an exceptional design tool for sale consultants.

Immersive full-scale visualization 
The solution allows customers to holgraphically experience interior designs in any location through mixed reality glasses, before the actual production. Customers have the opportunity to interactively and “playfully” participate in designing their interiors in actual sizes and real dimensions. Cabinet heights and passage widths can be tried out virtually, adapted to ergonomic requirements and the individual spatial perception.

Using a unique combination of the Microsoft HoloLens 2 and the .roomstablet app, Island Labs has found a way to design interior spaces that allows customers to holographically experience interior designs in any location through mixed reality glasses, way before the actual production has even begun. For the first time, this offers customers the opportunity to interactively and "playfully" participate in designing their interiors in actual sizes and real dimensions. Cabinet heights and passage widths can be tried out virtually, adapted to ergonomic requirements and the individual spatial perception. Future structural changes such as wall openings, architectural alterations or the future colour scheme can also be visualised via the technology.

Scalability 
.rooms is ultra mobile and ultra scalable solution that could grow along with the customers business, enabling them to expand into new territories andmarket sectors.

Cross-platform solution 
.rooms is a collaborative, mixed-reality solution built on Microsoft Azure and HoloLens  2, which is a game changer in terms of customer-centric interior design and the ability to visualize expensive, complex projects. It provides a unique immersive experience for customers and is an exceptional design tool for sale consultants.

Immersive full-scale visualization 
The solution allows customers to holgraphically experience interior designs in any location through mixed reality glasses, before the actual production. Customers have the opportunity to interactively and “playfully” participate in designing their interiors in actual sizes and real dimensions. Cabinet heights and passage widths can be tried out virtually, adapted to ergonomic requirements and the individual spatial perception.

value.longSummary: Automate multi-step business processes: task orchestration, team coordination, approvals
value.description:
🔄 Multi-Step Process Automation for Business Central

Stop manual process coordination through email chains and spreadsheets. 0-Code Advanced Work Flow for Business Central orchestrates multi-step business processes automatically—task sequencing, team coordination, progress tracking, escalation management, and accountability without coding.

Automate employee onboarding, purchase approvals, vendor setup, credit reviews, inventory replenishment, service requests, contract approvals, month-end tasks, and multi-step Business Central workflow processes.


⚡ Key Features:

✓ Full Task Orchestration
Define workflows with task dependencies. Sequential, parallel, conditional, or dependent tasks. All only by configuration, no programming required.

✓ Team Coordination & Assignment
Assign tasks to users, teams, or roles. BC determines correct assignee. Workload balancing and manager visibility.

✓ Real-Time Progress Tracking
See every workflow's status instantly. View current task, assigned user, completion percentage. Identify bottlenecks immediately.

✓ Automatic Escalation & Reminders
Configure escalation rules per template. Reminders before due dates. Manager escalation if overdue.

✓ Built-In Business Rules Engine
Includes complete Business Rules engine for task validation. 10 action types: Error, Message, Confirmation, Notification, Email, Assign, URL, Custom Action, Power Automate, Insert Record.

✓ Complete Audit Trail
Every task logged with assigned user, due date, completion date, completer, notes, validation results.

✓ Universal BC Compatibility
Works with all Business Central tables: standard Microsoft tables, ISV extensions, custom tables and fields.


📋 Real-World Workflow Scenarios:

👥 Employee Onboarding: HR documentation → IT account setup → Equipment assignment → Training → Manager introduction → Payroll enrollment.

✅ Purchase Approvals: Manager review → Budget verification → Purchasing evaluation → Director approval → PO generation. 5-day average vs. 15 days manual.

🏢 Vendor Setup: Purchasing review → Tax forms → Payment terms → Finance approval → System configuration → First order.

💳 Credit Limit Increases: Sales assessment → Credit report review → Finance analysis → Director approval → AR notification → Customer communication.

📦 Inventory Replenishment: Purchasing review → Vendor selection → PO creation → Receiving → Quality check → Bin placement.

🔧 Service Requests: Request logging → Technician assignment → Parts ordering → Scheduling → Execution → Verification → Follow-up.

📅 Month-End Closing: Journal preparation → Department review → Reconciliation → Adjustments → Approval → Final close → Reporting.


⭐ Why Choose 0-Code Advanced Work Flow?

✓ Simple and Intutive Interface
Business analysts configure workflows using BC's familiar interface—no IT specialists required.

✓ Complete Process Management
Real-time workflow status visibility. Team workload tracking. Bottleneck identification.

✓ Comprehensive Process Automation
Beyond approvals: 19+ workflow scenario types including onboarding, operational processes, notifications, compliance, cross-department coordination.

✓ No External Systems
Everything runs within Business Central. No middleware. No separate workflow system.

✓ Built-In Validation Engine
Complete Business Rules engine for task validation. One platform for workflow orchestration AND business rule automation.

✓ Business Central Native
Installs from AppSource. Uses BC data directly. Works with BC Online and on-premises.


Get Started Today

Install from AppSource in minutes. Free trial with full functionality.

Request a free demo: Schedule your personalized demonstration

Documentation & Support: Visit our support page for guides

Fully transactable app with licensing and payment through Microsoft AppSource. All subscriptions and billing managed by Microsoft.

Available in all countries where Business Central is available.

value.longSummary: No-code automation platform: validate data, send emails, trigger actions from BC events
value.description:
🔧 No-Code Automation Platform for Business Central


Stop expensive AL customizations for business logic. 0-Code Business Rules for Business Central is a comprehensive automation platform that validates data, sends emails, triggers notifications, populates fields, integrates systems, and enforces policies—all without writing code.

Far beyond validation: 10 action types automate every aspect of Business Central business rules through simple configuration. Business analysts configure rules. Developers focus on complex requirements. Save thousands of dollars per customization.


⚡ Key Features:

✓ 10 Action Types for Complete Automation
Error: Block invalid transactions. Message/Confirmation: Display prompts. Notification: Send BC notifications. Email: HTML emails with reports. Assign: Auto-populate fields. URL: Open web pages. Power Automate: Trigger flows. Insert Record: Create audit logs.

✓ Formula-Based Conditions
Configure business logic using BC filter syntax. Cross-table validation. Complex AND/OR logic. Date comparisons. User role checking. Formula calculations.

✓ Transaction-Level Execution
Rules execute before BC commits transactions. Block invalid data before database touched. Guarantee data integrity automatically.

✓ Universal BC Compatibility
Create business rules for any Business Central table: standard Microsoft tables, ISV extensions, custom tables and fields. Works across all BC modules.

✓ Complete Audit Trail
Every rule execution logged: timestamp, user, condition result, actions executed, fields modified.


📋 Real-World Business Rule Automation:

✅ Conditional Mandatory Fields
Require fields based on document status. Rejection reasons when quote lost. Budget codes when amount exceeds threshold. Dynamic field requirements based on business context.

📝 Auto-Populate Based on Business Logic
Copy dimensions from customer category. Calculate margin alerts. Set priorities based on customer tier and order value. Auto-assign cost centers using cross-table logic.

🚫 Advanced Duplicate Prevention
Block duplicate emails across contact types. Prevent duplicate vendor invoice numbers. Cross-table duplicate checking. Custom uniqueness validation.

💳 Custom Validation & Blocking
Block orders when customer has overdue invoices. Prevent payments without matching receipts. Require manager override for policy exceptions. Custom business policy enforcement.

📧 Event-Driven Email Notifications
Email customers when orders ship with tracking. Notify procurement when inventory hits reorder point. Alert managers when high-value quotes lost. Custom HTML emails with BC data and PDFs.

🔒 Cross-Table Data Validation
Verify credit limits across companies. Check item availability before commitment. Validate project budgets. Ensure territory matches location. Multi-table relationship enforcement.


⭐ Why Choose 0-Code Business Rules?

✓ Replace AL Development Costs
AL customizations cost thousands of dollars per requirement. Business Rules configuration costs fraction—typically hours instead of weeks.

✓ Empower Business Analysts
Business users configure rules themselves using familiar BC interface. No waiting for developer availability. No deployment cycles.

✓ Comprehensive Automation Platform
One platform handles validation, email automation, field population, notifications, audit logging, external integration.

✓ Enterprise-Grade Reliability
Transaction-level execution. Automatic retry logic. Error tracking. Performance optimized. Battle-tested in production.

✓ Business Central Native
Installs from AppSource. Uses BC data directly. Works with BC Online and on-premises.


Get Started Today

Install from AppSource in minutes. Configure your first validation rule in under 30 minutes. Free trial with full functionality.

Request a free demo: Schedule your personalized demonstration

Documentation & Support: Visit our support page for guides

Fully transactable app with licensing and payment through Microsoft AppSource. All subscriptions and billing managed by Microsoft.

Available in all countries where Business Central is available.

value.longSummary: Send automated emails from Business Central with dynamic content and report attachments
value.description:
Automate Business Central Email Communication

Stop manually sending invoices, purchase orders, and customer communications. 0-Code Email Automation for Business Central automatically sends professional HTML emails triggered by your business processes—with report attachments, dynamic content, and full customization without coding.

Automate invoice delivery, order confirmations, shipment notifications, payment reminders, quote emails, and Business Central email communication across all modules.


⚡ Key Features:

✓ Rich Text Email Designer
Create email templates with rich formatting, company branding, images, professional layouts. Built-in rich text editor or paste custom HTML. Preview before activation.

✓ Dynamic Content Placeholders
Insert BC data automatically: customer name, order number, invoice amount, due date, salesperson, item details. Reference any BC field using placeholder syntax.

✓ Report Attachments
Attach any BC report as PDF: invoices, purchase orders, statements, packing slips, quotes, reminders. Reports generate automatically using current record data.

✓ Conditional Email Sending
Send emails based on business rules. Configure conditions using BC filter syntax—no coding needed.

✓ Multiple Recipients
Email customers, vendors, employees, managers, teams. Define recipients from BC contact data. CC and BCC supported.

✓ Email History & Audit Trail
Track every email sent: timestamp, recipient, subject, status, attachments. Complete audit trail for compliance.

✓ Universal BC Compatibility
Works with all Business Central tables: standard Microsoft tables, ISV extensions, custom tables and fields.


Real-World Email Automation:

📄 Sales & Invoicing
Invoice delivery with PDF when posted. Order confirmations when created. Quote emails with PDF and terms. Shipment notifications with tracking. Payment reminders for overdue invoices.

📦 Purchasing
Purchase order emails to vendors when PO creates. Receiving notifications when goods arrive. Payment confirmations when processed. RFQ emails to multiple vendors.

🔧 Customer Service
Service order confirmations when requests logged. Technician assignment notifications. Service completion with invoice attached. Follow-up survey emails.

📊 Inventory & Operations
Stock level alerts when inventory low. Transfer order notifications to warehouse. Cycle count task emails. Quality issue alerts to managers.


Why Choose 0-Code Email Automation?

✓ Replace Manual Email Sending
Stop copying data into templates manually. Automate 100% of transactional emails—invoices, orders, confirmations, reminders.

✓ Professional Branded Communication
Rich text formatting ensures emails match your brand. Dynamic data prevents typos. Report PDFs deliver professional documentation.

✓ Instant ROI
Configuration takes hours, not weeks. No development costs. Unlimited emails included. Immediate time savings.

value.longSummary: Trigger Microsoft Power Automate flows from Business Central events with conditional logic
value.description:
🔗 Connect Business Central to 500+ Cloud Services

Integrate Business Central with Microsoft Teams, SharePoint, CRM, SMS services, and 500+ cloud applications—without custom development. 0-Code Power Automate Connector for Business Central triggers Power Automate flows automatically from BC events with rule-based conditions.

Post to Teams when high-value orders create. Upload documents to SharePoint when invoices post. Send SMS alerts when inventory drops. Update CRM when customers change. All automated Business Central Power Automate integration without coding.


⚡ Key Features:

✓ Conditional Flow Triggering
Trigger flows based on business rules: only for high-value orders, VIP customers, specific item categories. Configure conditions using BC filter syntax. Flows trigger when needed, not for every record.

✓ Dynamic JSON Payload Composition
Send BC data to flows: customer details, order amounts, item information, posting dates, any BC field. Compose JSON payload with simple field mapping. Flows receive structured data ready for processing.

✓ Real-Time Webhook Delivery
HTTP POST to flow webhook URLs when triggers fire. Real-time delivery with automatic retry logic.

✓ Multiple Flow Integration
Connect one BC event to multiple flows. Send Teams notification AND create SharePoint document AND update CRM—all from single BC trigger.

✓ Event History & Monitoring
Track every flow trigger: timestamp, event type, condition result, payload sent, flow response. Complete audit trail for troubleshooting.

✓ Universal BC Compatibility
Works with all Business Central tables: standard Microsoft tables, ISV extensions, custom tables and fields. Integrate all BC modules with cloud services.


📋 Real-World Power Automate Integration:

👥 Microsoft Teams Collaboration
Post to sales channel when high-value orders create. Notify service team when urgent requests logged. Alert managers when approvals pending. Share shipment updates in customer-specific channels.

📁 SharePoint Document Management
Upload posted invoices to SharePoint library. Create vendor folders when new vendors set up. Archive purchase orders with metadata. Generate approval documents when workflows trigger.

💼 CRM Synchronization
Update Dynamics 365 Sales when BC customer data changes. Sync opportunities to external CRM. Create activities when orders close. Push invoice data to accounting systems.

📱 Communication & Alerts
Send SMS messages when shipments dispatch. Email executives daily sales summary. Post social media updates about product launches. Send Slack notifications for operational alerts.

🌐 External System Integration
Update e-commerce platforms when inventory changes. Push data to marketing automation. Sync pricing to external quote systems. Integrate production data with MES systems.


⭐ Why Choose 0-Code Power Automate Connector?

✓ Gateway to 500+ Services
Unlock entire Power Automate ecosystem: Teams, SharePoint, Outlook, Excel, OneDrive, plus 500+ third-party services like Salesforce, Slack, DocuSign, Shopify.

✓ Rule-Based Intelligence
Conditional logic ensures flows execute only when business conditions met—reducing unnecessary flow runs and costs.

✓ No Custom Development
Standard BC connector requires AL development. Power Automate Connector handles any integration through configuration—no coding needed.

✓ Visual Flow Design
Build complex integrations using Power Automate's visual designer. 400+ pre-built connectors and actions.

✓ Business Central Native
Installs from AppSource. Uses BC data directly. Works with BC Online and on-premises.

Request a free demo: Schedule your personalized demonstration

Conditional logic ensures flows execute only when business conditions met—reducing unnecessary flow runs and costs.

✓ No Custom Development
Standard BC connector requires AL development. Power Automate Connector handles any integration through configuration—no coding needed.

✓ Visual Flow Design
Build complex integrations using Power Automate's visual designer. 400+ pre-built connectors and actions.

✓ Business Central Native
Installs from AppSource. Uses BC data directly. Works with BC Online and on-premises.


Get Started Today

Install from AppSource in minutes. Connect your first BC event in under 30 minutes. Free trial with full functionality.

Request a free demo: Schedule your personalized demonstration

Documentation & Support: Visit our support page for guides

Fully transactable app with licensing and payment through Microsoft AppSource. All subscriptions and billing managed by Microsoft.

Available in all countries where Business Central is available.

Key Features That Set Us Apart

✔ All-in-One File Handling
Process UBL, PEPPOL, XML, Pictures and PDF files with ease. View embedded PDFs from UBL files directly inside Business Central.

Work entirely within your Business Central environment—saving time and reducing errors through automation.

plans.description: Use the Approval Matrix functionality for unposted invoices or posted invoices (payment approval). The price is per user.

value.longSummary: Easy and simple invoice or payment approval
value.description:
Introducing MatrixApproval: Revolutionize Your Approval Workflows!

Are you tired of manual, time-consuming invoice and payment approval processes? Look no further! MatrixApproval is here to transform the way you manage approvals.


Dynamic Approval Flows: Say goodbye to rigid, one-size-fits-all workflows. MatrixApproval adapts to your organization’s unique needs. Whether it’s department-specific, amount-based, or tied to specific dimensions, our app splits approvals seamlessly.

Efficiency Unleashed: Registering approval processes has never been smoother. With MatrixApproval, you’ll streamline your entire workflow, reduce bottlenecks, and accelerate decision-making.

Security First: Trust is paramount. MatrixApproval ensures data integrity and compliance. Your approvals remain confidential, and our robust security protocols keep sensitive information safe.

Cloud-Powered: Access MatrixApproval from anywhere, anytime. Cloud-based architecture means no more paperwork, no more delays. Stay productive on the go!

Tailored for You: Customize approval dimensions, set rules, and watch MatrixApproval adapt effortlessly. Whether it’s multi-level hierarchies, project-based approvals, or cross-functional teams, we’ve got you covered.

User-Friendly Interface: No tech headaches here! MatrixApproval’s intuitive design ensures quick adoption. Your team will love how easy it is to navigate.


Why Choose MatrixApproval?

  • Speed: Get approvals faster, without the hassle.
  • Precision: Fine-tune workflows to match your business intricacies.
  • Compliance: Stay audit-ready with transparent approval trails.
  • Collaboration: Foster teamwork with seamless communication.
  • ROI: Save time, reduce costs, and boost productivity.

Ready to elevate your approval game? MatrixApproval awaits!

plans.description:
The Team Plan provides full, unrestricted access to the UBL PEPPOL Document Viewer for organizations that require a scalable solution supporting between 6 and 100 active users. This plan is designed for companies that work extensively with electronic invoices and Peppol/UBL document flows and need every team member to benefit from unlimited viewing and processing capabilities.

With this plan, all assigned users can view, interpret, and validate UBL and Peppol BIS Billing 3.0 documents without any functional limitations. The plan includes complete access to embedded PDF visualization, and all advanced features the app offers. Ideal for finance teams, accounting departments, shared-service centers, and companies standardizing on electronic invoicing.

This plan grows with your business, allowing you to add or remove users within the 6–100 user range at any time, ensuring flexibility and predictable licensing for organizations of all sizes.

The Small Team Plan is designed for individuals, freelancers, and compact teams that require reliable access to the UBL PEPPOL Document Viewer. This plan allows 1 to 5 users to fully utilize the app without any feature limitations. Every licensed user receives complete access to all capabilities, including embedded PDF preview, and full UBL/Peppol BIS Billing 3.0 document support.

Ideal for small businesses, accountants, consultants, and organizations with modest electronic invoicing needs, this plan offers an efficient and cost‑effective way to adopt structured e‑invoicing. Users can work simultaneously, process incoming UBL documents, and seamlessly view readable invoice layouts without restrictions.

This plan provides the same high‑quality functionality as larger tiers but packaged specifically for smaller teams who require professional capabilities at a manageable scale.

value.longSummary: Turn complex UBL and Peppol electronic invoices into clear, readable documents — instantly.
value.description:
The UBL / Peppol Document Viewer allows you to open any UBL or Peppol BIS Billing 3.0 XML invoice and display it as a clean, human‑readable invoice layout. No technical knowledge is required: simply open the XML file, and the app renders a structured invoice with supplier details, buyer information, invoice lines, VAT totals, payment data, and more — just like a traditional PDF invoice.

If the UBL file contains an embedded PDF, the app automatically detects it and displays or extracts the original PDF.

The viewer is designed for anyone working with electronic invoicing — including accountants, SMEs, developers, and Business Central or ERP users — and is ideal for countries where structured e‑invoicing is mandatory (such as Belgium’s Peppol requirement).


Key Features

  • Readable Invoice Rendering
    Opens UBL / Peppol XML files and displays them as clear invoice layouts, including supplier, customer, line items, VAT, totals, and payment instructions.

  • Embedded PDF Support
    Automatically detects and displays any PDF embedded inside the UBL file

  • Peppol BIS Billing 3.0 Compatibility
    Supports modern e‑invoicing standards commonly used across Europe.

  • Secure Local Processing
    All invoice rendering occurs locally on your device

  • Clean, Professional Layout
    View invoices in a printable, user‑friendly format that mirrors real business documents.

  • Perfect for Accounting & Compliance
    Suitable for environments where structured invoicing is mandatory (e.g., Peppol infrastructure).


Who Is This App For?

  • Businesses receiving UBL / Peppol invoices
  • Accountants and financial administrators
  • IT and ERP consultants (e.g., Dynamics Business Central users)
  • Developers analyzing UBL invoice contents
  • SMEs transitioning to e‑invoicing workflows

plans.description:
1 Alpha Leaf fills the missing gaps in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central to manage your Cannabis business processes.


Why 1 Alpha Leaf?

1 Alpha Leaf’s adds seed-to-sale functionality to Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central and makes it the only complete cloud-based application to serve the needs of the cannabis industry in a single solution. 1 Alpha Leaf also fully integrates with METRC. 

Functionality

At a Glance added functionality:

  •     Strain Management
  •     Plant Lifecycle Management
  •     Plant Harvesting
  •     Packaging
  •     METRC Integration

Supported Editions:

  •     This app supports the Essentials and Premium Editions of Dynamics 365 Business Central.

Supported Countries:

  •     United States
  •     Canada

Supported Languages:

  •     This app is available in English (United States)

plans.displayName: 1 Day - Azure Stack HCI Hardware Design Assesment
plans.summary: In this workshop our Azure Stack HCI experts will guide you on making the right choices when choosing hardware (vendor). Contact us for more information.
plans.description:
Choosing the right hardware (vendor) for Azure Stack HCI can be ambiguous, especially with HCI infrastructures. Although all hardware vendors provide guidelines and pre-designed setups we come across a lot of design mistakes that are expensive to change when the hardware is already ordered. In this workshop we will help you make decisions for your new Azure Stack HCI solution based on your input.

We will go through:

  1. The requirements set by your organization.
  2. Input on current environment and future sizing.
  3. Azure Stack HCI OS or Windows Server 2022.
  4. Hardware components - HDDs, SSDs, NVMes, NIC vendors, RDMA types, Storage switches, Bandwidth requirements etc.
  5. Create a hardware design document which you can hand-over to the vendor of choice.

Let the experts of Splitbrain help you with your new Azure Stack HCI solution and don't encounter surprises when installing it.

Reach out to us for more information.

https://www.splitbrain.com/

plans.summary: A 1-day working session, designed for business and IT stakeholders, that guides your business in understanding the AI products and services offered by Azure and how best to use them.
plans.description:
As an experienced Azure Gold Partner, Trianz understands business' intense focus on Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Cognitive Services as a means of gaining a competitive advantage. However, the cost, time investment, and knowledge necessary can be substantial, when you don't know where to begin.

The Trianz AI workshop includes is a single day of breadth and depth on Azure's various AI products and services. Included in the workshop are topics such as:

  • Understanding if AI, ML, and Azure's Cognitive Services are right for you
  • How best to experiment with these products (including services like Azure Cognitive Search, Azure Bot Service, LUIS, Machine Learning Studio, etc.)
  • A review of real-world use-cases
  • An high-level implementation plan, for a given AI product or architecture
  • A Q&A session to fill any remaining gaps in understanding Azure AI products and services
  • Following this assessment, Trianz will provide you with an action plan to move forward with your AI journey

Microsoft's democratization of AI has made it easier than ever to experiment with the most cutting edge machine intelligence technologies available. Ask us how Trianz can help you take advantage of these products and services.

  • A Q&A session to fill any remaining gaps in understanding Azure AI products and services
  • Following this assessment, Trianz will provide you with an action plan to move forward with your AI journey

Microsoft's democratization of AI has made it easier than ever to experiment with the most cutting edge machine intelligence technologies available. Ask us how Trianz can help you take advantage of these products and services.

value.publisherDisplayName: Trianz IT and Cloud Solutions Pvt. Ltd
value.summary: A 1-day working session, designed for business and IT stakeholders, that guides your business in understanding the AI products and services offered by Azure and how best to use them.
value.description:
As an experienced Azure Gold Partner, Trianz understands business' intense focus on Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Cognitive Services as a means of gaining a competitive advantage. However, the cost, time investment, and knowledge necessary can be substantial, when you don't know where to begin.

The Trianz AI workshop includes is a single day of breadth and depth on Azure's various AI products and services. Included in the workshop are topics such as:

  • Understanding if AI, ML, and Azure's Cognitive Services are right for you
  • How best to experiment with these products (including services like Azure Cognitive Search, Azure Bot Service, LUIS, Machine Learning Studio, etc.)
  • A review of real-world use-cases
  • An high-level implementation plan, for a given AI product or architecture
  • A Q&A session to fill any remaining gaps in understanding Azure AI products and services
  • Following this assessment, Trianz will provide you with an action plan to move forward with your AI journey

Microsoft's democratization of AI has made it easier than ever to experiment with the most cutting edge machine intelligence technologies available. Ask us how Trianz can help you take advantage of these products and services.

plans.summary: Jump start your Netbackup migration with a comprehensive migration assessment!
plans.description:
Protect your data from ransomware or unexpected downtime with NetBackup from Veritas, deployed on Microsoft Azure. NetBackup and Azure ensure your data is easy to migrate and recover, so you can keep your business running and meet your compliance needs.

Chances are organizational, operational and technological changes have impacted your data protection operations. Adjusting to changing demands is an essential facet of safeguarding information. Veritas NetBackup Migration Services will provide expert technical resources to perform these maintenance and reconfiguration activities on your NetBackup systems.

Key Benefits with a NBU Migration:

  • Fully managed solution designed to support the specific needs of your digital transformation agenda, bridging the gap between physical and digital.

  • Reduce Cost and Time: Migrations tend to signal high cost and significant downtime. VAST methodologies enable organizations to migrate data at an affordable cost with virtually no down time.

The business drivers for a data migration vary, but include displacing legacy hardware, the adoption of cloud or SaaS based offerings or corporate reorganizations. Regardless of the reason, the need for data to be seamlessly and securely migrated as quickly as possible without loss of accessibility is essential. Veritas NetBackup Migration Services delivers rapid, secure end-to-end migrations with first-class data fidelity.

Briefing includes information on:

 * Assessment process
 * Migration process
 * Tooling
 * Pricing

In this one hour briefing VAST will walk you through the assessment and migration process for your Veritas NetBackup workloads to Azure virtual machines and Azure cloud storage technologies.

plans.summary: Plan, design, and deploy a Veritas Enterprise Data Protection solution in your Microsoft Azure tenant
plans.description:
Veritas Netbackup Implementation Services in Azure provides overall data protection of customer’s data in their Azure tenant. Our professional services team manage all phases of the project from planning, design, deployment, and testing to project closure. Our Veritas NetBackup services will include but is not limited to:

  • Planning and design session(s) to assist with architecting the desirable data protection solution in the cloud utilizing NetBackup’s data protection features

  • The deployment of following data protection services: * Initial setup of Netbackup instances in Azure * Utilize intelligent NetBackup backup policies to protect cloud data and workloads within the customer’s tenant. * Configuring data protection backup workflows leveraging Azure incremental snapshots and NetBackup’s data protection features. * Setting up self-service options for the Cloud Administrator to manage their data protection environment. * Reduce any on-premises tape storage and costs by protecting long term retention data using Azure Archive Storage. * Deduplicate and tier data to diverse cloud vendor infrastructures from a single deduplication pool.

Service Benefits

• Reduce the effort required to upgrade your NetBackup data protection solution • Ease upgrade concerns and shorten maintenance windows • Improve NetBackup knowledge with demonstrations and opportunities for hands-on experiences

VAST engineers average 12+ years of tenure and our call center is staffed with only senior level personnel. We provide a focal point for Veritas technical support and other technologies employed in the data center.

Our core competencies include: • Training & Certification – VAST has passed certification testing for all of the products that are a part of VAST’s IT solutions, and map to our customer’s environments. • Call Handling – VAST closes over 92% of the service calls without escalation to Veritas or other partners. This is the highest category of performance. • Contract Administration – VAST has a renewal rate of 98% of its service contracts within the timeframe of the renewal period. We have 100% reference-able customer base. • Customer Satisfaction – VAST scores in the highest percentile with respect to customer satisfaction, as measured, and evidenced by the high renewal performance. Currently there are only a few Veritas TSPP partners in the US. VAST ranks in the highest category for overall performance, especially in the area of service call handling and closures.

plans.displayName: 1 Month Microsoft Platform Jump Start Package
plans.summary: Enable your organization to quickly launch Microsoft Power Platform with the governance, security, and one production-ready Power App needed to solve a priority business challenge.
plans.description:
Microsoft Power Platform Jumpstart Package

EPMPoint’s Microsoft Power Platform Jumpstart Package is a focused, one-month engagement designed to help organizations quickly establish a secure, scalable foundation for the Microsoft Power Platform while delivering a business application that addresses a prioritized operational need.

This offering is ideal for organizations that want to accelerate digital modernization, reduce manual effort, and gain momentum with the Microsoft Power Platform in a structured, low-risk way. EPMPoint works with your team to align on priorities, implement governance and environment best practices, and build a production-ready Microsoft Power Apps solution, with supporting Microsoft Power Automate workflows as needed.

What’s Included

  • Microsoft Power Platform environment and governance review
  • Security and compliance alignment
  • Intake and prioritization of one business use case
  • Design, development, and deployment of a Microsoft Power Apps solution
  • Supporting workflow automation, as applicable
  • Knowledge transfer and recommended next steps

Business Value

  • Launch Microsoft Power Platform with greater structure and confidence
  • Reduce manual processes through low-code automation
  • Deliver a production-ready solution in a short timeframe
  • Establish a stronger foundation for future Microsoft Power Platform growth

Ideal For

Federal, State and Local Government, Healthcare, and Commercial organizations seeking a practical starting point for application modernization and workflow automation.
