plans.displayName: 1 Week Assessment Azure Cloud Cost Optimization
plans.summary: Going the cloud way to lower spending and optimize billing eventually increase ROI
plans.description:
Navisite’s Azure Cloud Cost Optimization (ACCO) service offers immediate discounts on key Azure services, includes access to CloudCheckr-a powerful tool for optimizing Azure cost and security--and provides direct access to a dedicated team of FinOps experts. ​

Get Lower Rates. Get lower rates for Azure resources as a result of joining Navisite’s CSP program.​

Expert Cost Guidance Included. Quarterly or monthly guidance from automated tools that has been validated by Azure experts. ​

Control Spending Alerts. Get alerted about cloud spending spikes before it's too late.​

Simplified Support Platform support through Navisite instead of navigating Microsoft ticket process.​

Understand your Bill: Leverage our Azure billing experts to understand how your money is being spent.​

Access to Experts. Access to recurring management and project services from an Azure Expert MSP.​

plans.displayName: 1 week Azure Security design & review workshop
plans.summary: The Redapt Azure Security QuickStart workshop enables organizations to understand current state and enhance their security posture and operations.
plans.description:
Redapt’s Azure Security discovery and design offering where we identify the operational model, supporting tools and security operations processes that are aligned to support the future state of the organization. ▪ Security Standards, Policy review & gap analysis ▪ Compliance requirements & gap analysis ▪ Cloud Architecture review and identify services to meet security and regulatory certification standards and requirements ▪ Identify access management and review for organizational control over cloud-based services ▪ Secure operations management recommendations based on industry standard security best practices ▪ Microsoft Azure security portfolio review including Azure AD, Azure Key Vault, NSG, ATP, Azure monitor, Azure security center, Azure Sentinel

A typical agenda includes: Day 1 – Threat protection and Identity and Access Management review Day 2 – Azure Architecture review, Security Integration & Networking Day 3 – Cloud security governance Day 4 – Compliance requirements & gap analysis Day 5 – Security Operations management & Microsoft Azure security portfolio review

plans.displayName: 1 week Proof-of-concept BI with Power BI
plans.description:
This application is available in Norwegian and English.

In this Business Intelligence Service, the customer will receive a proof-of-concept (PoC) Business Intelligence (BI) solution using Power BI as a visualization tool. The service will be useful for customers who are considering implementing a larger BI solution, or for customers who are inexperienced with the use of Business Intelligence and analytics. The solution can be run as a pilot project where the customer can subsequently evaluate the value and possible further development.

 

Business Intelligence helps to promote a data-driven culture where decision-making is to a greater extent supported by data and thus increase the quality of future decision-making.

 

The Proof-of-concept solution will include:

·       A Brief and precise mapping of the customer's desire for the finale result.

·       A maximum use of two data sources. Authentication and access to data sources must be facilitated in advance due to time efficiency as the main focus is the BI solution.

·       Data sources are directly linked to Power BI, and can come from on-premise or from various cloud providers.

·       Transformation and cleansing of data, in addition to KPIs, as well as measurements that will be carried out in Power BI.

·       Design of Power BI report and Dashboard for laptop and smartphone view.

·       Review of Power BI PoC and customer training.


Price: NOK 89 000

value.description:
This application is available in Norwegian and English.

In this Business Intelligence Service, the customer will receive a proof-of-concept (PoC) Business Intelligence (BI) solution using Power BI as a visualization tool. The service will be useful for customers who are considering implementing a larger BI solution, or for customers who are inexperienced with the use of Business Intelligence and analytics. The solution can be run as a pilot project where the customer can subsequently evaluate the value and possible further development.

 

Business Intelligence helps to promote a data-driven culture where decision-making is to a greater extent supported by data and thus increase the quality of future decision-making.

 

The Proof-of-concept solution will include:

·       A Brief and precise mapping of the customer's desire for the finale result.

·       A maximum use of two data sources. Authentication and access to data sources must be facilitated in advance due to time efficiency as the main focus is the BI solution.

·       Data sources are directly linked to Power BI, and can come from on-premise or from various cloud providers.

·       Transformation and cleansing of data, in addition to KPIs, as well as measurements that will be carried out in Power BI.

·       Design of Power BI report and Dashboard for laptop and smartphone view.

·       Review of Power BI PoC and customer training.


Price: NOK 89 000

plans.summary: Optimize your investment in Microsoft Azure with managed cloud services from Navisite
plans.description:
We help you manage and monitor your Azure cloud deployments. From cloud system pricing and design to implementation and 24x7x365 support. Our services cover both IaaS and PaaS deployments, with strategic advisors providing unbiased guidance. Navisite offers a robust set of Azure cloud services, including architecture design, migration plan creation, testing and execution, and production implementations. Navisite Azure managed services include: Cloud readiness assessment and planning

Design, architecture and migration services

Data resilience planning and implementation

Cloud optimization services

Cloud governance and service management platform

Proactive monitoring and incident response

IaaS and PaaS management (patching, etc.)

Data replication, backups, disaster recovery, etc.

Networking, load balancing and firewall management

Comprehensive security management

Regulatory compliance solutions

Guidance from a Microsoft Gold Partner and Azure Expert MSP

plans.summary: SEEPATH's 1 week Azure security implementation gives customers a centralized way to optimize, secure and manage their Azure workloads and be compliant
plans.description:
SEEPATH's 1 week Azure security implementation gives customers a centralized way to optimize, secure and manage their Azure workloads and be compliant

The 1 week implementation process covers a) Discovery session to understand and analyze the security posture of your current cloud infrastructure. b) Identify Security Gaps, Vulnerabilities and various attack vectors including Ransomware c) Document and deliver Security Assessment reports. d) Identity and recommend right solution for Securing workloads on Azure based on the assessment reports. e) Implement action plan to secure workloads f) Recommendations for continual improvement

DELIVERABLE'S: a) Azure Infrastructure Security Assessment Reports. b) Recommendation Reports. c) Implementation Reports / Project Documents.

plans.description:
Integrate 1&1 Business Phone smart telephony features into Microsoft Teams. Start and schedule meetings or easily join a video meeting.

1&1 Business Phone App for Microsoft Teams brings all your communication needs together in one convenient place. Make calls, start or schedule video meetings, and take advantage of powerful business telephony features directly from Microsoft Teams.

1&1 Business Phone App for Microsoft Teams enables users to:

  • Use of all functions of an enterprise PBX

  • Access to 1&1 Business Phone contacts from the Teams environment

  • The entire call history in one application: both from 1&1 Business Phone and Microsoft Teams

Less distractions, more productivity.

All PBX features are immediately available. So the combination of cloud telephony with Microsoft Teams enables quick access to streamlined internal processes and more time for concentrated work.

Use your favourite telephony features:

  • Settings

  • Favourites

  • Voicemail

  • Logging in/out of queues

To get started with the 1&1 Business Phone Microsoft Teams integration, you need an active 1&1 Business Phone account.

If you do not have an account yet, please contact our sales team under 08008040200 or request an expert consultation here: https://www.1und1.net/kontakt?themen_interessent=telefon&thema_kunde=telefon

Also, it is essential to install our desktop application and/or mobile applications to make phone calls or start and join meetings.

You can download the desktop app here: https://doc.1und1-businessphone.de/en/11-versatel-insights/downloads

The mobile apps are only available in Germany in the respective app stores (iOS & Android).

plans.description:
The 1&1 Business Phone Meet & Share Add-In makes it easy to schedule 1&1 Business Phone Meetings from your Outlook Calendar.

With this add-in, you can quickly add a 1&1 Business Phone meeting to any new or existing calendar event.

To get started, you need to have an active 1&1 Business Phone account that is entitled for Meet & Share Plus.

To register for 1&1 Business Phone's cloud telephone system, please contact our sales team.

plans.summary: For companies transitioning from traditional analytics using DW & BI towards AI and Azure, this assessment covers strategy, infrastructure, and personnel needs to make it happen.
plans.description:
You realize the value of building your own Data & AI capability. However, you have challenges with understanding

  1. How specific roles in Analytics serve company needs (Data Scientist, ML Engineer, Data Engineer, BI Developer, PowerApps Developer)?
  2. What are performance and pay scale expectations for tiered roles (e.g., Level-1 vs Level-4 Data Scientist)?
  3. What tools and infrastructure are available to meet the objectives? e.g. Power BI, Azure Machine Learning Service, Power Apps etc


Divergence.AI offers a 1-day consultation that

  1. Assesses the state of current capabilities and identifies gaps that include personnel, infrastructure and tooling.
  2. Maps analytics objectives for the year to specific use cases and KPIs

Based on your goals, our customized report

  • Defines obstacles and primary needs
  • Maps company personnel needs to specific roles (e.g., Machine Learning Engineer Level-1, Data Scientist Level-4, BI Developer Level-2)
  • Maps company infrastructure needs to specific tools (e.g., Azure Machine Learning Service, Azure Auto ML, Power BI, Power Apps with AI Builder)
  • Clarifies experience and certifications fundamental to those roles. e.g., DP-100 for AI Solutions on Azure, 70-768 for Power BI)
  • Compares available tools & technologies for achieving objectives e.g., Azure Machine Learning vs PowerBI)

plans.summary: Strategy Workshop for migrating Big Data Workloads to Azure - guidance and assistance in defining services & the overall solution.
plans.description:
This 1-Day Workshop is for business and technical leaders and key stakeholders and is held onsite at the client's facility.

Attendees:

Program Key Stakeholders (Business and IT)

Duration:

1 Day Onsite

Objectives:

Facilitate discussion and documentation of…

  • Business Value and Outcomes
  • Solution Architecture
  • Ongoing Operations
  • Timeline/Horizons Provide deliverables that…
  • Demonstrate business alignment
  • Outline initiatives, priorities, and time horizons
  • Highlight expected value

Agenda:

  • Business Context – Detailed use case review and success criteria
  • Architecture Review
  • Cloud Services Review
  • Ongoing Operations
  • Program/Project Time Horizons and Enabling Roadmap
  • Confirmation / Final Risk Identification / Deliverables
  • Discussion / Wrap up

Deliverables:

  • Business Value Matrix and Detail for Specific Use Cases
  • Conceptual Architecture (Edge to Cloud)
  • Program/project horizon mapping
  • Recommendations and Go-Forward Plan

Key Dimensions Reviewed:

  • Organizational Effect
  • Business Impact
  • Priority and Urgency
  • Expected Time to Deliver
  • Risks
  • Innovation or Cost Savings Focus and Impact
  • User Population and Consumption Patterns
  • Capability Assessment and Review
  • Datasets
  • Other Dependencies
  • Technologies/Tools in use/planned/vision
  • ML/AI requirements
  • Analytics and visualization requirements

plans.summary: Discover how Copilot Agents built with Microsoft Copilot Studio and Power Automate can transform your business through AI-driven automation in this 1-Day readiness assessment
plans.description:
Empower Your Organization with Microsoft Copilot Studio & Power Automate

This assessment helps organizations accelerate their AI transformation by combining the power of Copilot Studio and Power Automate. Together, they enable intelligent workflows, conversational automation, and seamless integration across the Microsoft 365 ecosystem. We help you identify automation opportunities, design Copilot Agent architectures, and define an actionable roadmap for deployment.

Assessment Objectives

Evaluate current business processes for Copilot Agent

Understand how Copilot Studio extends Microsoft Copilot with custom Agents

Explore Power Automate flows for back-end process orchestration

Assess data, security, and Responsible AI requirements

Define integration patterns and an implementation roadmap

Who Should Participate

IT & Digital Transformation Leaders

Process Owners and Solution Architects

Power Platform Developers

AI & Automation Project Managers

What’s Included

Discovery & Use Case Mapping Identify and prioritize scenarios where Copilot Agents and Power Automate can add value

Copilot Studio Deep Dive Learn how to design, configure, and extend Agents with real-world use cases

Power Automate Integration Connect flows, data sources, and APIs to drive process automation behind each Agent

Architecture & Governance Review Cover Dataverse, security model, and Responsible AI practices

Readiness Scorecard & Roadmap Receive actionable recommendations for Copilot Agent adoption

Key Outcomes

  • End-to-end understanding of Copilot Studio and Power Automate integration
  • A clear roadmap for Copilot Agent deployment within Microsoft 365
  • Practical guidance for building and connecting intelligent workflows
  • Increased efficiency, productivity, and business agility through AI

value.publisherDisplayName: CELERITAS YAZILIM VE DANISMANLIK LTD. STI.

plans.description:

The roadmap answers fundamental questions about digital and enables your business to stay accountable for your progress. It also allows you to answer tough questions around where to make immediate investments, how to attack your digital “low hanging fruit” and what existing efforts you should back off. We help transform your digital strategies into actionable initiatives and campaigns that leverage your key technology investments and align them with your business objectives.

plans.summary: The purpose of this offering is to give customers a crash course on the version-control tool git and how it implements with GitHub and Azure in a DevOps workflow.
plans.description:
Participants will be able to get some valuable knowledge surrounding git concepts, introduction to branching best practices, hands-on mentorship/practice utilizing git commands, and practice integrating with GitHub and Azure DevOps.

Agenda:

Module 1: Introduction to Git This module will teach students the history behind the creation of the git tool, as well as the underlying concepts that make git such an effective tool to leverage in the SDLC.

Module 2: Git Branching Best Practices This module introduces the concept of branching. Here, students will be able to understand what branching is, some best practices for branching, & get introduced to some of the most popular branching strategies to use in the industry

Module 3: Git Commands This module will dive into how to install git on your local machine, where you will be introduced to some of the most important git commands to know. Then, students will be able to get some hands-on practice using the tool to create a repository, perform basic branching, merging, and other strategies to manage your repositories.

Module 4: Integration with GitHub This module will discuss an overview of what GitHub is and how it goes hand-in-hand with the git tool. Here you will be introduced with the GitHub UI and led through the most important/common features. The participants will also be shown how to integrate their GitHub projects with Azure DevOps to provide a full end-to-end solution for your DevOps team.

Module 5: GitHub Actions This module introduces GitHub Actions and how it helps automate tasks in a GitHub software development workflow. It will first discuss the different types of actions you can create, allowing hands-on practice by creating your first action and using it in a sample workflow. This module will also dive deeper by taking a step-by-step approach through creating your own workflows that enable both CI (Continuous Integration) and CD (Continuous Delivery) using GitHub Actions

plans.summary: 1-Day Microsoft Fabric Workshop introduces unified analytics for data integration, AI, and BI. Learn Copilot-powered insights and understand how your data landscape benefits from Fabric.
plans.description:
Overview: What this workshop provides

Microsoft Fabric is an end-to-end analytics platform that provides a unified environment for data integration, analytics, AI, and business intelligence. With built-in Copilot, Fabric enables faster insights through natural language queries, intelligent assistance, and AI-driven analytics across workloads.

Credenca Data Solutions Pvt. Ltd. helps organizations unlock the full potential of their data. This 1-Day Microsoft Fabric Workshop is designed to introduce Fabric capabilities, explore key workloads, and understand how AI, Copilot, security, and governance work together in a modern analytics platform and help you understand how your data landscape gets benefitted from Microsoft Fabric.

What You’ll Learn:

  1. Understand Microsoft Fabric architecture and core workloads

  2. Explore data integration, engineering, warehousing, BI, and real-time analytics in Microsoft Fabric

  3. Learn how Copilot and Agentic AI enhance productivity and insights

  4. Understand security, governance, and administrative best practices

  5. Assess your current data and analytics landscape

What Will Be Covered During the Workshop:

  1. Current Data & Analytics Landscape

  2. Understand the sample data sources, integration challenges, access gaps, insight latency, and compliance risks

  3. Unify Data with Microsoft Fabric

  4. AI-powered analytics platform

  5. Open, AI-ready OneLake

  6. AI-enabled business users

  7. Explore Fabric Workloads

  8. Data Factory scenarios

  9. Fabric Databases

  10. Lakehouse & Data Engineering

  11. Data Warehouse

  12. OneLake & Power BI

  13. Real-Time Intelligence

  14. AI transformation with Microsoft Fabric

  15. Copilot & Agentic AI

  16. Copilot in Fabric: capabilities and pricing

  17. Agentic AI with Microsoft Fabric

  18. Fabric data agents

  19. Microsoft Fabric in Action

  20. End-to-end live demo

  21. Security & Governance

  22. Secure data in OneLake

  23. Governance, data lineage, access control, and tenant monitoring

Who Should Attend:

  1. Data & Analytics Leaders

  2. CIOs, CTOs, and IT Decision-Makers

What’s Included:

1-Day Instructor-Led Workshop (Virtual or On-site)

Live demos and architecture walkthroughs

Pricing:

Pricing is customized based on scope and delivery model. Contact us for a tailored quote.

plans.summary: Tailor-made Security and Identity workshop to show how Microsoft 365 can tackle most if not all of your security needs
plans.description: Our Microsoft Solutions Architects with perform a short Q&A session to determine what security and identity challenges your organization has, and then our security experts will develop a tailor made workshop to ensure we cover the security features that matter to your organization and you show you how to maximize your Microsoft 365 licenses. Whether it's enabling features you already have but didn't know, such as Single-Sign On and Mutli-Factor Authentication, Getting the most out of you Defender for Outlook and how it can replace other third party products you have, or Ensuring you have a "just enough" access with a Conditional Access policy.

plans.displayName: 1-Day workshop: On-Prem SQL to Snowflake migration
plans.summary: Capture the benefits of the cloud and eliminate common data challenges caused by data gravity, slow scalability, and difficult integrations by migrating your SQL database to Snowflake on Azure.
plans.description:
Key drivers for cloud migration include capturing superior analytics and taking advantage of the pay as you go model. For organizations leveraging SQL on-premises, these drivers can extend to solving challenges surrounding data gravity, scalability, and secure data integrations.

By migrating on-premises SQL to Snowflake on Azure, organizations can eliminate data gravity challenges via more simple and secure to connect cloud apps to databases, resolving potentially insecure manual workflows. Further, eliminating data gravity enables more real time access to data, enabling cloud native data analytics.

Additionally, leveraging Snowflake on cost-effective, on-demand Azure resources enables organizations to easily scale their database as their needs grow.

Fractal Analytics is uniquely positioned to rapidly drive successful SQL migrations due to our deep expertise in data and partnerships with Microsoft and Snowflake. Fractal experts have a history of working alongside Microsoft to deliver successful cloud projects, including data migration and modernization projects. In addition, AI and Machine Learning is a part of our company DNA, making Fractal Analytics an ideal partner for organizations who want to enable novel, new, data-driven use cases.

This workshop is designed to help your organization seize the benefits of a cloud-based database by assessing your current environment and developing a clear roadmap for migrating to Snowflake on Azure. At the conclusion of this workshop, Fractal Analytics will take the findings, review them, and develop a roadmap for migration to Snowflake within 1-2 weeks.

value.summary: Capture the benefits of the cloud and eliminate common data challenges caused by data gravity, slow scalability, and difficult integrations by migrating your SQL database to Snowflake on Azure.
value.description:
Key drivers for cloud migration include capturing superior analytics and taking advantage of the pay as you go model. For organizations leveraging SQL on-premises, these drivers can extend to solving challenges surrounding data gravity, scalability, and secure data integrations.

By migrating on-premises SQL to Snowflake on Azure, organizations can eliminate data gravity challenges via more simple and secure to connect cloud apps to databases, resolving potentially insecure manual workflows. Further, eliminating data gravity enables more real time access to data, enabling cloud native data analytics.

Additionally, leveraging Snowflake on cost-effective, on-demand Azure resources enables organizations to easily scale their database as their needs grow.

Fractal Analytics is uniquely positioned to rapidly drive successful SQL migrations due to our deep expertise in data and partnerships with Microsoft and Snowflake. Fractal experts have a history of working alongside Microsoft to deliver successful cloud projects, including data migration and modernization projects. In addition, AI and Machine Learning is a part of our company DNA, making Fractal Analytics an ideal partner for organizations who want to enable novel, new, data-driven use cases.

This workshop is designed to help your organization seize the benefits of a cloud-based database by assessing your current environment and developing a clear roadmap for migrating to Snowflake on Azure. At the conclusion of this workshop, Fractal Analytics will take the findings, review them, and develop a roadmap for migration to Snowflake within 1-2 weeks.

plans.summary: Solution assessment workshop for migrating on-premises Spark workloads running on Hadoop to Azure Databricks using WANdisco LiveData Migrator
plans.description:
Organizations with large on-premises data centers frequently run Spark workloads on Hadoop for its speed and ability to efficiently process and store large volumes of data.

Migrating Hadoop to Azure Databricks enables organizations to take this even further. It leverages a highly optimized version of Apache Spark which outperforms non-Databricks workloads by 50x. Beyond quicker processing times, this enables organizations to support real-time analytics and modern data science practices such as MLOps.

Further, by leveraging migration tools like WANdisco LiveData Migrator, Fractal Analytics can help organizations migrate their Hadoop clusters to a Databricks Delta Lake with zero downtime and zero data loss.

To help plan on-premises Spark to Azure Databricks migrations, Fractal Analytics is offering a 1-day solution assessment workshop where we assess your existing data environment, data sources, data connector availability, and business needs and requirements.

At the conclusion of the workshop, Fractal will assess our findings and deliver an initial migration roadmap within 1 to 2 weeks.

plans.displayName: 1-Hr Demo of Dynamics 365 Business Central for Financial Management
plans.description:
Give us 1-Hr and we will give you a clear vision of how Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central can help you manage your business with a powerful yet simple ERP solution.

We understand your company's unique challenges in scaling while improving profitability. A modern,cloud-based ERP solution is the right step in that direction.

In this demo, we will explain various features of Business Central. As time is limited, we will focus more on the Finance Management capabilities.

For a demo of all the modules, please feel free to select our 2-hour demo to cover everything possible with Business Central.

Agenda

    • Different features of Business Central
    • Different licensing types and their costing
    • Functionalities of Financial Management suite
      • General Ledger and COA
      • Bank accounts reconciliation
      • Intercompany transactions
      • Cost Accounting
      • Sales and Receivable, Procurement, and Payables management
      • Reporting and extensions
      • Integration with different third-party systems like Payroll, Warehouse Management
    • Project plan for implementation
    • Points to take care of before you start implementing
    • Q & A

Deliverables:

· Demo of Finance Management suite

· Clear understanding of license types & costs, project timelines, implementation cost

· Points to take care of for successful implementation

plans.displayName: 1-Tages KI Praxis Update Workshop (inkl. Copilot): Ihr Kompass durch die Welt der Künstlichen Intelligenz
plans.summary: Mit dem KI Praxis Update Workshop statten wir Ihr Team mit dem neuesten Wissen über KI aus. Lernen Sie, wie Sie KI zielgerichtet und profitabel in Ihrer Organisation nutzen können.
plans.description:
Der KI Praxis Update Workshop bietet Einblicke in aktuelle Entwicklungen und praxisnahe Anwendungen von KI inkl. Microsoft Copilot und hat das Ziel, Ihr Team zu befähigen, Künstliche Intelligenz gezielt und wir¬kungsvoll in Ihrer Organisation einzusetzen. Die Teilnehmenden lernen, das Potenzial von KI-Technologien zu erkennen und praktische Lösungen für Ihre individuellen Herausforderungen zu entwickeln. Der Workshop vermittelt umsetzbare Erkenntnisse und Methoden, mit denen Sie KI-Initiativen erfolgreich planen und umsetzen können.

  • Das Potenzial von KI erkennen: Erfahren Sie, welche strategischen Vorteile KI in verschiedenen Bereichen Ihrer Organisation bietet.
  • Wissensbasiert Entscheidungen treffen: Erwerben Sie die Kompetenz, Entscheidungen über die Einführung und Nutzung von KI in Ihrem Arbeitsumfeld zu treffen.
  • KI-Anwendungen verstehen: Vertiefen Sie Ihr Wissen über den praktischen Einsatz von KI-Tools und deren Einfluss auf Ihre Geschäftsprozesse.
  • Nachhaltige Integration von KI verstehen: Lernen Sie, KI verantwortungsvoll und nachhaltig in bestehende Prozesse zu integrieren, mit Fokus auf langfristige Effizienz und ethische Überlegungen.

Einblicke und Werkzeuge: Ihr KI-Kompass

  • Sofort anwendbares Wissen: Erwerben Sie aktuelles, praktisch anwendbares Wissen, das Ihnen hilft, KI-Lösungen effizient zu bewerten und zu implementieren.
  • Branchenexpertise und Einblicke: Nutzen Sie die fundierten Branchenkenntnisse unserer Expert:innen und verstehen Sie die Auswirkungen von KI auf Ihre Organisation besser.
  • Entscheidungskompetenz: Stärken Sie Ihre Fähigkeit, fundierte Entscheidungen über den Einsatz von KI in Ihrer Organisation zu treffen, basierend auf neuesten Erkenntnissen und Best Practices.

Individuell zugeschnittene Inhalte für maximale Relevanz

Der KI Praxis Update Workshop ist ein ganztägiger Workshop vor Ort in Ihrer Organisation. Der interaktive Workshop bietet:
  • Einführung in die Grundlagen der KI: Verständnis der Funktionsweise und der Anwendungsmöglichkeiten von KI.
  • Praktische Demonstrationen: von KI-Tools in realen Szenarien, die den Nutzen und die Implementierung veranschaulichen.
  • Individuell angepasste Inhalte: Der Workshop wird speziell auf die Bedürfnisse Ihrer Organisation zugeschnitten und gewährleistet maximale Relevanz und Effektivität.



Ihr Weg mit TRINITY und AppSphere AG zur erfolgreich digital transformierten Organisation.

Der KI Praxis Update Workshop ist Bestandteil unseres TRINITY Moduls Artificial Intelligence. TRINITY ist Digitalisierung dreifach gedacht. Es bietet insgesamt 10 Module zur digitalen Transformation und verbindet in jedem Projekt die drei Bereiche Technologie, Prozesse & Organisation sowie Mensch & Kultur. Das ist unser Rezept, Ihre digitale Transformation in Wirkung zu bringen.

plans.displayName: 1-Tages Update Workshop: Cloud Security & Compliance mit Microsoft 365
plans.summary: Entdecken Sie das Fundament der Cloud-Sicherheit für eine Compliance konforme Nutzung von Microsoft 365
plans.description:
Unser Update Workshop Cloud Security & Compliance mit Microsoft 365 bietet Ihnen eine einzigartige Gelegenheit, in die Welt der Cloud-Sicherheit und Compliance einzutauchen.

Der Update Workshop ermöglicht es Ihnen, komplexe Aspekte von Microsoft 365 Security und Compliance innerhalb der digitalen Transformation zu verstehen und Anwendungsfelder in Ihrer Organisation zu definieren. Unsere Expert:innen leiten Sie durch diesen Workshop und zeigen Ihnen auf, wie Ihre Organisation sicher und regelkonform arbeiten kann. Entdecken Sie die Vorteile der Cloud und wie Sie sie optimal nutzen.

Sicherheit und Compliance in der Cloud entdecken und verstehen lernen.

Erhalten Sie erste Einblicke: Mit unserem Workshop erhalten Sie ausführliche Informationen aus dem Themengebiet. Wir vermitteln Ihnen ein tiefes Verständnis für die Inhalte der Microsoft-Produktreihe. Bauen Sie Ihr Wissen auf und denken Sie strategisch: Nach unserem Update Workshop sind Sie bestens vorbereitet, um in die AppSphere Zielbild-Methodik einzusteigen, da Sie die Grundlagen und Hintergründe der Cloud Security und Compliance nun kennen. Sie werden sich über die vielfältigen Möglichkeiten durch Tools und Methoden bewusst und können beginnen, strategische Lösungen für Ihr Unternehmen zu entwickeln.

Security, Compliance & You: Ihre Mehrwerte aus der Modulkomponente Cloud Security & Compliance mit Microsoft 365

  • State of the Art kennenlernen - Was sind die aktuellen Standards?
  • Best Practices aus dem Bereich Cloud Security erfahren - Wie machen es andere?
  • Überblick über die Microsoft Security & Compliance Lizenzierung erhalten -
    Was sind die möglichen nächsten Schritte für Sie?

    Mit der TRINITY Modulkomponente Cloud Security & Compliance mit Microsoft 365 können Sie Ihre digitale Transformation mit Sicherheit vorantreiben.

TRINITY Modulkomponente Cloud Security & Compliance mit Microsoft 365

Nutzen Sie Ihre Chance mit dem Update Workshop, gemeinsam mit uns die Welt der Microsoft 365 Cloud Security und Compliance zu erkunden.
  • Darstellung des Microsoft 365 Security & Compliance Stacks
  • Vorstellung der Einzelkomponenten

plans.displayName: 1-Week Assessment: AI-Powered Document Governance with Qrypta
plans.summary: Simplify document governance with 1-week Qrypta assessment to identify sensitive data exposure, compliance risks, and governance gaps across Microsoft 365 and hybrid repos, with a remediation roadmap.
plans.description:
Unstructured data across Microsoft 365, file shares, and third-party repositories can introduce compliance and security risks when not properly governed. Organizations often lack centralized visibility into sensitive data exposure, access risks, and policy gaps.

Quadrant delivers a focused 1-week assessment powered by Qrypta, our AI-enabled Document Governance Platform. This engagement provides consolidated visibility across repositories, evaluates compliance posture, and delivers a prioritized remediation roadmap aligned with Microsoft security best practices.

Qrypta integrates with Microsoft 365, Microsoft Purview, Microsoft Entra ID, and Microsoft Sentinel, while extending governance coverage to SFTP, SMB, local file shares, and other third-party repositories. The assessment helps organizations strengthen governance and optimize their Microsoft security investments.

Scope of the 1-Week Assessment

1. Content & Sensitive Data Discovery

Selected repositories are scanned to identify sensitive, regulated, and high-risk data. AI-based classification provides visibility into exposure across structured and unstructured content.

  • Identification of sensitive and regulated data
  • Risk-based classification insights
  • Exposure mapping across repositories

2. Access & Identity Risk Evaluation

User access patterns and permission structures are analyzed to identify excessive access, orphaned accounts, and policy violations.

  • Over-permissioned account detection
  • Identity-based risk analysis
  • Access governance gap identification

3. Policy & Compliance Posture Review

Existing governance controls are assessed against industry best practices and regulatory requirements to identify policy gaps and enforcement weaknesses.

  • Policy coverage evaluation
  • Compliance risk heatmap
  • Alignment with Microsoft security capabilities

4. Remediation & Governance Roadmap

Based on automated scan results and expert analysis, a detailed Executive Assessment Report is delivered outlining prioritized remediation actions.

  • Prioritized remediation plan
  • Policy enforcement recommendations
  • Estimated effort and impact analysis
  • Phased implementation roadmap

Executive Deliverable

At the conclusion of the engagement, organizations receive an Executive Summary Report including:

  • Sensitive data exposure findings
  • Access and identity risk insights
  • Compliance posture evaluation
  • Governance maturity assessment
  • Remediation and automation recommendations
  • Estimated potential reduction in manual review effort (up to 60–80%, depending on environment)

Business Outcomes

  • Improved Visibility: Centralized insight into sensitive data across repositories.
  • Risk Reduction: Early detection of compliance gaps and access risks.
  • Operational Efficiency: Identification of automation opportunities to reduce manual review workload.
  • Audit Readiness: Structured reporting to support regulatory requirements.

The standard duration for this engagement is one week. Scope and timeline may vary based on repository count and data volume. A preliminary scoping discussion will confirm final coverage and deliverables.

plans.summary: Get a comprehensive view in one week with our custom Power BI dashboard. Gain actionable insights to optimize systems and processes.
plans.description:
One-Week Internal Dashboard Assessment

This one-week assessment focuses on creating an internal dashboard for clients to assess their environment. The Internal Dashboard provides a comprehensive assessment of the client environment, offering a snapshot of key metrics like infrastructure health, data lineage, and performance indicators. It highlights areas of strength and weakness, enabling informed decision-making and strategic planning and serves as a centralized hub for monitoring and evaluating various aspects of the client environment, promoting efficiency and transparency in operations.

Key Features:

  • Comprehensive Assessment: Conduct a detailed evaluation of the client's environment to identify pain points, bottlenecks, and areas of improvement.
  • Data Gathering and Analysis: Evaluate data quality within the client's environment, identifying inconsistencies, errors, or data gaps that may impact reporting accuracy and decision-making.
  • Interactive Dashboard Creation: Develop a dynamic and visually appealing dashboard using Power BI, allowing clients to easily visualize data, trends, and performance metrics.
  • Actionable Recommendations and Best Practices: Provide practical recommendations and tailored best practices alongside the assessment, enabling implementation of changes driving results.
  • Custom Power BI Dashboards: Create a suite of Power BI dashboards providing clear and actionable insights into the client's environment (e.g., Data Warehouse Health Dashboard, BI Tool Usage Dashboard).

Deliverables:

  • Assessment Report: Detailed evaluation report identifying key metrics, strengths, weaknesses, and areas of improvement.
  • Data Quality Analysis: Report on data quality, highlighting inconsistencies, errors, and data gaps.
  • Interactive Power BI Dashboard: A visually appealing dashboard showcasing data, trends, and performance metrics.
  • Recommendations and Best Practices: Practical recommendations and best practices tailored to the client's environment.
  • Suite of Power BI Dashboards: Custom dashboards providing actionable insights into the client's environment.

Next Steps:

  • Dive into our detailed Customer One Pager to understand the full scope of our solution.
  • Reach out to discuss how this strategic implementation can impact your organization's readiness for data-centric challenges.
  • Schedule a consultation to explore your internal dashboard assessment needs and implementation plans.

Discover how our One-Week Internal Dashboard Assessment can transform your data visualization and analysis capabilities. Dive into our Customer One Pager for an in-depth perspective, or reach out to discuss how this strategic implementation can powerfully impact your organizational readiness for upcoming data-centric challenges.

  • Actionable Recommendations and Best Practices: Provide practical recommendations and tailored best practices alongside the assessment, enabling implementation of changes driving results.
  • Custom Power BI Dashboards: Create a suite of Power BI dashboards providing clear and actionable insights into the client's environment (e.g., Data Warehouse Health Dashboard, BI Tool Usage Dashboard).

Deliverables:

  • Assessment Report: Detailed evaluation report identifying key metrics, strengths, weaknesses, and areas of improvement.
  • Data Quality Analysis: Report on data quality, highlighting inconsistencies, errors, and data gaps.
  • Interactive Power BI Dashboard: A visually appealing dashboard showcasing data, trends, and performance metrics.
  • Recommendations and Best Practices: Practical recommendations and best practices tailored to the client's environment.
  • Suite of Power BI Dashboards: Custom dashboards providing actionable insights into the client's environment.

Next Steps:

  • Dive into our detailed Customer One Pager to understand the full scope of our solution.
  • Reach out to discuss how this strategic implementation can impact your organization's readiness for data-centric challenges.
  • Schedule a consultation to explore your internal dashboard assessment needs and implementation plans.

Discover how our One-Week Internal Dashboard Assessment can transform your data visualization and analysis capabilities. Dive into our Customer One Pager for an in-depth perspective, or reach out to discuss how this strategic implementation can powerfully impact your organizational readiness for upcoming data-centric challenges.

plans.displayName: 1-day workshop - .Net cross-platform and mobile applications with Azure
plans.summary: One day of consulting and & application design services together with Sii experts
plans.description:
Let us briefly know in few sentences about your current situation and needs. - Enhanced communication : Create more than dull text and photo news , use engaging interactive and animated playlist, news, dashboard, data , templates or videos to present to users in a corporate tv channel directly inside Microsoft Teams.

plans.summary: Gain visibility into threats to your cloud environment using Azure Advanced Threat Protection to better understand, prioritize and mitigate potential cyber-attacks against your organization.
plans.description:
Personalized Microsoft Cloud risk assessment and mitigation workshop

Is Your Cloud Environment Secured?
  • Have you enabled all of the security features in your tenant?
  • Do you know how to properly monitor security threats?

If you answered no to any of these questions, this ½ day workshop will help your team detect potential threats and provide you with valuable insights on the latest in Advanced Threat Protection.

In this Cloud Security assessment workshop, you can gain visibility into your cloud environment. We will help you discover signs of any existing data exfiltration or compromised accounts. We will work with you in creating notification alerts to identify future malicious activities.

We will also help answer any of your questions about Microsoft cloud security and what it means for your business. During the time you'll get useable advice, best practices, and tips that we can help you implement right away!

What you'll learn
  • Introduction and setup of:
  • Advanced Threat Protection (ATP)
  • Microsoft Defender ATP
  • Microsoft Cloud App Security
  • Azure ATP and Azure Active Directory
  • Cloud Security Center
What you'll get
  • Deliverables:
  • A personalized cloud security risk assessment
  • 1-on-1 training on Microsoft ATP technologies
  • Setup notification alerts to identify malicious activities
  • Cost analysis and review of available ATP Services
Register to start your personalized 1/2 day Cloud Security assessment and we’ll show you how you can identify your biggest security gaps and take actionable next steps to reduce risk, detect threats, and drastically improve your security posture.

plans.description:
I. 10 Studio contains a "Formula Editor" that helps you better read and understand long and complex formulas.

  • Formula Editor automatically displays a long and complex formula in several lines with appropriate indentations.
  • Therefore, you could understand better the logic in the formula.
  • Anytime, you could format and modify the formula in the editor.
  • Finally, you could write a modified formula back to spreadsheet.

"Formula Editor" has an intelligent algorithm such that an expression will no longer be formatted in the same way all the time; many factors such as width limit, its surroundings, and other parts of the formula will be taken into account. You could adjust width limit and see different formats of a formula, which lets you quickly understand the formula.

II. "Spreadsheet Optimizer" helps you optimize your formulas in terms of efficiency and readability.

  • Spreadsheet Optimizer automatically identifies the formulas that can be improved in terms of efficiency and readability.
  • It proposes better ways to rewrite these formulas, and tells you why they are better.
  • Anytime, you could accept its recommendation or undo the change.

III. 10 Studio contains a "Bottleneck Detector" that helps you find the bottlenecks that show down your spreadsheet.

  • Bottleneck Detector detects slow worksheets among all the worksheets of your spreadsheet.
  • It can also be finer-grained and detect slow ranges inside your workbook.
  • As a result, amending the bottleneck of your spreadsheet will improve its performance.

IV. 10 Studio contains a "Spreadsheet Verificator" that helps you review spreadsheets and ensure their correctness.

  • Spreadsheet Verificator verifies all the cell values and formulas of your spreadsheet by types.
  • It either proves that the spreadsheet is exempt of a class of typing errors, or identifies the cell formulas that contain typing mismatches, which are clues to spreadsheet defects.
  • As a result, verifying and validating spreadsheets by Spreadsheet Verificator will improve their quality and prevent you from making business decisions with incorrect spreadsheets.

V. From "Helpdesk", you could directly chat with us about anything, including 10 Studio, Excel questions, VBA, programming, etc. We will be very happy to hear from you.

More details can be found in https://www.10studio.tech.

plans.displayName: 10 Week POC: Modernizing Financial Planning & Analysis (FP&A) with Crux Intelligence
plans.summary: Accelerate financial planning & analysis activities, generate accurate reports on-demand, and drill down into datapoints with Crux Intelligence leveraging modern financial data in the Azure cloud
plans.description:
Financial analysis can be a complicated, time-consuming endeavor. Financial data must be gathered, processed, then reviewed from multiple angles to determine the best path forward. Collection and analysis of data can be very time-consuming if done manually. Additionally, this time consuming process can limit an organization's ability to drill down into data and conduct in-depth analysis of financial data that could yield previously undetected insights.

To help organizations overcome the challenges presented by traditional financial analysis methods, Fractal Analytics is offering a 10-week proof of concept engagement where we will demonstrate how organizations can greatly expedite financial analysis activities, ensure data accuracy, and drill down into financial data via ad hoc financial reports with Crux Intelligence leveraging modernized financial data in an enterprise database built on Azure.

Crux Intelligence is an AI-drive data visualization tool from our parent company Fractal. It is designed to allow users to easily create on-demand data visualizations and dashboards by simply typing questions in natural language. Once a question is entered, Crux leverages AI to generate visualizations designed to answer the question or provide the requested data. From there, users can easily save the visualization to a dashboard for use at a later date.

Over the course of this 10-week engagement, Fracta Analytics will work directly with the customer to learn about their challenges, their current IT landscape, and develop a migration and data modernization roadmap. From there, Fractal will develop the required database on Azure, execute the migration, stand up required Azure services and infrastructure to support the Crux-based financial analysis proof of concept, and then bring on implementation experts from Fractal to implement Crux Intelligence. At the end of this 10 weeks, the organization will receive a functional proof of concept designed to demonstrate the value of leveraging Crux Intelligence and a modern database on Azure for FP&A activities.

plans.summary: TekLink.com is offering a 10-week implementation for your Modern Cloud Analytics as a change agent for creating Self Service Analytics and Data Consumption from Anywhere.
plans.description:
Modern Cloud Analytics enables your decision makers and employees a cloud-based platform for gathering transactional, IOT and third party data in a central Cloud Data Warehouse with visualization capabilities from Power BI or your tool of choice. Supported by Azure’s robust cyber-security, you can rest assured of running a leading enterprise grade BI platform. Our agile deployment approach along with Microsoft’s scalable and powerful technology enables both a rapid deployment and an affordable self-service analytics platform. TekLink’s Azure and Power BI Consulting Services Pricing varies based on requirements, number of applications, and existing maturity with cloud technologies.

Key Solution Features

  • Robust Analytics PaaS solution
  • Utilize Microsoft Power BI’s data blending capabilities
  • Leverage Microsoft Azure Data Lake for cost-effective data storage
  • Cloud based Infrastructure across Non-Prod and Prod environments
  • Run and support from anywhere with your Azure platform and reduce on-premise footprint
  • Scalable solution for growth and easily de-scaled for drops in data volumes
  • Enable business to use self-service analytics and visualization of the selected data sets
  • Setting up your non-Prod and Prod environments
  • Up to 5 Power BI Reports or Dashboards
  • Data sourcing from up to 2 systems and 10 ETL’s leveraging Azure Data Factory (ADF)
  • Build a foundation for future value-added increments
  • Knowledge transfer session on data models
  • 2-day Power BI training

Assumptions

  • Client will provide agreed resources to conduct requirements, testing, and other project deliverables
  • Assumes Client will have a subscription in place before implementation starts
  • 2 environments Non-Production and Production with a single cut-over
  • Data sources assumed to come from source systems such as SAP, Oracle, Salesforce.com, etc. Data cleansing and manipulation is a client responsibility

plans.summary: Alithya’s Cloud Adoption Framework (CAF) Ready Assessment is a more in-depth version of our 6-week assessment, designed to accelerate your cloud adoption journey to Azure.
plans.description:
Alithya will provide you with a CAF-aligned assessment that recommends a strategic framework for resource organization, landing zones, and initial app migrations.

Agenda:

The 10-week assessment includes what is listed in the 6-week assessment (as seen in the “Learn More” section) as well as the activities below.

Phase 1: Azure Setup Guide

  • Provide guiding principles for managing role-based access control including
  • An outline for enforcing governance, security, and compliance through policies and security settings
  • Provide recommended approach for resource naming and tagging

Phase 2: Azure Landing Zones

  • Deployment pipeline options for infrastructure

Phase 3: Best Practices for Initial App Migration

  • Evaluate your resource requirements for your initial migrations to prepare for your cloud adoption.
  • Review your compute/storage/database options
  • Provide deployment pipeline options for your apps
  • Provide recommendations on how to maximize your Azure investment

Deliverables: After completing the ready assessment your organization will receive the following deliverables, which includes one (1) round of review and update:

  1. Azure setup guide with recommendations on your cloud resources, including:

    • Azure subscription, resource group, and management group organization
    • High level role-based access control strategy
    • Governance and compliance strategy
    • Resource naming and tagging strategy

  2. Azure Landing Zone Guide with recommendations for:

    • Network connectivity
    • Azure Active Directory (AD) Tenants
    • Shared services
    • Deployment pipeline options for infrastructure

  3. Best Practices Presentation for initial app migrations where we recommend:

    • Initial app(s) for POC
    • Initial services to deploy in support of POC
    • Deployment pipeline options for apps
    • How to maximize your Azure investment

plans.summary: Enable more strategic planning with faster, more accurate forecasting leveraging AI and machine learning
plans.description:
To help organizations modernize their financial operations and improve FP&A capabilities, Fractal Analytics is offering a 10-week engagement to help organizations demonstrate the value of leveraging machine learning-based forecasting leveraging Azure Machine Learning.

Prior to kicking off the POC, Fractal works hand in hand with the customer to assess their current environment, pain points, and top areas of improvement. Fractal engineers and data scientists will also work to implement the initial infrastructure required to build the POC, including Azure Data Factory, analytics tools like Azure Synapse Analytics or Azure Databricks, and a database to operate off of, such as Azure SQL Database or Azure Data Lake.

Over the course of the 10-week POC, Fractal will identify development priorities, implement resources and architect the required environment, and build custom machine learning models for the customer's preferred scenario.

At the end of this 10-week proof of concept, the customer will receive a fully functional machine learning-based financial forecasting solution with Power BI dashboard for one forecasting function (e.g., OPEX, revenue, etc.).

Curious about the benefits of Machine Learning-based forecasting? Read about them here: https://go.nealanalytics.com/MLforecasting

Machine Learning forecasting customer story: https://go.nealanalytics.com/modernize-forecasting

plans.description:
EMPOWER USERS TO WORK THE WAY THEY WANT WITH MICROSOFT 365 AND GET 10% OFF AZURE AD IMPLEMENTATION, IN ADDITION TO A FREE NETWORK ASSESSMENT

Establish a solid technical foundation with the addition of Azure Active Directory (AD) Hybrid Solutions. Requires the Microsoft 365 License for use.

Our world has changed, and you need simple, secure solutions that help you transform your business and get things done from almost anywhere. Whether you’re adapting to remote work, serving your customers in new ways, or exploring different business models, Microsoft 365 can help you reach your goals and Azure AD can provide unlimited possibilities. Each is uniquely positioned to help build resilience through cloud solutions, enabling higher end-user productivity, satisfaction, and improving the bottom line by streamlining IT operations.


    • Receive 10% off Azure AD with your purchase of Microsoft 365
    • Free migration to Microsoft 365.
      • Make, receive, and transfer business calls from anywhere, using any device.
      • Make informed decisions with data analytics and visualization.
      • Safeguard your organization against malicious threats posed by email messages, links (URLs), and collaboration tools.
      • Assess your compliance risks, govern and protect sensitive data, and effectively respond to regulatory requirements.
      • Feature review for optimal performance.

    • Receive a FREE Network Assessment including a review of:
      • Dark Web
      • Security posture
      • Compliance
      • System
      • Logical
      • Physical
      • Interviews

Transform the way you work with end-to-end solutions that provide secure remote work options you can conduct from anywhere on any device. Now, with Microsoft technology, you can transform the way your company does business by leveraging cloud-based intelligence that enables your employees to unleash their creative potential and stay connected to one another.

There is no need to imagine a workplace without walls or limits. Make it happen by taking action to pursue your passion and grow your business with Microsoft. Microsoft Modern Workplace Solutions allows companies to take advantage of enterprise-grade offerings from virtually anywhere.


Build Your Business with a Direct Microsoft Partner

Learn more!

Some exclusions may apply.

plans.summary: End-to-end support in enterprise data transformation plan and implementation roadmap for data, cloud, and AI & ML solutions
plans.description:
CloudMoyo Intelligent Data Services (IDS) can enable your enterprise to define a high-level digital transformation plan and an implementation roadmap for cloud, data, and AI solutions on the Azure platform. Our focus is on a fast=track-to-value approach to accelerate vision-to-value from your investment or project. We help you migrate, build, and maintain modern data platforms.

Our capabilities:

  1. Data Engineering: Empower your business with our expertise in data engineering to build data models for analyzing data effectively. Our customers benefit from data warehouse and big data implementations to enable them to analyze and visualize data for data-driven decisions.

  2. Decision Analytics: Enhance collaboration and information sharing, optimize decision-making processes, and forecast market trends to drive business growth.

  3. AI & ML solutions: Compare, identify, anticipate, and recommend at scale with AI and machine learning capabilities to drive prediction and innovation in your organization.

Driving digital change is easier said than done. With the right approach, digital transformation offers tremendous benefits. Our phased approach is strategically designed to optimize these benefits.

Our FastTracktoValue approach follows a 10-24 week timeline, depending on the scope of the project. In the first 1-3 weeks, we conduct an assessment and lay out the BI strategy. In weeks 4-6, we provide a quick proof of technology. From week 7 onwards, we implement a targeted, high-visibility project for management and train-the-trainer.

*Disclaimer: Please contact us for a detailed pricing quote. The price listed for this consulting engagement is NOT $1. Pricing varies depending on the scope of services or project.

plans.description:
CloudMoyo Intelligent Data Services (IDS) helps companies in the architecture, engineering, and construction (AEC) and manufacturing industries define a high-level digital transformation plan and an implementation roadmap for cloud, data, and AI solutions on the Azure platform. Our technology experts in cloud, analytics, and AI focus on FastTracktoValue™ for the client and support them to migrate, build an analytics framework, and maintain applications.
  • IDS for AEC companies: Support a growing infrastructure and improve product schedule performance with intelligent data services, improve quality, reduce labor costs, increase bid win rates, and improve return on assets.
  • IDS for manufacturing companies: Support an end-to-end value chain and help you provide an exceptional customer experience with automated and integrated processes.

To get you there, we provide customized services and solutions to establish a data-driven culture:

  1. Cloud Engineering: Take your first steps to the cloud with cloud migration, cloud integration, cloud native app development, and cloud managed services.
  2. Data Engineering: Build a modern data platform with enterprise data migration, modernization and integrations, big data and streaming analytics, and master data and data quality management.
  3. Decision Analytics: Operational and actionable insights through self-service BI, KPI and executive dashboards, embedded business intelligence, and real-time analytics for data visulization.
  4. AI/ML services: We help you get ready for the future, with prediction and prescription, recognition and recommendations, IoT, and NLP.

Our FastTracktoValue approach follows a 10-24 week timeline, depending on the scope of the project. In the first 1-3 weeks, we conduct an assessment and lay out the BI strategy.   2. Decision Analytics: Enhance collaboration and information sharing, optimize decision-making processes, and forecast market trends to drive business growth.

  3. AI & ML solutions: Compare, identify, anticipate, and recommend at scale with AI and machine learning capabilities to drive prediction and innovation in your organization.

Driving digital change is easier said than done. With the right approach, digital transformation offers tremendous benefits. Our phased approach is strategically designed to optimize these benefits.

Our FastTracktoValue approach follows a 10-24 week timeline, depending on the scope of the project. In the first 1-3 weeks, we conduct an assessment and lay out the BI strategy. In weeks 4-6, we provide a quick proof of technology. From week 7 onwards, we implement a targeted, high-visibility project for management and train-the-trainer.

*Disclaimer: Please contact us for a detailed pricing quote. The price listed for this consulting engagement is NOT $1. Pricing varies depending on the scope of services or project.

plans.summary: Interview with technical staff about CIS Controls to measure the implementation status of control substances, including current controls, processes, and other requirements.
plans.description:
The CIS Controls are a comprehensive set of cybersecurity best practices developed by IT experts that address the most common threats and vulnerabilities that may affect your services offered on Azure Platforms.

  • Kick-off meeting via video/tele conference,
  • Remote session to fill the questionnaire,
  • Remote interview with the security, system, network and software department’s leads,
  • Reporting of findings with maturity score and tips for improvement ,
  • Report presentation via video/tele conference after submission of the report.
  • Estimated duration: 10-12 man/days

How Do We Perform We interview with technical staff and ask detailed questions about CIS Controls in order to be able to measure the implementation status of control substances, including current controls, processes, and other requirements while performing the assessment. It is an Q&A study performed with the technical staff. The following steps are applied to perform the assessment: • Relevant documents are collected and reviewed; list of controls, policies, plans, standards, procedural guidelines, drawings, etc.). • Interviews are conducted to determine conformance with the standards. Each control is measured against defined measurement criterias. • The report with the results of the assessment is prepared.

The Outputs • Executive summary is prepared including an overall evaluation of the assessment. • Suggestions are presented with evaluation results. • Compliance charts provided to make a visual appearance in line with the evaluations. • Each control item is included in the report as finding and suggestions are provided on how the finding should be treated.

plans.summary: Discover key needs and problems in your company, find solutions based on technology and increase the power of innovation within your organization with Prodware's Hackathon Power Platform service.
plans.description: A hackathon is a collaborative event that brings together different people to find solutions to a challenge. Participants brainstorm, collaborate and develop solutions. The goal of Prodware's Hackathon Power Platform is to have a prototype or proof of concept based on Microsoft Power Apps ready at the end of this 10-day event. A hackathon is a fun way to engage many people in your organization around a digital culture of change looking to develop applications and cultivate ideas to drive digital transformation. Teams come together, by business area or on a global scale, from different roles and departments to compete and create applications that address an organizational need. HACKATHON BENEFITS - Discover key business needs and problems by finding solutions based on Power Platform. - Inspire employees on how to work with Power Platform. - To make employees aware of the importance of their role in the company, not only as part of it, but also as knowledgeable about its reality and as solvers of its challenges. - To open a new horizon of possibilities for the resolution of present and future challenges through motivated participants. - To find future Power Platform specialists and champions. - Increase the power of innovation This service includes: - Hackathon Management - Preparation of the Preliminary Phase. - Competition Phase.    - Day 1. Presentation and Training Session.    - Days 2 and 3. Sessions of practical work.    - Day 4. Closing session. - Closing: Elaboration of report. - Days 5-10. Post consultancy pack. - Advanced training: App in a Day. HACKATHON PHASES PRE-COMPETITION - Appointing a Sponsor - Define objectives, challenges and KPIs - Action plan - Communication plan - Prepare the dynamics - Prepare environments - Decide on participants COMPETITION 1. Presentation and training 2. Practical work sessions and creation of Power Apps 3. Presentation and defense of ideas CLOSING - Selection and implementation of ideas - Closing report and conclusions

value.longSummary: To compare two numerical variables by category with each column further segmented by sub-categories
value.summary: To compare two numerical variables by category with each column further segmented by sub-categories
value.description:
The conceptual idea with 100% Clustered Stacked Column Chart is to compare multiple data series grouped by a common category. Further compare individual segments or component parts within an individual column, where each column sums to 100%.

Common use cases-
Finance: Actual vs Budget/Forecast spend within a given month; Actual spend further segmented by spend type.
Sales and Marketing: Product lines contribution to its revenue, Current Year vs Prior Year, for different regions

This visual is free forever in Power BI Desktop.
Trial License:
Power BI web service, click on Buy now to get free trial license. For Other Power BI platforms, to get free trial license click here

Purchase License:
Power BI service (Power BI Pro)- Purchase license available in the Plans + Pricing tab. Power BI premium (A1 to A6 and P1 to P5 SKUs) - Purchase license from our website www.pbivizedit.com/pricing


FEATURES AVAILABLE
  • Conditional color formatting
  • Modify column offset, width, color and transparency
  • Formatting with patterns
  • Custom label formatting
  • General Power BI features like tooltip page, drill down
ABOUT US

PBIVizEdit is a powerful online tool to easily create Power BI custom visuals with simple mouse clicks in 15 mins. It also provides packages for ready-to-use custom visuals. To try our tool or to upgrade your single custom visual purchase to a package, visit our website at www.pbivizedit.com

plans.description:
100% Stacked Bar Chart by Akvelon has similar functionality as product 100% Stacked bar chart and allows you to plot bars based on category and value data from your data source. Additionally it supports rectangle selection - such filtering allows to select multiple bars within rectangle area. This feature will help you to filter specific cluster within your data and update your report accordingly.
Other important features are:
- Legend that supports selection
- Ability to change colors of the bars - you can set specific color for each Legend category

How to use Small Multiple feature:

Visuals have following additional “small multiple” field buckets:
- Column By
- Row By (can be filled only together with Column By)

User can define rows and columns of the visual in two ways: 
- Set both “Row By” and “Column By” field buckets. In this case rows and columns will be generated based on those category values
- Set only “Column By” field bucket and leave “Row By” empty. In that case there will be only one dimension of small multiple categories, and small multiples will be generated from left to right and wrap to the next row – similar as left-to-right text direction in a page.

Note: Color saturation can be set only if Legend is not set.
Hope you enjoy our custom visual for Power BI! If you have suggestions or questions, feel free to contact at https://akvelon.com/feedback

plans.description: The 1000minds conjoint analysis plan offers access to the full suite of 1000minds conjoint analysis survey and analysis tools, along with the advice and support of the 1000minds team.

value.longSummary: 1000minds helps you understand what matters to people and simulate ”what-if“ market outcomes
value.description:
1000minds conjoint analysis – market simulator is an advanced software solution designed to help organizations, individuals, and groups understand what matters most to people. By leveraging powerful conjoint analysis, discrete choice experiments, multi-criteria decision analysis, and market simulation tools, this platform enables users to gain deep insights into preferences and priorities.

Ideal for market researchers, business strategists, and decision-makers, 1000minds empowers users to simulate market scenarios and analyze customer choices effectively. It provides a structured approach to understanding consumer behavior, helping users make informed decisions that align with their target audience's needs.

This software addresses the critical need for better understanding and decision-making in complex environments. By uncovering what truly matters to people, it enables organizations to optimize their strategies, improve product offerings, and create impactful solutions that resonate with their audience.

1000minds Conjoint Analysis is a powerful software solution designed to help organizations, individuals, and groups understand what matters most to people. By leveraging advanced tools such as conjoint analysis, discrete choice experiments, and multi-criteria decision analysis, it enables users to uncover preferences and make informed decisions.

This software is ideal for researchers, marketers, and decision-makers who need to analyze complex data and gain insights into customer or stakeholder priorities. Whether you're conducting market research, evaluating product features, or making strategic decisions, 1000minds provides the clarity and precision you need.

1000minds addresses the critical need for better understanding consumer and stakeholder preferences in a world full of competing priorities. By simplifying complex analyses and delivering actionable insights, it empowers users to make decisions that truly reflect what matters to their audience.

plans.description: The 1000minds decision-making plan offers access to the full suite of 1000minds decision-making tools, including group decision-making, voting, surveys, along with the advice and support of the 1000minds team.

value.longSummary: Make decisions consistently, fairly and transparently – 1000minds – a better way to decide.
value.description:
1000minds software helps you understand what matters to people and to make decisions consistently, fairly and transparently.

We believe that with better understanding and decision-making, the world will be a better place. That's why we help organizations, individuals and groups to discover what matters to people and to make better decisions. We do this with our online conjoint analysis and multi-criteria decision-making applications.

1000minds is designed for decision-making based on ranking, prioritizing or choosing between alternatives, in one-off or repeated applications. You might already be doing this intuitively or in spreadsheets. So, why use 1000minds?


1000minds gives you a complete process for structuring and solving decision problems. Our tools help you make better decisions by reducing biases that inevitably occur in intuitive decision-making, like relying on “gut feeling” and succumbing to group decision-making failures such as groupthink. As well as being user-friendly and inclusive, 1000minds is fair, transparent and potentially auditable, resulting in decisions you can trust and, if need be, defend.

1000minds is highly regarded for its reliability and validity, being used for research and teaching at 650+ universities and other research organizations worldwide. 1000minds has also been extensively peer-reviewed in many arenas over the last two decades. With a beautiful and user-friendly interface, it’s no wonder that 1000minds has been recognized in innovation awards and complimented as “a tool of great power and sheer elegance” (Consensus Software Award 2010, sponsored by IBM and Microsoft). 1000minds is also SOC 2 Type 2 certified providing assurance to you and your IT team about the security, confidentiality, and availability of your data on 1000minds.

plans.description: The 1000minds for Europe plan offers access to the full suite of 1000minds decision-making and conjoint analysis survey and analysis tools, along with the advice and support of the 1000minds team.

value.longSummary: 1000minds decision-making and survey suite for customers preferring European data residency
value.description:
1000minds Europe is a comprehensive decision-making and survey suite tailored for customers who prioritize European data residency. It empowers organizations, individuals, and groups to make informed choices by leveraging advanced tools such as conjoint analysis, discrete choice experiments, and multi-criteria decision analysis (MCDA).

Designed for professionals and teams across industries, 1000minds is ideal for those seeking to understand preferences, evaluate options, and optimize decision-making processes. Whether you're conducting market research, policy analysis, or resource allocation, this solution provides the insights you need to succeed.

By hosting this offering in Europe, 1000minds addresses regional data residency requirements, and the needs of customers who value secure and localized data management and compliance with local privacy laws. 1000minds Europe is the best choice for cusotmers wanting the full power of 1000minds and the assurance of European hosting.

plans.description: The suite of 1000minds tools, surveys, processes and associated support necessary to create a Health-Related Quality of Life value set.

value.displayName: 1000minds Health-Related Quality of Life Value Set
value.longSummary: Elicit people’s HRQoL preferences and create personal and social value sets – e.g. EQ-5D-5L & SF-6D
value.description:
1000minds Health-Related Quality of Life Value Set enables researchers, healthcare practitioners, and policymakers to elicit people’s HRQoL preferences and create personal and social value sets, such as EQ-5D-5L and SF-6D. This innovative solution is ideal for applications in research, personalized medicine, health technology assessments, and policy-making.

Designed for ease of use, 1000minds offers customizable surveys in any language, compatible with smartphones, and scalable for large country-level samples. The platform employs the proven PAPRIKA method for discrete choice experiments (DCE), ensuring valid and reliable results through pairwise comparisons as well as simple survey questions for participants.

Addressing the need for accurate HRQoL data, 1000minds provides real-time individual- and population-level insights, expert guidance, and support for academic publication. It is a turn-key solution for creating value sets, including scaling relative to “dead” and identifying health states worse than “dead.”

plans.description:
100Shoppers is a tool created for producers, which allows them to direct visitors straight to landing pages in online stores. The data generated and delivered to the producers in that process allow for more insightful.


The Product

    • Where-to-buy solution. Implemented on the producer's website, this solution displays a list of online retailers where the product is on offer.
    • Product reports. Here clients can find sales data, product popularity results, price distributions and availability of selected products in online stores.
    • Online campaign analysis. This tool allows producers to measure the effectiveness of marketing campaigns. Producers can track sales results form specific sourcesand ads.

Solving Problems

    • Converting visitors into shoppers. Because the visitor is directed straight to the online store, the risk of client changing their mind about the product is significantly reduced. This process also insulates customers against being taken over by the competition while browsing for offers in Google, or pricecomparison engines.
    • Thinking strategically. Data about sales, availability and price distribution in selected online stores helps producers to align the strategy on all levels of operation.
    • Boosting effectiveness of marketing campaigns. Using the data about the effectiveness of sales from specific sources and ads, the producer can optimize their campaigns for higher conversions in real-time.

plans.description:
Psychological AI is the world's first solution to directly analyze the quality of your relationship with your recipient. In addition to this, Psychological AI measures the needs of your conversation partner and provides important tips on how to better reach them while writing your email.

Psychological AI offers these features:

- Measure the quality of your relationship for an objective understanding of who you resonate well with and who you haven't yet. Understand what type of people you struggle with so you can better target them with training and tips.

- Identify your counterpart's needs so you can always assess them correctly in the future. Single words can destroy relationships. Understand what your conversation partners value and secure lasting relationships.

- Improve your individual writing style to continuously increase the relationship with your conversation partner. This leads to significantly more sales in your sales department.

14 days free trial to raise your communication to a new level with psychological triggers.

- Identify your counterpart's needs so you can always assess them correctly in the future. Single words can destroy relationships. Understand what your conversation partners value and secure lasting relationships.

- Improve your individual writing style to continuously increase the relationship with your conversation partner. This leads to significantly more sales in your sales department.

14 days free trial to raise your communication to a new level with psychological triggers.
