plans.description:
1080TMS: Intelligent Time Management System


1080TMS is a comprehensive workforce management solution that streamlines timesheet processing, leave management, and compliance across global organizations. Our cloud-based platform combines powerful timesheet automation with intelligent leave management and real-time analytics, enabling businesses to manage their workforce efficiently across multiple countries and currencies. With features like approval workflows, customizable pay rates, and detailed audit trails, 1080TMS transforms complex workforce management into a seamless operation.

Ideal For

- Medium to large enterprises with global operations
- Organizations managing multiple office locations
- Businesses with complex shift patterns and pay rates
- Companies requiring strict compliance and audit trails
- HR and Payroll teams managing large workforces
- Organizations with remote or hybrid workforces

Key Pain Points Addressed

- Eliminates manual timesheet processing and reduces administrative burden
- Solves complex multi-country pay rate and compliance challenges
- Removes the risk of non-compliant time tracking and leave management
- Addresses the challenge of managing global workforce across different time zones
- Streamlines approval workflows and reduces processing bottlenecks
- Provides real-time visibility into workforce costs and attendance patterns

Core Features

1. Global Time Management

- Unlimited timesheet submission and processing
- Multi-level approval workflows
- Automated compliance checking
- Real-time analytics and reporting

2. Intelligent Leave Management

- Automated leave accrual and tracking
- Country-specific entitlement rules
- Integrated approval workflows
- Real-time balance monitoring

3. Comprehensive Job Management

- Unlimited position creation
- Multiple location support
- Detailed shift management
- Role-based access control

4. Advanced Pay Rate Configuration

- Multiple currency support
- Customizable pay rates and penalties
- Automated allowance calculation
- Break management system

Benefits

- Reduce payroll processing time
- Ensure compliance with local labor regulations
- Improve workforce visibility and control
- Streamline administrative processes
- Enhance employee satisfaction
- Reduce payroll errors and costs

Technical Specifications

- Cloud-based SaaS solution
- Web portal for administrators
- Management portal for supervisors
- Mobile app for employees
- Secure data encryption
- Regular automatic updates

value.longSummary: This module provides per-line control of 1099 information for purchasing invoices.
value.description:
Note: This module is available only for US installations and requires Microsoft’s IRS Forms module to be activated.

The 1099 Per-Line Control for Dynamics 365 Business Central module enables precise, line-level attribution of 1099 amounts at the time of purchase entry. Instead of relying on year-end reconciliation or post-facto adjustments, accounting teams can proactively determine how each individual line item contributes to 1099 reporting—improving accuracy, auditability, and confidence in reported totals.

By default, the module assigns the full line amount as the 1099-reportable amount. No additional input is required unless the 1099 amount differs from the line amount. This accommodates common real-world scenarios such as partially reportable charges, allocations across vendors or services, split invoices, or any situation where the 1099-applicable portion of a transaction does not align exactly with the posted amount.

The module maintains its own internal table that records and associates any line-level 1099 adjustments with their originating purchase document lines. This design preserves a clear audit trail, supports validation and review, and ensures that changes to 1099 attribution remain transparent and traceable over time.

1099 Per-Line Control originated from a real customer request to address a practical operational gap in standard Business Central functionality. If year-end 1099 preparation currently involves manual review, spreadsheets, or last-minute adjustments, this module is designed to eliminate that friction by shifting control to the point of entry.


SOX / NI 52-109 Considerations

This module includes documentation intended to support management review and certification considerations under SOX Section 302 and NI 52-109.

The documentation, including a control narrative and flow diagram, is available here (for online view):

SOX 302 / NI 52-109 Control Narrative

Or, as a PDF:

1099-posting-adjustment-management-control-narrative.pdf

plans.summary: 10 VM Jumpstarts that includes express landing zones.
plans.description: This service offering includes a full standard landing zone service, which enables customers to build out their cloud data center to the best services provided by the cloud provider. Additionally, the service includes the migration of workloads to the Azure cloud. The jumpstart service includes the migration of 10 virtual machines (VMs) in 2 cutovers to Azure. For customers who require additional VMs, they can add up to 20 additional VMs for a price of $494 per VM, or up to 50 additional VMs for a price of $380 per VM. With this service offering, customers can seamlessly migrate their workloads to the Azure cloud, ensuring a smooth transition to the cloud while reducing costs and minimizing downtime.

plans.description:
10th Man supercharges some of the world’s biggest and brightest brands and their agency teams, democratising data to accelerate their digital transformation, compressing their time to act and fuelling their results.

Designed from the ground up to be different and beat bias, we’re here to help you take back control of your brand universe and work the angles of competitive advantage.  Highly commercial and highly consumable, the 10th Man solution makes it beautifully simple and intuitively intelligent for you to plan, align, optimise your marketing campaigns and resources, then report it out.

As Lenin said, “There are decades where nothing happens, and weeks when decades happen.” The new-normal flux requires an agility and critical thinking to respond effectively and with meaning.  Brand teams need ready access to rich, data-driven perspectives at a moment’s notice - to decide, change direction and move quickly. Everyone’s a data addict and an analytical thinker but traditional solutions now fall short, not to mention brim with bias.

Steal a march. 10th Man knows you need to be able to think, act, move and win, fast; armed with the knowledge - perspectives and aesthetics - that make your brand revered and you famous.

We support brands as diverse as Colgate and Extra, Wendy's and Intel, BASF and WPP, Bailey's and the US Navy.  Find out more: www.10thMan.media

plans.description:
10x has a mission to make banking 10 times better for customers, banks and society. 10x's transformative cloud native core banking platform reduces client costs, accelerates speed to market and re-builds banks 10x smarter - all powered by the 10x SuperCore™. With a modular microservices end-to-end architecture, everything has been designed from first principles to bring forward a new way of banking. 10x delivers transformation through Greenfield, Banking-as-a-Service and Migration projects - to suit clients’ needs today and take them on a journey to build the bank of tomorrow.


10x’s next generation cloud native architecture drastically reduces the total cost of ownership. Operating costs can be reduced as much as 50% so banks are better positioned to pursue new revenue opportunities. Agile product manufacturing capabilities empower clients to accelerate the product lifecycle and respond to market needs. A unified data model provides a single source of truth to lighten the burden and costs of meeting regulatory requirements, such as open banking, and provide world-class customer experiences.


Our product promises

  • Flexible product lifecycles: Launch and change innovative financial products in minutes at low IT and operational cost, enabling banks to instantly respond to market and customer needs.

  • Transformational data: Enable banks to deliver world class customer experiences through APIs, data models and tooling, improving a bank’s operational efficiency through deep business, operational and customer insight.

  • Reduced cost to serve: Simplify a bank’s technology portfolio and seamlessly integrate with third-party providers to streamline operations, reducing the cost to serve for each customer. 

  • Protect customers & brands: Provide a secure, reliable, scalable and regulatory compliant service, that minimises and shares the regulatory burden and cost.


10x is expertly positioned to serve global Tier 1 & 2 banks. The team consists of 500+ experts in digital delivery and is led by a C-suite team blending deep and proven financial services and technology experience. 10x was founded by Antony Jenkins, former Group CEO of Barclays, to address technology challenges that he faced through his 30-year career leading banks.

plans.description:
11Ants is the leading AI-powered retail intelligence platform that empowers retailers with instant access to the insights, information, and intelligence they need to make faster, smarter decisions. Built for everyone—across category, loyalty, analytics teams, and executives—11Ants removes traditional data bottlenecks with a self-serve, natural language interface that makes complex customer behaviour analytics simple and accessible.

By blending loyalty, POS, and multiple data sources, 11Ants reveals exactly how customers shop day to day, week to week and year to year—whether you’re optimizing promotions, refining product ranges, or deepening loyalty program effectiveness. Its AI-driven insights surface actionable opportunities that improve margins, grow market share, and accelerate business outcomes.

Unlike complex BI tools or dashboards, 11Ants delivers operational insights in days, not months, with minimal training required. Teams that once took days to get answers now get them in minutes, freeing analysts to focus on strategy and innovation.

Additionally, 11Ants unlocks a new high-margin revenue stream by securely commercializing valuable data insights with suppliers, turning customer intelligence into profitable partnerships.

If your retail decisions feel like guesswork, 11Ants will light the way with empowering, accessible intelligence designed for today’s fast-moving retail environment. Discover how to put customers at the heart of everything you do and thrive in an evolving market.

Get in touch for a demo and start transforming your retail intelligence journey today.

value.longSummary: 11Ants
value.description:
11Ants is the leading AI-powered retail intelligence platform that empowers retailers with instant access to the insights, information, and intelligence they need to make faster, smarter decisions. Built for everyone—across category, loyalty, analytics teams, and executives—11Ants removes traditional data bottlenecks with a self-serve, natural language interface that makes complex customer behaviour analytics simple and accessible.

By blending loyalty, POS, and multiple data sources, 11Ants reveals exactly how customers shop day to day, week to week and year to year—whether you’re optimizing promotions, refining product ranges, or deepening loyalty program effectiveness. Its AI-driven insights surface actionable opportunities that improve margins, grow market share, and accelerate business outcomes.

Unlike complex BI tools or dashboards, 11Ants delivers operational insights in days, not months, with minimal training required. Teams that once took days to get answers now get them in minutes, freeing analysts to focus on strategy and innovation.

Additionally, 11Ants unlocks a new high-margin revenue stream by securely commercializing valuable data insights with suppliers, turning customer intelligence into profitable partnerships.

If your retail decisions feel like guesswork, 11Ants will light the way with empowering, accessible intelligence designed for today’s fast-moving retail environment. Discover how to put customers at the heart of everything you do and thrive in an evolving market.

Get in touch for a demo and start transforming your retail intelligence journey today.

plans.description:
Retail success relies on people using data to better understand and connect with shoppers. But conventional tools make it difficult and time-consuming to do so.

Here at 11Ants, we understand that using data to connect with customers is the key to winning in retail. But not having the right tools to effectively deal with data can be daunting, time-consuming and lead to poor decisions. Our analytics solution makes life easier, taking away the pain and effort that comes with digging deeper to get answers about what’s really going on.

We’re here to put you in control. Our simple, fast and people-friendly solution allows you to access true insights, action them in meaningful ways and then measure the impact of these decisions. By creating an ally out of your data, we make it easier to do your job and supercharge your effectiveness in driving performance and growth.

With over 4,000 retail stores spread across seven countries utilising our solution, we’ve got proven scale and expertise. Customers are regularly reporting jobs that used to take weeks, now take minutes.

“If we took 11Ants out, it wouldn’t just leave a hole, it would leave this gaping chasm.” Bryce Howard, CEO Farro.

View more customer case studies or request a 45 minute demo at

plans.summary: Our AI experts guide you through building your AI strategy, prioritize business use-cases, build ML models on Azure to test feasibility, and mobilize a roadmap to maximize your AI investments.
plans.description:
Getting started on an Artificial Intelligence (AI) journey, implementing AI responsibly, and ensuring long-term meaningful adoption is challenging for all organizations. Successful AI implementations with Microsoft Azure require educating stakeholders about AI’s potential and required guardrails, developing a cohesive AI strategy with the best practices, assessing organizational data maturity, and establishing a clear path to production with Azure and organization wide adoption at scale.

With over a decade of experience in AI (Artificial Intelligence), and multiple years of being a strong Microsoft partner, we combine our end-to-end capabilities in AI with deep domain knowledge and technology engineering to demystify and implement AI.

Our 12 weeks to AI approach is designed to be adaptable and flexible to meet your unique data maturity and business goals.

In these 12 weeks, utilizing Azure infrastructure and AI services, CGI will be a strong partner by your side to help you:

Strategically think about AI – Collaborate with your organization, scan industry landscapes, and bring in CGI best practices in AI built with Azure Machine Learning to co-generate use cases that could bring the most value for your business.

Prioritize use-cases that make most sense – Evaluate ML use cases against a set of defined criteria such as: technical feasibility, business value generated, fit with selected Azure AI services, fulfillment of your business goals, and competitive advantages achieved amongst other criteria.

Build low-cost AI models to test value of your data – Rapidly prototype a Proof of Value using a low-cost AI model, hosted on Azure AI Infrastructure, trained on a subset of your company data, which helps ascertain the technical feasibility and estimate business value of your top AI use-cases.

Create a roadmap to scale and maximize your AI investment – Based on the Proof of Value, the roadmap contains a clear path to scaling, production, includes best practices on data and AI, and helps you procure internal buy-in for a further investment into AI.

Clear benefits of this engagement:

Start Right from Where You Are

  • Proven Data and AI assessments and Azure best practices to ensure you start right
  • Top use cases mapped against tested criteria that focuses on value and feasibility

Build Responsibly and Re-use

  • Responsible AI baked in, not bolted on
  • Build reusable models focused on minimizing time to market and enabling scale

Test Before You Invest

  • Build AI models to test the top use cases leveraging your actual data
  • CGI’s iterative approach to AI model validation minimizes risk and cost

Expedite Buy-in

  • Confidently provide answers to leadership of expected ROI
  • Build your business case based on validated results and a clear vision to production

Detailed Phases of the 12 Weeks:

In a typical engagement, a CGI squad of AI experts collaborates with your key stakeholders to co-generate Machine Learning solutions using Azure, following our AI best practices for responsible and ethical development.

Strategize:

  • Conducting strategic alignment workshops to explore and understand your current state and initial ambitions with AI
  • Create a list of ML use-cases by adding from each of the steps below:
    • Scanning the competitive landscape
    • Looking for common use cases across product lines and specific use cases for each product line
    • Bringing in logical and impactful use-cases suggestions from our CGI experts
    • Utilizing Azure Cognitive components and accelerators

Prioritize:

  • Evaluating and scoring each ML use case against a detailed framework of evaluation parameters
  • Holding collaborative and iterative evaluation sessions with your Technology Leads, Product or Business Owners and Business Leadership and shortlist top use-cases to target

Build:

  • Working with your technical teams to gather access to a subset of company data
  • Quickly preparing a basic, typically optimal Azure AI infrastructure and environment to run the Azure Machine Learning model while ensuring security and privacy constraints
  • Identify any correlations in data, gaps, or dependencies we need to watch for when scaling this use case

Mobilize:

  • Creating a roadmap to scale the top ML use cases by leveraging CGI’s expertise and best practices
  • Roadmap typically includes recommendations for best resources to ensure optimal performance and output, such as Azure Storage or Databricks for data lakes, Azure Data Factory for defining and scheduling data pipelines, and plan for deploying use case at scale with Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS)
  • Getting alignment on the roadmap by coordinating with leadership team, business owners and technical owners

Pricing Model:

A typical engagement is a Time and Material engagement with established milestones. The price of the offering is set at $1 as a placeholder. Contact CGI for an accurate estimated price.

plans.description:
Struggling to find an ergonomic e-learning training assessment solution that isn’t just a beautiful dashboard but does nothing for you, or doesn’t kill your budget, or isn’t a tedious assessment form? Correct Ergonomix is your answer with real automation and real efficiency!


12-Point Correct Ergonomix's proprietary technology is used to train and assess employees’ workspace set-up. Our interactive image-based training and assessment is designed to educate and address employees’ individual ergonomics needs in the office, at home and hybrid combinations


Making Your Life Easier by Saving Money and Time

  • Roll out ready scalable cloud-based solution. No more tedious work.
  • Seamless implementation & maintenance free options
  • Get 90% - 100% of your time back spent on ergonomic assessments and writing reports
  • Problem: You got 25 employees needing to complete an ergonomic assessment. Which solution works best for you?

A. In-person ergo assessment average cost = $150 hr x 25 employees = $3,750

B. Correct Ergonomix Base Monthly Plan= $6.21 each x 25 employees = $155.47

C. Correct Ergonomix Base Annual Plan= $5.18 each x 300 employees = $1554.50

Reduce Workers’ Comp Claims and OSHA Recordables with Proof of Due Diligence

  • 12-Point Correct Ergonomix Assessment solution is your proof of due diligence for baseline risk assessment, follow-ups, and training
  • OSHA compliant real-time individualized reports
  • Prevent and reduce RSI by providing employees feasible ergonomic recommendation for their workspace set-up

Reach Employees in a Different Way

  • Easy to use on-demand e-learning and assessment solution
  • Ergonomic score helps employees gain insight to their ergonomic well-being and measure progress
  • Employees take ownership of their workspace set-up and ergonomic wellness


Get a one-time 12-Point Correct Ergonomix FREE Trial Now! Risk Free. No Credit Card.

plans.summary: Assess six key domains of readiness toward adopting Generative AI through Copilot.
plans.description:
Copilot has burst on the scene with a series of useful, attractive features that will increase productivity. Copilot trains itself on your data to truly tailor its experience. The process of training is both useful and risky, and it is important to look carefully at your Copilot adoption plans to reduce that risk.

We believe that an organization’s true “readiness” for Copilot spans six key domains, including but not limited to Change Management and Governance.

Cadence Solutions offers a Copilot Readiness Assessment which performs a diagnostic of your environment and of your organization to determine if you are ready for Copilot. The 150+ domain assessment results in a tailored roadmap that you can use to move toward successfully deploying Copilot to your organization.

plans.summary: Rapidly implement an Azure Databricks Data Lakehouse with Fractal's Enterprise Data Lakehouse Migration Accelerator
plans.description:
According to research sponsored by Databricks, 73% of organizations are currently linking their data warehouses to data lakes to enable the use of all their data in BI and machine learning analytics. This approach works for most of these organizations; however, it comes with challenges. For example, leveraging both a Data Lake and Data Warehouse creates the need for a complicated and costly architecture. Such a complex architecture also leads to other underlying challenges, like maintaining the database connections and connections to the BI and data science solutions and services using the data. A Data Lakehouse built on Azure Databricks helps address these challenges by combining the cost-efficient data storage of a Data Lake with the data management and ACID-compliant transaction capabilities of a Data Warehouse. This allows organizations to leverage all of their data in BI visualizations and machine learning analytics from a single source of truth with a simplified architecture that helps reduce costs and the risk of errors.

Enterprise Data Lakehouse Accelerator

The Enterprise Data Lakehouse Accelerator offer from Fractal Analytics is designed to help organizations stand up and migrate data to a simple, open Data Lakehouse built on Azure Databricks in 12 weeks. During this engagement, Fractal will leverage predefined templates, migration patterns, and consulting practices to:
  • Understand client challenges and desired outcomes
  • Build a migration roadmap designed to achieve the client's end goals
  • Make infrastructure and architecture recommendations
  • Implement and scale the Data Lakehouse
  • Migrate data to the Data Lakehouse
  • Train client to manage the Data Lakehouse and hand over documentation

Deliverables and timelines

Azure Databricks Data Lakehouse implementations typically follow the timeline below: Weeks 1-2:
  • Understand key requirements and documentation
  • Key stakeholder and SME interviews
  • Review customer DataOps environment
Week 3-10:
  • Provision cloud environment (including Azure Databricks)
  • Deploy DataOps tools and services
  • Review maturity gaps and validate designs
  • Create a pilot framework based on an existing model
  • Update and finalize recommendations
Week 11-12:
  • Finalize documentation
  • Test framework and present results
  • Review progress and move to production
At the end of the 12-week period, the client should expect to receive a fully functional Data Lakehouse operating on Azure Databricks. Sample Deployment We have a GitHub repository for this solution where you can go through step by step to deploy the resources. Click here to access the GitHub repository.

plans.summary: Unify, Govern, and Empower Your Data Ecosystem with Visionet's 12-Week Data Fabric Implementation, Powered by Azure.
plans.description:
Visionet’s 12-Week Data Fabric Implementation on Azure harnesses Microsoft Fabric’s advanced data technologies to create a unified ecosystem. Utilizing the latest tools and technologies, our service streamlines data integration, governance, and analytics, enabling real-time insights, better decision-making, and enhanced data value, all within a secure, compliant Azure environment.

Our tailored service, built on a Modern Medallion Architecture using Microsoft Fabric, eliminates data silos and evolves with your data and analytics needs. It leverages Microsoft’s leading Data Fabric tools, including Data Factory for integration, Microsoft Purview for governance, Power BI for analytics, and OneLake for unified storage, enabling teams with real-time insights across all data sets.

Our 12-week Data Fabric Implementation roadmap is divided into 4 phases:

• Discovery (2 to 3 weeks) • Design & Architect (2 to 3 weeks) • Build (3 to 4 weeks) • Test & Review (1 to 2 weeks)

In the Discovery Phase, we collaborate with stakeholders in your organization to map out the data challenges, goals, and priorities, while evaluating data maturity, skillsets and readiness to support a successful Microsoft Fabric implementation.

In the Design & Architect Phase, we define specific use cases and design a future-state architecture using Microsoft Fabric tools, including OneLake for unified data storage, Data Factory for orchestration, and Power BI for analytics and visualization. We also prepare deployment strategies to ensure smooth integration.

During the Build Phase, we implement a Modern Medallion Architecture, configuring optimized data pipelines with Data Factory, and transforming data to support analytics in Power BI. We build custom models in Lakehouse to support self-service BI and democratize access to analytics across teams.

Finally in the Test & Review Phase, we monitor and validate the Microsoft Data Fabric setup for optimal performance and efficiency. We also conduct rigorous testing and provide hands-on knowledge transfer, helping you fully leverage Microsoft Fabric’s capabilities.

Our clients have appreciated the benefits below through our Microsoft Fabric Implementation: · 20-25% reduction in data management costs · 15-20% improvement in data integration efficiency · 20-25% increase in data accessibility and usability · 10-15% enhancement in data quality and consistency · 15-20% faster deployment of data solutions

Our Data Fabric implementation streamlines data, addresses integration challenges, and prepares your organization for data-driven success.

Conclusion:

Fuel innovation and resilience with a tailored Data Fabric Implementation powered by Azure, designed to meet your evolving data needs. Learn more about Visionet’s Data Fabric Implementation, leveraging Microsoft’s capabilities here: https://www.visionet.com/service/microsoft-data-fabric

As you embark on your data transformation journey, please be aware that timelines and costs will vary based on the unique scope and requirements of your project.

plans.summary: Review the technical and governance status of your SharePoint environment, creating a roadmap for future improvements.
plans.description:
If you are using Teams or Microsoft 365 in any capacity, it’s likely that you have content in your SharePoint environment. Regardless of if you are actively using SharePoint or not, it’s important to understand what is in your SharePoint environment and how it is managed.

Our SharePoint Health Check is a bite-sized analysis of your SharePoint environment, covering 130+ dimensions across governance, lifecycle management, change management, and administration (among others). The analysis process leverages a combination of automated reports and workshops with your people to build a wholesome picture of your SharePoint usage.

From this analysis, we will build you a tailored roadmap and set of recommendations that you can follow to better govern your SharePoint environment.

plans.displayName: 12-wk Proof of Concept: Raptor Document Warehouse
plans.summary: Discover the fully integrated Document Management solution. Raptor Document Warehouse acts as one single source of truth - consolidating all documents based on meta-data of each document or file.
plans.description:
About Raptor Document Warehouse

Raptor Document Warehouse is an Intelligent Document Management solution that consolidates information across business applications such as PLM, ERP, CRM or any other application and brings structure to that information. It can easily support processes that are not confined to a single business application. It manages complex relations between different entities in your organization and enables you to search through different dimensions and locations, all the while obeying correct, but dynamic context based security.

Raptor Document Warehouse is developed by 9altitudes

Proof of Concept & Trial Period

  • Proof Of Concept implementation - 4 weeks
  • Trial period - 6 weeks 
  • Decision Time 
  • Extend & Go-live

Deliverables

  • Out-of-the-Box Solution integrated with Dynamics 365
  • SaaS onboarding & Ready To Benefit Setup 
  • Key-user training & Demo

About 9altitudes - 2021 Inner Circle Award

A European consulting group that consolidates local organizations in Belgium (Ad Ultima Group, Admiral Dynamics), The Netherlands (Pylades, Cayentis), France (Ad Ultima France), Denmark (Optimate, Bredana Solutions) and Slovenia (Innito).

The group has in-depth knowledge of ERP, IoT, PLM CRM, DMS and Business Analytics.

plans.description:
🤖 Automatically transcribe and summarize key points and action items from your Microsoft Teams meetings.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Trusted by 50,000+ organizations

Based on BlueSky usage data

Features

😃 Integrates directly into your Teams client

📝 Automatic high quality AI transcriptions

🙋‍♀️ 24 hour support team is here to help

How does it work?

1. 123 Notetaker is added to the Apps section of your Teams client. Simply click Apps and then 123 Notetaker in any Teams Meeting

2. Once 123 Notetaker App is opened, the notetaker will automatically join your meeting. Make sure to allow Notetaker in from the waiting lobby. Notetaker may take up to a minute to join the meeting and begin transcribing.

3. Optionally share 123 Notetaker with your Teams participants. Participants can click the 123 Notetaker button at the top of their meeting.

123 Notetaker has a free plan, with upgraded plans available.

123 Notetaker uses AI to transcribe and create meeting notes. AI can make mistakes. Report inappropriate content. AI meeting Notes are emailed after the meeting ends and can accessed anytime in your BlueSky Account. Meeting transcriptions appear in real-time in the Teams App Sidebar.

Sign Up | Get Started | Contact | Help

Try it free today!

plans.description:
⏱ Customizable Timers, Countdowns, Clocks, Agendas & Stopwatches easily shared directly in your Microsoft Teams meetings & webinars.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Trusted by 50,000+ organizations

Based on BlueSky usage data

Simple Timers: Start a simple timer to help manage a presentation, pitch, or discussion. Count down or count up to any specified time. Colors automatically change as the timer gets closer to zero to help keep the speaker on track.

Agenda Timers: Display an entire meeting agenda with timed segments for each portion of the meeting.

Clocks: Display the current time so you so you can stay on track while presenting.

Features

😃 Integrates directly into your Teams client

🔊 Audio alerts keep your meetings on track

👀 Multiple display options to keep the timer visible in Teams

🎨 Timer customization to fit your unique meeting needs

🔄 Cycle timers automatically

😌 Saved templates for easy re-use

🤝 Easily grant timer access to a designated Timekeeper

🔒 Built securely. Timer does not transmit or save meeting data

🙋‍♀️ 24 hour support team is here to help

How does it work?

1. 123 Timer is added to the Apps section of your Teams client. Simply click Apps and then 123 Timer in any Teams Meeting.

2. Once 123 Timer is opened, simply click to customize your timer. Select between simple timers, agendas, and clocks. Customize the display, set audio alerts, and more.

3. Optionally share the Timer display with your Teams participants. Click Share Timer Display to make Timer visible to all participants.

Sign Up | Get Started | Contact | Help

Try it free today!

Simple Timers: Start a simple timer to help manage a presentation, pitch, or discussion. Count down or count up to any specified time. Colors automatically change as the timer gets closer to zero to help keep the speaker on track.

Agenda Timers: Display an entire meeting agenda with timed segments for each portion of the meeting.

Clocks: Display the current time so you so you can stay on track while presenting.

Features

😃 Integrates directly into your Teams client

🔊 Audio alerts keep your meetings on track

👀 Multiple display options to keep the timer visible in Teams

🎨 Timer customization to fit your unique meeting needs

🔄 Cycle timers automatically

😌 Saved templates for easy re-use

🤝 Easily grant timer access to a designated Timekeeper

🔒 Built securely. Timer does not transmit or save meeting data

🙋‍♀️ 24 hour support team is here to help

How does it work?

1. 123 Timer is added to the Apps section of your Teams client. Simply click Apps and then 123 Timer in any Teams Meeting.

2. Once 123 Timer is opened, simply click to customize your timer. Select between simple timers, agendas, and clocks. Customize the display, set audio alerts, and more.

3. Optionally share the Timer display with your Teams participants. Click Share Timer Display to make Timer visible to all participants.

Sign Up | Get Started | Contact | Help

Try it free today!

plans.description:
With our software, we provide large-scale organisations and education institutions visual insight in the way buildings are being used by their occupants and how education is being consumed by students. 
This enables institutions to increase their employees' and student's potential while reducing costs up to 30%. In case of education, students can be coached better and achieve better study results. 
The pilots we offer are designed to gather viable process information needed to obtain insight and overcome generic challenges so that implementation (intern or extern) will be successful.

What we do:
- Analyze and visualize utilization and occupancy rate of buildings and spaces
- Insight in the consumption of education/spaces
- Real-time and historical analyzes based on presence on WiFi network and/or building sensors
- Reliable (management) information with trends
- Optimize space use
- Reduction in housing energy and service costs up to 30%
- Increase the potential of students/employees through insight in consumed education/spaces

What we offer:
- Space management dashboards
- Campus analytics dashboards
- Multiple graphs and widgets to conclude data 
- Same data, multiple options
- In the cloud and on-premise
- Low implementation costs and fast
- Implementable on the current WiFI infrastructure
- 98% accurate
- Completely anonymous data
- Insight into groups and educational characteristics
- Flexible solutions

plans.summary: BYOL deployment of 12Port PAM on Azure. Agentless privileged access management with credential vault, session brokering, and automated rotation.
plans.description:
This plan deploys the 12Port PAM virtual appliance into your Azure subscription using your existing 12Port license. No software charges are applied through Azure; you only pay for the underlying VM compute and storage resources.

What You Get

A fully functional 12Port PAM instance with secure credential vault, session brokering for SSH and RDP, automated credential rotation, and AI-driven session intelligence. The appliance connects to your on-premises and cloud infrastructure without installing agents on target systems.

Requirements

A valid 12Port license is required. Contact 12port.com for licensing details, trial access, or to speak with our team.

Deployment

After deploying the VM, access the 12Port web console to complete initial setup. The appliance is typically operational within minutes. Supports integration with Active Directory, LDAP, and MFA providers.

value.longSummary: 12Port PAM is an agentless privileged access management solution that helps organizations meet compliance requirements (ISO 27001, PCI DSS, NIST, SOC 2) by securing credentials, brokering sessions without exposing passwords, and automating credential rotation. Deploy in minutes, not months.
value.summary: Agentless privileged access management: secure credentials, broker sessions, and automate rotation. Deploy in minutes.
value.description:
Privileged Access Secured in Minutes, Not Months

If your organization needs to implement privileged access management for ISO 27001, PCI DSS, NIST, SOC 2, or other compliance frameworks, 12Port PAM delivers a production-ready solution that deploys on Azure in minutes. No agents to install on endpoints, no complex infrastructure to maintain, no months-long implementation projects.

Who Benefits

12Port PAM is built for CISOs and security leaders who need to close compliance gaps around privileged access, and for the IT administrators and partners who evaluate and implement the solution. Whether you manage a single environment or operate as an MSP serving multiple clients, 12Port's native multi-tenancy and distributed architecture scale to meet your needs.

What 12Port PAM Does

Secure Vault: Encrypted storage for privileged accounts, credentials, API keys, certificates, and secrets. Role-based access control with multi-level approvals, split knowledge, and dual control. Discover assets automatically from Active Directory, AWS, VMware, and Entra ID. Full audit trail with SIEM integration.

Access Broker: Broker secure sessions via RDP, SSH, VNC, Telnet, Kubernetes, PowerShell, and HTTP(s) without ever disclosing credentials to users. Works through a standard web browser or native desktop and mobile clients. Full session recording, playback, and AI-powered session intelligence that can detect threats and terminate active sessions in real time.

Account Management: Agentless password and key rotation and reconciliation across Windows, Linux, Unix, network devices, databases (Oracle, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Informix), and Entra ID. Scheduled or event-driven triggers eliminate manual credential management.

AI-Driven Capabilities: Built-in AI for session intelligence, anomaly detection, classification, adaptive MFA, and network segmentation analysis. Includes an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for AI agent integration, making 12Port the first PAM platform to support secure, policy-controlled access for AI workloads.

Why 12Port PAM

Agentless: No agents on endpoints for access brokering or credential rotation, reducing deployment complexity and maintenance overhead.

Native Clients: Full desktop and mobile client support in addition to the web portal. No RDS infrastructure required.

Distributed Architecture: Reach isolated networks across cloud, datacenter, and on-premises environments without changing perimeter firewall rules.

Fast Deployment: Deploy on Azure and be operational in minutes, not months.

Open Design: Customizable script library and full REST API for integration with your existing tools and workflows.

Get Started

Deploy 12Port PAM on Azure today. Request a demo or start a free trial at www.12port.com.

plans.summary: Monthly subscription price for 13-week cash outlook, with annual renewal included.

• Monthly subscription price for 13-week cash outlook, with annual renewal included. 
  • You get updates. 
  • Take advantage of the fall discount!

value.longSummary: 13-Week Cash Outlook empowers you to extend your capabilities by fully activating data from Microsoft Dynamics AX 2012 and Microsft Dynamics 365 Finance. Streamline planning, forecasting and budgeting while amplifying insights for informed decision making.
value.summary: Realize the full value from your ERP data with a proven and secure Azure based solution in a day.
value.description:
What if you could rapidly state your 13-week cash flow horizon, without the hours-long wait for data to refresh, or the burden of pulling the various reports from the ERP?  What if you could do so in Microsoft Excel, where your custom calculations and supporting data already reside, and where you control the model? 

 

By analysts, for analysts

13-Week Cash Outlook was written for you: we worked with actual analysts, who are on the hook for regulatory reporting at high-volume, publicly traded companies.  In those bullpens, the FP&A teams get the data right or the company cannot steer.  We combined our best data solutions over 10 years, then vetted the data and approach against those analysts. 

 

Highlights 

  • Real-time visibility into critical liquidity
  • Spend-modeling to manage peaks and troughs
  • Flexible scenario-generation for low/base/high cases
  • Base Income Statement, Balance Sheet, AP/AR analysis, and cash outlook included
  • No more black-box--you determine the final model, adding data sources as needed
  • Turn around audit & ad hoc requests on AP, AR, and GL
  • Reallocate development time to process improvement not reporting
  • Build your full model within 2-4 days (average time from other teams


Analysts, Directors, and Executives choose this proven and secure Azure based solution in order to realize the full value from their ERP data. 


Our promise: clean data, the first time, guaranteed, or we will fix it at no additional charge.

plans.description:
Communication, alignment, and recognition are necessary for an engaged culture—but remote teams need more. 15Five is more! To perform at their peak, remote teams need to be managed differently. Maintaining the levels of collaboration and productivity you're used to in an office requires the right solution. 15Five can help.

In this application, 15Five users can view and show their teammates' appreciation even more effectively with High Fives.

- Give high fives to individuals or groups by @mentioning them.

- View all the high fives in your organization on the dashboard feed.

This is a modified version of our full High Fives experience. At this time, users will not be able to “like” High Fives or comment on High Fives.

While extremely simple, there is an art and science to giving meaningful High Fives. Here are our best practices for giving your colleagues meaningful recognition.

Focus on the small things

It isn't always the big wins or gestures that merit appreciation. Look around, and you'll likely notice dozens of small moments worth celebrating. It could be someone's demeanor or attention to detail.

Example: @Maria, I admire how you take such an interest in everyone's well-being.

Be Specific

General high fives are less meaningful for the recipient. What specifically did your co-worker do that was so awesome? People want to know what they did that got your attention.

Example: @Courtney excellent job writing that research-backed blog post - the research elements you included were extremely relevant to the feature we highlighted.

Include the Impact

Sharing the impact your co-worker had on you makes recognition twice as meaningful. Don't only thank them for what they did, also share the impact it had on you personally or professionally!

Example: @Shane you did a great job speaking about 15Five at the conference this weekend. You articulated our "why" in an inspiring manner, which left prospects interested in learning more about our product!

Remember, recognition should be both timely and frequent!

You will need an account with 15Five to use this app. Contact us at support@15five.com

value.displayName: 180ops – revenue intelligence SaaS for B2B enterprises
value.longSummary: 180ops – Know what to sell, to whom, when, and why
value.description:
180ops is an AI-powered revenue intelligence SaaS designed to help large and mid-cap B2B enterprises maximize their revenue and profitability. By answering four critical questions—what to sell, to whom, when, and why—180ops transforms traditional CRM systems into proactive tools that guide sales and customer success teams. It provides actionable insights to identify up- and cross-sell opportunities, predict customer readiness, and mitigate risks.

Ideal for enterprises seeking to optimize their sales performance and operational execution, 180ops delivers unparalleled analytics on sales pipelines, customer behavior, and offering performance. It combines internal data sources like billing, ERP, CRM, and marketing automation with external datasets and macroeconomic forecasts to create a comprehensive, strategic view of market dynamics.

180ops addresses the common challenges of biased CRM data and reactive customer management by offering a proactive, AI-driven approach. Its focus on billing data ensures accuracy and reliability, making it the ultimate 'One Source of Truth' for revenue operations. With 180ops, businesses can bridge the gap between strategy and execution, empowering stakeholders across all levels to make informed decisions and drive growth.


C-LEVEL FEEDBACK FOR 180OPS

1.Changed their perception of what analytics and datadriven management should look like
2.Revealed tens of millions in up- and cross-sales opportunities in their current customers. Also tens of millions in growth opportunity in existing customers that were NOT named for any salesperson
3.How different strategies their salespeople have in terms of managing customers and how that impacts sales productivity and customer lifetime value.
4.How pareto principle (80/20 rule) plays in their customer segments, offerings, sales, declining and lost customers…

5.How significant this fundamental knowledge is in order to build a functioning apparatus on top of it

plans.displayName: 1:1 Fabric in a Day Workshop - Half or 1 Day Workshop
plans.summary: Accelerate your team's adoption of Fabric with a custom one day or half day hands-on workshop.
plans.description:
Taking your data analytics skills to the next level with Microsoft Fabric can be a daunting task. Smartbridge and Microsoft are excited to provide Power BI users with the training your team needs to become Fabric Analysts with a customized half or full day Fabric-in-a-Day Workshop.

This is an ideal opportunity for your Power BI-enabled staff to get hands on experience and understand the value of Microsoft Fabric ultimately progressing your organization’s Fabric adoption and maturity. The goal of this intermediate-level informational session is to help you understand how to consolidate your data into a single source of truth where you can analyze your data and generate meaningful insights. As a solution partner, Smartbridge brings over 20 years of expertise and experience to contribute to your training.

Microsoft Fabric is an end-to-end analytics platform that brings together all the data and analytics tools that organizations need to go from the data lake to the business user. Fabric integrates technologies like Azure Data Factory, Azure Synapse Analytics, and Power BI into a single unified product, empowering data and business professionals alike to unlock the potential of their data and lay the foundation for the era of AI.

Accelerate time to value by enabling your Data Analysts to leverage Microsoft Fabric to break down data silos and unify disparate sources of data to create rich, powerful Power BI dashboards and reports – enabling you to scale analytics while reducing costs and optimizing existing data management in a governed and secure way.

While your workshop is fully customizable, a few likely things your team will learn include:

  • Identify when your organization or line of business can benefit from using Microsoft Fabric for specific business scenarios.
  • Leverage the full power of Microsoft Fabric to streamline and enhance productivity with an integrated analytics platform.
  • Unify and transform data from across various data sources through Shortcuts, Dataflows Gen 2 and Pipelines.
  • Build rich and powerful reports to discover meaningful insights and make impactful business decisions with Power BI.

Why have Smartbridge train your team on Fabric?

  • Smartbridge is a Data & AI partner, with the credentials and portfolio of experience to focus on the most impactful elements of Fabric and Power BI.
  • We have been delivering “Workshops in a Day”, hosted by Microsoft, for two years. Our trainers have delivered Microsoft materials time and again, consistently achieving "very satisfied" ratings in customer satisfaction surveys.
  • For optimal efficiency, if you have five or more employees requiring Fabric training, it's advisable to standardize their education to ensure uniform proficiency levels and consistent work quality.
  • Microsoft provides content for a full day workshop. However, Smartbridge is able to condense workshops into half days, or two separate sessions and customize the training to specific needs for your line of business or industry.
  • Smartbridge will leave behind materials and training resources, along with recommendations on how to proceed with your Fabric maturity. Recording the workshop is also a possibility.
  • If you’re in Houston, Austin or Dallas Texas, we can offer an in-person workshop with little to no travel expense. For other US locations, talk to us about in-person options.

When you reach out via the Contact Me form, we will coordinate a call to discuss your Fabric training workshop needs. We will be able to provide pricing details and match you with the best training consultant(s).

Need Power BI Training? Not yet ready for Fabric? We offer Power BI assessments, services and training. See our other listings or contact us for more details.

About Smartbridge

Smartbridge is a Microsoft Digital & App Innovation, and Data & AI Solutions Partner, and a 20-year-old IT consultancy focusing on simplifying business transformation. We partner alongside you in your journey towards building a modernized, digital ecosystem.

Smartbridge provides the strategy, implementation, and support to bring your digital agenda to reality. With digital innovation and analytics, establish a sharper understanding of your customer’s needs. Automation and modernization services propel you to your goals of operating as a mature digital ecosystem.

The Smartbridge culture is founded on an understanding of customer challenges, coupled with an empathetic approach. It is endorsed with a track record of providing exceptional experiences driven by our thought leadership.

FAIADoffer

This is an ideal opportunity for your Power BI-enabled staff to get hands on experience and understand the value of Microsoft Fabric ultimately progressing your organization’s Fabric adoption and maturity. The goal of this intermediate-level informational session is to help you understand how to consolidate your data into a single source of truth where you can analyze your data and generate meaningful insights. As a solution partner, Smartbridge brings over 20 years of expertise and experience to contribute to your training.

Microsoft Fabric is an end-to-end analytics platform that brings together all the data and analytics tools that organizations need to go from the data lake to the business user. Fabric integrates technologies like Azure Data Factory, Azure Synapse Analytics, and Power BI into a single unified product, empowering data and business professionals alike to unlock the potential of their data and lay the foundation for the era of AI.

Accelerate time to value by enabling your Data Analysts to leverage Microsoft Fabric to break down data silos and unify disparate sources of data to create rich, powerful Power BI dashboards and reports – enabling you to scale analytics while reducing costs and optimizing existing data management in a governed and secure way.

While your workshop is fully customizable, a few likely things your team will learn include:

  • Identify when your organization or line of business can benefit from using Microsoft Fabric for specific business scenarios.
  • Leverage the full power of Microsoft Fabric to streamline and enhance productivity with an integrated analytics platform.
  • Unify and transform data from across various data sources through Shortcuts, Dataflows Gen 2 and Pipelines.
  • Build rich and powerful reports to discover meaningful insights and make impactful business decisions with Power BI.

Why have Smartbridge train your team on Fabric?

  • Smartbridge is a Data & AI partner, with the credentials and portfolio of experience to focus on the most impactful elements of Fabric and Power BI.
  • We have been delivering “Workshops in a Day”, hosted by Microsoft, for two years. Our trainers have delivered Microsoft materials time and again, consistently achieving "very satisfied" ratings in customer satisfaction surveys.
  • For optimal efficiency, if you have five or more employees requiring Fabric training, it's advisable to standardize their education to ensure uniform proficiency levels and consistent work quality.
  • Microsoft provides content for a full day workshop. However, Smartbridge is able to condense workshops into half days, or two separate sessions and customize the training to specific needs for your line of business or industry.
  • Smartbridge will leave behind materials and training resources, along with recommendations on how to proceed with your Fabric maturity. Recording the workshop is also a possibility.
  • If you’re in Houston, Austin or Dallas Texas, we can offer an in-person workshop with little to no travel expense. For other US locations, talk to us about in-person options.

When you reach out via the Contact Me form, we will coordinate a call to discuss your Fabric training workshop needs. We will be able to provide pricing details and match you with the best training consultant(s).

Need Power BI Training? Not yet ready for Fabric? We offer Power BI assessments, services and training. See our other listings or contact us for more details.

About Smartbridge

Smartbridge is a Microsoft Digital & App Innovation, and Data & AI Solutions Partner, and a 20-year-old IT consultancy focusing on simplifying business transformation. We partner alongside you in your journey towards building a modernized, digital ecosystem.

Smartbridge provides the strategy, implementation, and support to bring your digital agenda to reality. With digital innovation and analytics, establish a sharper understanding of your customer’s needs. Automation and modernization services propel you to your goals of operating as a mature digital ecosystem.

The Smartbridge culture is founded on an understanding of customer challenges, coupled with an empathetic approach. It is endorsed with a track record of providing exceptional experiences driven by our thought leadership.

FAIADoffer

value.displayName: 1Degree Referral Intake for Home Health and Hospice
value.longSummary: Referrals Should Move as Fast as Care.
value.description:
1° – Referral Intake automates the entire intake lifecycle—capturing, processing, and operationalizing referrals with speed and consistency. With intelligent automation and seamless EHR integration, teams reduce delays, minimize manual work, and ensure every referral moves forward without disruption.

Every referral is an opportunity—but only if it moves through intake quickly and accurately. 1° – Referral Intake captures referrals from multiple sources, extracts critical data, and operationalizes them directly within your EHR.

Referrals no longer sit in fax queues or wait across multiple portals for manual action. Instead, they flow into structured workflows that support faster decisions and better coordination across intake, clinical, and operations teams. This enables agencies to respond sooner, reduce non-admits, and improve access to care.

Designed for healthcare operations, the platform standardizes referral handling while providing real-time visibility into status, workload, and performance. Intelligent data extraction and validation assist staff throughout the process while keeping human review and decision-making in control.

plans.description:
1Huddle for Teams

Train your team with the game platform that is trusted by leading companies from across the globe.

1Huddle is a game based training platform that lets companies convert boring, outdated training material into competitive games for their entire team. With clients seeing massive increases in sales performance after gameplay, 1Huddle is customized to each organization, flexible to any industry, and competitive for a generation that knows the game has changed.

With our Microsoft Teams integration, you can receive daily leaderboard updates and coaching recommendations right within Teams.

  • Instantly receive daily leaderboard updates of top performers and low performers.
  • Receive daily coaching insights and recommendations
Level up your team with 1Huddle for Teams.

Note that a 1Huddle account is required.

Sign up for free at https://1huddle.co

plans.summary: 1ID Platform for EDU provides secure access to multiple custom applications and services offered by the customer organization via a variety of Microsoft 365 and Microsoft Azure services.
plans.description:
WHAT ARE WE DELIVERING?

Telelink Business Services has built an end-to-end solution for remote learning that incorporates multiple systems and various custom applications into one integrated platform for managing user identity and access. This single platform that can carry out online learning, automate the user lifecycle and provide exchange of learning content. Faculty workers and students across K-12 Education in Bulgaria have access to Microsoft 365 licenses. 1ID Platform is harnessing the Azure Active Directory services to streamline their access to EDU focused applications through a single secure entry point. User identity is crucial for performing the remote learning process organized predominantly in Microsoft Teams. Each user is added to a team and granted with specific extension attributes upon creation. Users are accessing classes based on their membership in the respective Microsoft Teams groups. Faculty workers act as team owners and control the learning process - invite, remove, grant rights to users. OneDrive is used to back up user directories like Desktop, Documents, Pictures, store and share information between team members. All mentioned above contribute to the adoption of Microsoft 365 across K-12 Education in Bulgaria. 1ID platform support Microsoft 365 user activation and education digitalization process.
    Benefits:
    • centrally controlled access to all digital educational platforms and services
    • automatic user creation and personal data protection
    • complete student profile lifecycle management (from user creation to graduation)
    • modern solution architecture based on open-source software and containers
    • solution powered by Microsoft technology - Microsoft 365, Azure Active Directory, Azure Active Directory B2C, Azure Kubernetes Service, Azure App Service, Azure Functions, Azure Table storage, Azure Service Bus.

    WHO IS THAT FOR?

    1ID Platform designed by Telelink Business Services constitutes a modern, completely safe digital educational environment based on cloud technologies that kindergartens, schools, and universities can use for their educational needs.

HOW DO WE DO IT?

Assess phase:
  • provide professional consulting and software governance services
  • develop a cloud adoption roadmap and plan the transition to Microsoft 365

Design phase:
  • create an end-to-end software management self-service platform
  • design and develop a single-entry point site managing the student profile lifecycle

Implementation phase:
  • integration of multiple learning and teaching systems with Microsoft Teams
  • provide management and support services related to the adoption of a remote learning environment

Estimate price and delivery period could be adjusted, based on customer needs, profile complexity, number of users, etc.

BlockID Workforce uses real biometrics backed by verified identity to close the gaps in authentication and to give organizations a level of trust and convenience in digital interactions that transforms their business. Most logins assume identity, leaving IT and security teams hoping they have granted access to the legitimate user. BlockID Workforce proves identity and provides flexibility to tailor the levels of identity assurance for different workers or groups of users. plans.description:
1MRobotics was founded in 2021 to create cutting-edge capabilities to bring lights-out automation to more industries and sectors. Our hyperlocal automated and off-the-shelf container-sized solution is easily deployed anywhere, while reducing headcount to the bare minimum, if not zero, and ensuring operational efficiencies at any scale!

1MRobotics develops off-the-shelf automated solutions for fulfillment and retail operations, that can be deployed in less than a day and operated anywhere. Our systems support full omnichannel capabilities (DTC/B2B delivery, Click & Collect, Point of Sale, and returns).

Our target sectors/industries are:

  • Grocery/Convenience Retail
  • Consumer Electronics Retail and Apple Resellers
  • Industrial (assembly lines, DIY, service operations)

1MRobotics develops off-the-shelf automated solutions for fulfillment and retail operations, that can be deployed in less than a day and operated anywhere. Our systems support full omnichannel capabilities (DTC/B2B delivery, Click & Collect, Point of Sale, and returns).

Our target sectors/industries are:

  • Grocery/Convenience Retail
  • Consumer Electronics Retail and Apple Resellers
  • Industrial (assembly lines, DIY, service operations)

value.longSummary: 1Me Business - Digital Business Cards & Contact Management
value.description:
1Me is a comprehensive solution for creating and managing digital business cards, designed to help businesses of all sizes make a powerful first impression, reduce their carbon footprint, and streamline contact management.
With our centralized dashboard, you can easily create and distribute digital business cards for your entire team, ensuring brand consistency and providing a modern, eco-friendly alternative to traditional paper cards. Track engagement with detailed analytics, integrate with your existing CRM and marketing automation tools, and leverage our smart features to enhance your networking efforts.

Key features include:

  • Centralized Management: Efficiently control employee access, update card templates, and manage your team's digital networking presence from a single dashboard.

  • Branded Digital Cards: Maintain a unified brand identity with customizable templates that reflect your company's unique brand.

  • Engagement Tracking: Gain data-driven insights into card shares, views, and interactions to measure the effectiveness of your networking activities.

  • Seamless Sharing: Share digital business cards effortlessly via QR codes, NFC smart cards, and email signatures.

  • Automation & Integration: Streamline your HR and business workflows by integrating with tools like Microsoft Power Automate.

  • Eco-Friendly Solution: Reduce your carbon footprint by eliminating the need for traditional paper business cards.

value.longSummary: Supercharge your meetings with 1Page summary & conversation starters, minutes before every meeting!
value.description:
Supercharge your meetings with 1Page summaries and conversation starters


Are you ready to take your sales performance to stellar heights? Meet 1Page, your new secret weapon in winning deals and wowing clients. Trusted by over 8500+ sales professionals worldwide, 1Page is not just a tool; it’s what you have been waiting for to prepare for your sales meetings consistently.

Why 1Page? Let’s Break It Down:

Empowered Sales Meetings:


Informed & Ready: Say goodbye to last-minute hustles. With 1Page, you step into every meeting armed with all the knowledge you need.
Confidence in Every Call: Whether it’s your first pitch or you’re reconnecting with a long-time client, 1Page ensures you’re always on your A-game.
Consistency Across the Board: Level the playing field. Every member of your team, from rookies to veterans, has the same access to crucial insights, ensuring a unified and compelling brand message.

All-in-One Information Hub:


Data at Your Fingertips: 35+ Integrated apps, relevant past data, personal insights – it’s all here, ready when you are.
Tailored Conversations: Know who you’re talking to and what matters to them. Make every interaction personal and impactful. Get conversation starters and personality hints.
Say it Right: Nail every pitch with conversation starters. Know what to highlight and what to avoid for a flawless delivery.

Skyrocket Your Productivity & Earnings:


More Time, More Selling: Shrink your prep time and amplify your selling time. Be the top performer you’re meant to be.
Engage More, Win More: With more time on your hands, you can meet more prospects, opening doors to new opportunities.
Thriving Revenue: When you hit and exceed those quotas, the whole organization rejoices. Be the growth driver your company celebrates!

Why 1Page?:


Elevate Your Efficiency: Stop juggling tabs and scattered data. With 1Page, everything you need is in one seamless view.

Join the Elite: Be a part of the community that’s setting new standards in sales excellence.

See the Results: Backed by strategic partnerships and vetted by industry leaders, 1Page is proven to deliver.

Quick Wins: Feel the impact and see tangible results within just two weeks of using 1Page.

How it works?


  • You can sign up with your organization's email.
  • Connect your calendars.
  • Five minutes before every meeting, get an alert to prepare.
  • Get conversation starters, work, education, etc., about the person you meet
  • Connect 35+ applications to get more insights, like Email, CRM, Storage, and Support.
  • Ask Microsoft 365 Copilot about people, companies, or meetings. Start by saying, '1Page, tell me about my meetings with Adobe'

Ready to Experience the 1Page Advantage?:


If you want to rev up your sales engine and achieve unprecedented success, 1Page is your answer. Join the thousands of sales professionals who are already experiencing the magic of efficient preparation, personalized interactions, and unparalleled performance.

Don’t just take our word for it – give 1Page a whirl and see the difference for yourself. Here’s to crushing those targets and celebrating big wins.

Welcome to the future of sales, Welcome to 1Page!

🚀 #TransformSales #1PageAdvantage #SalesSuperstar #Try1PageToday #SayNoToPrepStress

value.description:
Supercharge your meetings with 1Page summaries and conversation starters

Transform your sales process with 1Page, the all-in-one productivity tool designed to empower sales professionals within Microsoft Teams. Access real-time insights, consolidate key data, and connect authentically with prospects and customers. Say goodbye to information overload and hello to streamlined sales success.

Key Features

Real-Time Insights: Instantly access relevant information about prospects and customers during meetings, making every interaction count.

Seamless Integration: 1Page seamlessly integrates with Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and Microsoft 365, bringing valuable insights right where you need them.

One-Page Summaries: Get a concise one-page summary with insights from various applications, saving you research time and boosting productivity.

Personalized Engagement: Tailor your approach based on real-time data, building stronger relationships and driving sales.

Personalized Engagement: Ask Copilot about people, companies, or meetings. Start by saying, '1Page, tell me about my meetings with Adobe'

Why Choose 1Page?

Boost Efficiency: Save time and focus on building relationships by having all the insights you need in one place.

Trusted by Sales Leaders: Join a growing community of sales professionals who trust 1Page for data-driven decision-making.

Proven Success: Backed by strategic partnerships and esteemed investors, 1Page has a track record of delivering results.

Rapid ROI: Experience significant returns within just two weeks of using 1Page.

Subscription Plans

Choose from flexible subscription plans to suit your needs, starting at just $20/month. Experience the value of streamlined insights and increased productivity with a 7-day free trial.

Ready to Elevate Your Sales?

Join the growing community of sales professionals benefiting from 1Page's transformative impact. Embrace the 'why' behind our mission and unlock your sales potential today.

Start Your 7-Day Trial Now!

How to get started with 1Page?

· As an individual, you can use the product for free and purchase or earn insights credits on demand.

· As a team or an enterprise, you have two options

· You can opt for a hosted version, which provides dedicated hosting for your organization's data

· You can also opt for deployment in your Azure instance to have all your organization data closer to your cloud resources and faster access.

Need more information?

You can book a meeting at https://calendly.com/get1page to understand the right option for your organization.

Ready to Elevate Your Sales?

Join the growing community of sales professionals benefiting from 1Page's transformative impact. Embrace the 'why' behind our mission and unlock your sales potential today.

Experience the value of 1Page firsthand. Start free and elevate your sales success.

plans.summary: Deploy 1Panel on CentOS 9 for easy management of web hosting, server automation, and control panel functionalities. Ideal for hosting providers.
plans.description:
This plan provides a pre-configured 1Panel environment on CentOS 9, designed to streamline server and application management. Key features include:

1Panel Interface: A clean, intuitive interface for managing your web servers, databases, applications, and more.
Pre-configured Setup: No additional setup is required; simply deploy and start managing your infrastructure.
Security: The platform includes built-in security features such as firewalls, user permissions, and SSL support to protect your server.
Database Management: Manage MySQL, PostgreSQL, and other databases easily through a graphical interface.
Application Deployment: Simplify the deployment and management of web applications with tools for PHP, Node.js, and more.
Scalability: Ideal for small-scale websites and large-scale applications, ensuring flexibility as your needs grow.
This plan is ideal for web hosting providers, developers, and businesses that want to simplify server management without sacrificing power or flexibility.

value.longSummary: 1Panel on CentOS 9 – A pre-configured 1Panel server management platform running on CentOS 9, designed to simplify web hosting and application deployment with an intuitive UI.
value.summary: Deploy 1Panel on CentOS 9 for efficient management of hosting services. Ideal for web hosting, server management, and automation.
value.description:
1Panel on CentOS 9 provides a powerful and easy-to-use server management platform for web hosting and application deployment. Designed for developers, system administrators, and small to medium-sized businesses, 1Panel allows you to efficiently manage web servers, databases, applications, and more from a centralized interface.

With 1Panel, you can manage your server without the need for complex command-line configurations. It offers a rich set of tools for automating server management tasks, improving workflow efficiency, and reducing the overhead associated with web hosting and application deployments. Whether you are managing a single server or a large-scale infrastructure, 1Panel on CentOS 9 provides a streamlined experience that simplifies every aspect of server administration.

plans.description:
With remote work, bring-your-own device (BYOD), and shadow IT apps becoming commonplace, the number of unsanctioned apps and untrusted devices is rapidly climbing. Businesses are still relying on traditional identity and access management solutions, which were built for a way of work that no longer exists. 1Password Extended Access Management ensures that every identity is authentic, every application sign on is secure, and every device is healthy. It is the only solution that helps companies secure access to all applications from any device in todays SaaS-centric hybrid work environment.

Highlights
  • Comprehensive visibility: See and secure all identities, applications, and devices to protect against the risk of data breaches from a single pane of glass.
  • Accelerate security remediation: Enforce policy and identity safeguards to make sure only trusted users on secure devices can gain access to business data.
  • Simplify access: Manage access permissions for both admins and end users for all types of applications and devices.

1Password Extended Access Management integrates with Microsoft Security that make it simpler for organizations to protect their employees and sensitive information.
Microsoft Entra ID
1Password Device Trust integration with Microsoft Entra ID ensures that only known, healthy, and compliant devices—whether corporate-owned or personal—can access sensitive data. This helps organizations confidently enforce Zero Trust security policies, protecting critical information from compromised or non-compliant devices and enhancing overall data security.
Microsoft Sentinel
1Password for Microsoft Sentinel is an end-to-end solution allowing you to ingest 1Password Events API data directly to Microsoft Sentinel. This brings visibility to 1Password audit events, sign-in activity, and shared item usage, with the full power of Microsoft Sentinel. You can get started right away with alerts and a dynamic, customizable dashboard thanks to out -of-the-box analytics rules and workbooks. The new integration makes it easier for security admins to monitor and manage their organization’s credentials and secrets, better assess security risks, and quickly detect, investigate, and mitigate threats.

1Password for Microsoft Sentinel is an end-to-end solution allowing you to ingest 1Password Events API data directly to Microsoft Sentinel. This brings visibility to 1Password audit events, sign-in activity, and shared item usage, with the full power of Microsoft Sentinel. You can get started right away with alerts and a dynamic, customizable dashboard thanks to out -of-the-box analytics rules and workbooks. The new integration makes it easier for security admins to monitor and manage their organization’s credentials and secrets, better assess security risks, and quickly detect, investigate, and mitigate threats.

value.longSummary: Modern IT and Security teams need Extended Access Management
value.description:
With remote work, bring-your-own device (BYOD), and shadow IT apps becoming commonplace, the number of unsanctioned apps and untrusted devices is rapidly climbing. Businesses are still relying on traditional identity and access management solutions, which were built for a way of work that no longer exists. 1Password Extended Access Management ensures that every identity is authentic, every application sign on is secure, and every device is healthy. It is the only solution that helps companies secure access to all applications from any device in todays SaaS-centric hybrid work environment.

Highlights
  • Comprehensive visibility: See and secure all identities, applications, and devices to protect against the risk of data breaches from a single pane of glass.
  • Accelerate security remediation: Enforce policy and identity safeguards to make sure only trusted users on secure devices can gain access to business data.
  • Simplify access: Manage access permissions for both admins and end users for all types of applications and devices.

1Password Extended Access Management integrates with Microsoft Security that make it simpler for organizations to protect their employees and sensitive information.
Microsoft Entra ID
1Password Device Trust integration with Microsoft Entra ID ensures that only known, healthy, and compliant devices—whether corporate-owned or personal—can access sensitive data. This helps organizations confidently enforce Zero Trust security policies, protecting critical information from compromised or non-compliant devices and enhancing overall data security.
Microsoft Sentinel
1Password for Microsoft Sentinel is an end-to-end solution allowing you to ingest 1Password Events API data directly to Microsoft Sentinel. This brings visibility to 1Password audit events, sign-in activity, and shared item usage, with the full power of Microsoft Sentinel. You can get started right away with alerts and a dynamic, customizable dashboard thanks to out -of-the-box analytics rules and workbooks. The new integration makes it easier for security admins to monitor and manage their organization’s credentials and secrets, better assess security risks, and quickly detect, investigate, and mitigate threats.
