value.longSummary: The 1Password for Microsoft Sentinel integration provides the capability to ingest 1Password Business account activity (sign-in attempts, item usage, and audit events) into Microsoft Sentinel using the 1Password Events API.
value.summary: Protect your business by securing your people.
value.description:
Trusted by over 175,000 businesses and millions of consumers, 1Password offers industry-leading identity security and access management solutions that enable companies to implement robust security policies on credentials, proactively address cybersecurity threats, and generate detailed security reports to improve security postures.

Take safeguarding your company's credentials and secrets to the next level with the latest 1Password SIEM integration with Microsoft Sentinel! Seamlessly monitor access events with data and credentials stored within 1Password. Say goodbye to tedious hours spent on security investigations and welcome efficiency with a dynamic, customizable dashboard inside Microsoft Sentinel that illuminates your organization's credential and secrets landscape from 1Password.


As a 1Password Business customer, managing your 1Password audit events, sign-in activity, and item usage with your Microsoft Sentinel security information and event management (SIEM) system can be done inside your SIEM tool.


Using the 1Password Events API

As an out-of-the-box solution, Microsoft Sentinel customers can create dashboards and custom graphs that illustrate event activity. 1Password for Microsoft Sentinel makes it easier to monitor and manage your organization’s credentials and secrets.

Microsoft Sentinel customers can use the 1Password Events API to send 1Password data to your SIEM tool. Security admins and analysts can use this integration to better assess security risks and surface more visibility to mitigate these risks.


Streamline security events and information, all in one place

1Password for Microsoft Sentinel gives customers the ability to reduce the hassle of juggling multiple security platforms. Microsoft and 1Password customers can embrace the ease of tracking their 1Password security events in one place.

Your security analysts team can improve their efficiencies and bolster security measures simultaneously. With the 1Password for Microsoft Sentinel integration, you can:

  • Track security events: Stay in the know with real-time alerts for successful and failed login attempts as well as account and billing changes.

  • Monitor item usage: gain insights into user adoption and usage, file uploads, and item modifications for accountability and transparency

  • Threat intel notifications: proactively identify potential security threats and attacks, equipped with actionable suggestions

  • Streamline reporting: consolidate 1Password account activity and move to Microsoft Sentinel, reducing the time spent toggling different dashboards

value.longSummary: 1Platform: Software and Bundled Services for Data Lineage and Pipeline Optimization
value.description:
Modern enterprises rely on vast, interconnected data pipelines to drive analytics, reporting, and business decisions. However, many organizations struggle with limited visibility into data movement, transformation, and dependencies, leading to inefficiencies, compliance risks, and performance bottlenecks. This project addresses utilized Microsoft azure platforms to establish a robust data lineage across critical datasets and optimizing data pipelines for enhanced performance, efficiency, and scalability.

By mapping end-to-end data lineage and optimizing data pipelines, this Microsoft based pilot aims to demonstrate tangible value, assess technical feasibility, and provide actionable recommendations for long-term implementation. The initiative will empower stakeholders with transparency, improved data trust, and operational excellence. All documentation, mapping, and reporting will be delivered in Microsoft Word format for ease of review and collaboration.

Purpose

This Statement of Work (SOW) defines the scope, deliverables, and terms for a 3-month pilot engagement focused on two key areas:

  • Establishing Data Lineage across critical datasets and pipelines.
  • Conducting Databricks Pipeline Optimization to improve performance, efficiency, and scalability.

The goal of the pilot is to assess feasibility, demonstrate value, and provide recommendations for long-term implementation.


Assumptions

  • Remote Delivery- All services will be delivered remotely. Any travel required for the performance of this engagement will be pre-approved by the client and will be billed directly to the client, including reasonable travel, lodging, meals, and other related expenses.

  • Provision of Licenses and Access- The client will be responsible for providing all necessary software licenses, system access, data, environments, and other resources required for the vendor’s team to perform the work under this SOW.
  • Timely Client Responses- The client agrees to provide timely feedback, decisions, approvals, and sign-offs within ten (10) business days of receiving deliverables or requests from the vendor, thereby avoiding project delays.
  • Client Stakeholder Participation- The client will ensure that appropriate stakeholders are available and actively participate in meetings, reviews, and workshops as needed throughout the engagement.
  • Engagement Duration and Termination- This SOW is valid for the duration specified herein (three months). Either party may terminate the agreement at any time by providing thirty (30) days’ prior written notice to the other party.


Exclusions

Unless otherwise specified, the following are explicitly excluded from the scope of this engagement:

  • Procurement or purchase of any hardware, software, third-party tools, or licenses.
  • Ongoing operational support or maintenance services beyond the engagement duration.
  • Development or delivery of production-ready systems or solutions; all deliverables are intended for pilot and evaluation purposes only.
  • Data migration or data cleansing activities are not included unless explicitly stated in the scope.
  • Legal, regulatory, or compliance assessments beyond data lineage analysis.
  • Any services or deliverables not explicitly described in the scope or deliverables- Data Lineage and Pipeline optimization section.

plans.description:
1Staff 365 Connect for Bullhorn ATS and Dynamics 365 Business Central Integration

Unlock the potential of seamless integration between Bullhorn ATS and Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central with our advanced solution tailored for staffing firms. Enhance data flow and operational efficiency by synchronizing your applicant tracking system (ATS) with your enterprise resource planning (ERP) platform.

Key Features:

  • Data Synchronization: Seamless integration from Bullhorn API to Business Central API ensures real-time data updates.
  • Customer and Candidate Data Management: Automatically imports new and updated company and candidate records from Bullhorn into Business Central, creating organized customer and employee/vendor cards.
  • Placement Data Integration: Direct integration of placements and related data into Business Central for efficient timesheet entry, invoicing, collections, payroll, and analytics.
  • Error Handling: Immediate reporting of error messages allows for quick resolution and maintains system integrity.

Benefits:

  • Improved Data Management: Eliminates the need for duplicate entries and reduces inconsistencies across systems.
  • Automation: Minimizes manual data transfer, saving time and reducing the potential for errors.
  • Enhanced Operational Efficiency: Realizes substantial improvements in operational workflows, financial transparency, and decision-making capabilities, ultimately boosting profitability.
  • Customization: Offers flexible integration capabilities tailored to the specific data requirements of your staffing firm using both Bullhorn and Business Central APIs.

Considerations:

  • Customizable Integration: Tailor the integration to meet the unique needs of your staffing firm.
  • Training and Support: Access to comprehensive training and support ensures smooth adoption and optimal use of the integrated systems.
  • API Compatibility: Compatible with both Bullhorn SOAP and REST APIs to any version of Dynamics Business Central, providing versatile options for your staffing firm.

Leverage the power of integrated Bullhorn ATS and 1Staff for Dynamics 365 Business Central to drive your staffing firm towards enhanced data visibility, improved financial management, and increased operational efficiency.


1Staff Connect works with both Dynamics 365 Business Central Essential and Premium

1Staff Connect is suitable for any market however our language for sales, implementation, documentation and support is English

plans.displayName: 1Staff 365 Front Office CRM and ATS for staffing
plans.description:
Developed specifically for staffing augmentation companies, 1Staff 365 Front Office will help your sales and marketing team find and service clients, help your recruiters engage and manage candidates and fill jobs quicker, help your compliance team drive efficiencies and de-risk the onboarding process and help your operations team get those candidates into your back office processing and earning revenue.

Underpinned by Microsoft Dynamics 365 Sales and the Power Platform, 1Staff 365 Front Office is a full marketing, sales, applicant tracking, candidate engagement, employee onboarding solution built specifically for the staffing augmentation sector. When implemented along with 1Staff 365 Back Office it delivers a full front - mid - back office single platform staffing solution from lead generation right through to financial reporting.

1Staff 365 Front Office gives staffing companies the ability to adopt a cloud, staffing-domain specialist, CRM and ATS and then flex with the enterprise-grade Microsoft Power Platform to truly differentiate themselves with their clients in a systemic, controlled and supportable way.

Watch our videos and more on our website to see some of the solution capability.

1Staff Front Office is only available and supported in the English language

plans.description:
1Staff 365 Back Office - Payroll NOW integration module

This module is required by staffing companies using 1Staff 365 Back Office that wish to integrate to the Payroll Now solution for the US and Canadian markets.
This automated integration module has been developed in conjunction with Integrity Data to make a robust and reliable connection between 1Staff 365 Back Office and Payroll NOW delivering a seamless transition for paying temporaries for their work.
This module integrates seamlessly to the Payroll NOW module installed within BC for payroll processing.
Added benefits come from a round-trip process where Payroll Transactions are posted, the “Employer Costs” that are generated by Payroll processing are written back to 1Staff 365 Back Office and associated to the exact Timesheet Ledger Entry / Consultant Timesheet Ledger Entries. This enables precise costing analysis for a Temporary / Placement / Assignment to include not only the pay for the employee, but also any of the related Employer Payroll Costs that are inferred.
1Staff 365 Back Office from Professional Advantage is a sophisticated time/pay/bill and ERP solution within Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central specifically for enterprising multi-brand, multi-state, multi-country staffing agencies (https://tinyurl.com/4rmpz4m6).
Payroll NOW from Integrity Data is an employee payroll solution within Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central and available from Microsoft AppSource (https://tinyurl.com/2s4hj3zv).


Supported Editions

This app supports the Essential and Premium editions of Dynamics 365 Business Central

Supported Countries

United States and Canada

Supported Languages

This app is available in English (United States and Canadian)

Added benefits come from a round-trip process where Payroll Transactions are posted, the “Employer Costs” that are generated by Payroll processing are written back to 1Staff 365 Back Office and associated to the exact Timesheet Ledger Entry / Consultant Timesheet Ledger Entries. This enables precise costing analysis for a Temporary / Placement / Assignment to include not only the pay for the employee, but also any of the related Employer Payroll Costs that are inferred.
1Staff 365 Back Office from Professional Advantage is a sophisticated time/pay/bill and ERP solution within Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central specifically for enterprising multi-brand, multi-state, multi-country staffing agencies (https://tinyurl.com/4rmpz4m6).
Payroll NOW from Integrity Data is an employee payroll solution within Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central and available from Microsoft AppSource (https://tinyurl.com/2s4hj3zv).


Supported Editions

This app supports the Essential and Premium editions of Dynamics 365 Business Central

Supported Countries

United States and Canada

Supported Languages

This app is available in English (United States and Canadian)

plans.description:
1Staff 365 Timesheet Import is an optional but recommended extension to 1Staff 365 Back Office staffing solution for Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central, enabling the import and processing of talent timesheets from external systems.

1Staff 365 Timesheet Import imports timesheet data files and images from time capture applications into a draft New Timesheet in the 1Staff 365 Back Office staffing solution for normal verification and processing.

1Staff 365 Timesheet Import is an ideal solution for staffing companies to streamline their 3rd party timesheet integration processes to 1Staff 365 Back Office.

plans.description:
The 1Vision365 IoT Application is the application to use when you want to receive various IoT (Internet of Things) signals into your Dynamics365 Business Central application and process them further.

All signals received through a generic web service will initially be stored in a IoT Event Hub table for further processing by additional code. a PTE (Per Tenant Extension) can subscribe to these received events through an interface and handle the data.

plans.description:
The 1Vision365 IoT-2-PrintVis Application contains functionality to extend our 1Vision365 IoT Application specifically for receiving signals from IoT Devices and process them into the industry standard MIS software solution for Print, Label, Large Format and Packaging (printvis.com)

This solution is particularly interesting when you have machines that do not have intelligent communication possibilities like JDF/JMF (JDF Integration Matrix – CIP4 Organization)

PrintVis by default also supports Moxa integration, but only using the “pull” methodology. When you have multiple Moxa devices, this could turn into an issue when the Business Central Job Queue solution is constantly trying to pull data from the Moxa devices.

The 1Vision365 IoT-2-PrintVis Application uses the “push” methodology instead. Thus only devices that need to send data to PrintVis, will send data to PrintVis. This causes way less overhead for your system and is always up-to-date.


You can install this Moxa Adapter to connect your Moxa devices to PrintVis

plans.description:
1st Reporting users can receive notifications within Microsoft Teams whenever an incident, checklist or inspection is created. This allows you to improve and streamline your internal communications around significant events.

The notification trigger conditions and content are fully customizable upon request.

With the 1st Reporting app, you can accelerate the time it takes to track issues and enhance your safety measures by improving communication and resolving problems faster. Stop missing incident calls or relying on illegible handwritten reports. Boost your reporting methods, build trust among your team members, and drive your business with the only app that generates comprehensive, easy-to-navigate data.

Need to share a report with your team? When you paste a report URL from 1st Reporting in a chat, this app will automatically create a summary card for the report.

In order to use the 1st Reporting for Microsoft Teams integration, you must have a valid account on https://1streporting.com. Signup on our free plan!

plans.description:
A key component of ensuring safety in the workplace is immediately and effectively reporting incidents. Get the sophisticated and powerful technology you need to record and analyze any mishaps and accidents in the field with the 1st Incident Reporting mobile application.

Save your company valuable time and money with the only incident tracking app that allows users to generate their own incident types instantly, any time or place.

For superior tracking, the app offers live incident reports and notifications that allow you to monitor issues in real time. You can even record incidents in archives, so you can analyze them in the future.

When you engage the 1st Incident Reporting mobile application, you will dramatically reduce the need for user training and the cost of using different hardware. That’s because this incident tracking system works on any mobile or web platform.

With the 1st Incident Reporting app, you can accelerate the time it takes to track issues and enhance your safety measures by improving communication and resolving problems faster. value.longSummary: The Future of HR conversations with 1stAskHR AI assistant.
value.description:
1stAskHR is an AI-powered application designed to transform HR operations by delivering instant, accurate answers to employee queries—while ensuring information is securely accessed based on user roles and departments. The platform uses advanced AI to streamline communication, improve response times, and enhance overall employee satisfaction.

Built for HR professionals and employees across organizations, 1stAskHR simplifies access to HR information by responding only from authorized, department-specific documents. Each user receives answers tailored to their role and permissions, ensuring sensitive information remains protected and accessible only to the right audience. This significantly reduces repetitive inquiries while maintaining strict data privacy.

By securely integrating with your organization’s HR databases and document repositories, 1stAskHR provides precise, policy-aligned responses without exposing confidential data. Its AI-driven insights help HR teams identify trends and proactively address recurring issues, fostering a more responsive and efficient HR environment. With a user-friendly interface and scalable architecture, 1stAskHR is well-suited for organizations of all sizes seeking to optimize HR processes while keeping employee and department-specific data safe.

plans.description:
Usage-Based Pricing Plan for Contact Center Services

Our Usage-Based Pricing Plan is designed to provide flexibility and cost-effectiveness for businesses of all sizes. This plan ensures that you only pay for the services you use, making it an ideal choice for companies with fluctuating customer service demands.

Overview

The Usage-Based Pricing Plan is structured around actual consumption rather than a fixed monthly or annual fee. Businesses are charged based on their usage of contact center services, including the number of inbound and outbound calls, chat interactions, email support, and AI-driven automation tools. This model is beneficial for organizations that experience seasonal variations in customer inquiries or those looking to scale operations dynamically without upfront commitments.

Key Features

  1. Pay-as-You-Go Model: Companies are billed based on actual service consumption, ensuring cost-effectiveness and transparency.
  2. Scalability: Businesses can seamlessly scale their contact center operations up or down depending on demand, without being locked into fixed pricing tiers.
  3. AI-Driven Assistance: Usage includes access to AI-powered chatbots and virtual assistants that help manage customer interactions efficiently.
  4. Multi-Channel Support: Charges are applied across multiple channels, including voice calls, live chat, emails, and SMS interactions.
  5. Customizable Billing Terms: Clients can opt for per-minute, per-call, or per-interaction pricing based on their preferred billing model.
  6. Advanced Reporting & Analytics: Gain insights into usage patterns, performance metrics, and customer interaction trends to optimize costs and efficiency.
  7. No Long-Term Contracts: Businesses can enjoy the freedom of paying for only what they use, with the option to modify their service levels as required.

Billing Structure

Under this plan, billing is determined by the following key metrics:

  • Voice Calls: Billed per minute for inbound and outbound calls.
  • Chat Interactions: Charged per active session with a customer.
  • Emails: Priced per successfully resolved customer email interaction.
  • SMS Notifications: Cost varies based on the number of messages sent.
  • AI Automation: Fees are based on the number of automated interactions handled by virtual assistants or bots.

Clients receive a detailed monthly usage report outlining their consumption across different service channels, ensuring full transparency in billing.

plans.description:
1touch is a platform for semantic interpretation and validation of information in digital finance.
It provides a fully self-auditing solution where the understanding of the finance transaction for example it's accounting type, the main characteristics including transacting parties, totals, dates etc. can be validated with a complete certainty, making any further review or post-processing by humans redundant.  1touch thus eliminates the need for human labor in processing transactions and keeping of accurate records which is still prevalent in organizations today.
Other applications include medical bill processing, insurance claims evaluation or interpretation of financial statements.
The processing happens in real time, is fully automated and verifiable with a measurable level of accuracy.
The platform is implemented as a cloud native, distributed system which is powered by the state-of-the-art machine processing and machine intelligence algorithms.
The software is delivered as a service (SaaS) with subscription, per-transaction or licensing models available on demand.

plans.summary: 1touch.io Inventa Sensitive Data Intelligence
plans.description: 1touch.io Inventa is a leading sensitive data intelligence solution with unprecedented data discovery and classification technology to improve outcomes across the enterprise via a centralized management console. 1touch.io Inventa gives organizations complete visibility into the business value of all data – including shadow IT and unknown data sources – by automating the discovery process starting at the network-layer and providing a comprehensive, accurate and up-to-date master inventory. This visibility enables organizations of any size to easily meet security, privacy, governance and compliance requirements while getting more out of their existing investments and improving operational efficiency.

value.longSummary: 1touch.io Inventa is a leading sensitive data intelligence solution with unprecedented data discovery and classification technology to improve outcomes across the enterprise via a centralized management console. 1touch.io Inventa gives organizations complete visibility into the business value of all data – including shadow IT and unknown data sources – by automating the discovery process starting at the network-layer and providing a comprehensive, accurate and up-to-date master inventory. This visibility enables organizations of any size to easily meet security, privacy, governance and compliance requirements while getting more out of their existing investments and improving operational efficiency.
value.summary: Sensitive Data Intelligence to fuel your security, privacy, governance and compliance operations
value.description:
Security, risk, privacy, and governance professionals often struggle with understanding the breadth and spread of their sensitive data. With proliferation of data to the cloud and unstructured data especially growing exponentially, users need tools to help them discover, classify, inventory and understand their sensitive data posture to balance security and business productivity in an automated fashion.

1touch.io Inventa is the industry’s most scalable, accurate and easy-to-use sensitive data intelligence engine to fuel your business. It is the only solution in the market that automatically enriches data based on business context to enable decision making based on business goals rather than technical parameters. For example, instead of rules based on username or hostname, Inventa can classify data based on specific data groups + geography, e.g. “European car insurance customers who’s data is residing in Azure EU datacenter,” so if that data is discovered in an US Azure datacenter then it can be remediated quickly.

Inventa starts scanning at the network layer to discover and classify sensitive data as it moves across the environment to create a network map of sensitive data flows. This is automated discovery to find known data sources + unknown unknowns that may be outside of IT’s scope - all of which is automatically added to the Inventa data inventory for deeper scanning. AI/ML classification techniques for 96% accuracy out of the box and 99%+ with minimal tuning across structured, unstructured, cloud, on prem and mainframe environments. 

Download and try Inventa for yourself!

plans.summary: Набор готовых финансовых отчетов для 1C Бухгалтерия
plans.description:
This application is available only in Russian language.

Используйте это приложение, чтобы начать анализировать данные из вашей 1С Бухгалтерия в Power BI. Подключите приложение с демо данными прямо сейчас и оцените его пользу для вас и вашего бизнеса.

Возможно вам приходилось выгружать данные в Excel и делать управленческие отчеты вручную? Теперь в этом нет необходимости. Работайте в удовольствие с готовыми отчетами и панелями мониторинга или создавайте свои собственные. Используйте преимущества Power BI для интерактивного анализа, углубляйтесь в данные, сравнивайте и отслеживайте в динамике ключевые показатели вашего бизнеса.

Описание возможностей

Данное приложение совместимо с конфигурациями 1С Бухгалтерия для Казахстана, Украины (BAS Бухгалтерия), Узбекистана, Кыргызстана, Азербайджана.

После подключения к сервису (первоначальная настройка занимает 2-3 дня) вы получите доступ к Power BI с готовым набором финансовых отчетов, основанных на данных из вашей 1С.

Решение позволяет консолидировать несколько баз 1С с элиминацией (вычитанием) оборотов связанных компаний.

Реализовано разделение доступов по организациям для разных пользователей (RLS, row-level security).

Отчеты и дашборды адаптированы для работы на мобильных устройствах.

Список отчетов

  1. Баланс организации (Balance Sheet)
  2. Прибыли и убытки (Profit and Loss)
  3. Движение денежных средств (Cashflow)
  4. Товарно-материальные запасы (Inventory)
  5. Возраст дебиторской задолженности (Receivables Aging)
  6. Возраст кредиторской задолженности (Receivables Aging)
  7. Новые и повторные клиенты (New and Returning customers)
  8. Продажи (Sales)
  9. План факт продаж (Sales Fact Plan)
  10. ABC анализ продаж (ABC Sales Analysis)
  11. Оборотно-сальдовая (Trial Balance)

Для кого это подходит

Решение подходит для бизнес-пользователей, которые хотят в короткие сроки получить готовый набор отчетов без необходимости длительного внедрения.

Предложение способно решить существенные задачи бизнеса, среди которых:

  • автоматизация сбора данных и подготовки отчетности
  • экономия времени специалистов на рутинные процессы
  • повышение точности данных за счет устранения ручного труда при подготовке отчетности
  • регулярное обновление данных и доступность отчетов онлайн 24/7
  • работа в браузере или на смартфоне
  • улучшение контроля и прозрачности бизнес-процессов
  • использование собственных показателей эффективности бизнеса
  • повышение качества анализа информации
  • обеспечение безопасности данных (все данные – на стороне клиента)
  • возможность для руководителя работать с аналитикой напрямую

Процесс настройки включает:

  • Регистрацию в облачных службах Microsoft 365 и Power BI
  • Настройку импорта данных из 1С
  • Настройку приложения-шаблона с отчетами Power BI для ваших данных

Для работы приложения требуется лицензии:

  • Microsoft Power BI Pro
  • Microsoft 365 Business Basic

plans.displayName: 2 Day Power BI Fundamentals Private Training
plans.summary: Two day hands-on introduction to Power BI covering Power Query Editor, Data Modeling in Power BI, building visualizations, and publishing to the Power BI Service.
plans.description:
Get your team up and running in two days with our fundamentals training. After attending the team will have the skills to transform data, solve modeling issues, produce production ready visualizations, and publish them to your Power BI Service. As part of the experience, a follow-on workshop can be scheduled to bring real world scenarios using your own data sources.

Course Overview:

  • Data sourcing and transformation with Power Query Editor

  • Data modeling fundamentals

  • How to build visualizations

  • Working with the Power BI Service

What's included:

All of our classes are offered remotely to work around your team's needs and schedules. We can accommodate all time zones including international, or breaking the class into half day sessions as needed. All students will receive a full copy of the materials used, all sample files needed, and completed workbooks for future review.

Additional services:

  • E-Learning tools: After class your team can have access to web-based on-demand versions of the material. Available in 30, 90, or 180 day options, the E-Learning tools are an efficient way for students to review topics, practice at their own pace, and track their learning progress. The material in the online training is the same as the classroom material with demos and full audio/video guidance.
  • Workshops: During the classroom training, students will be using vendor specific demo data. We know that this can't answer all of the questions your team might have with regard to your environment. As such, we at Senturus can provide half or full day Q&A mentoring workshops. These workshops can be tailored to your needs and include using either your data or sample data.

plans.displayName: 2 Day SAP on Azure Assessment ( Retail)
plans.summary: The 2 Day Free SAP on Azure Assessment is an high level assessment of Retail SAP landscape.
plans.description:
SAP on Azure Assessment (Free) – Our 2 Day Retail SAP on Azure Assessment includes an overall assessment of your current SAP environment and migration plan to cover a seamless lift and shift migration of your existing SAP and Bolt On environment. This assessment will also include a migration path for any choice of implementation of S/4 HANA Azure:
  • Brownfield (Upgrade of current SAP environment on Azure)
    • ,
  • Greenfield (Fresh build on Azure) or
  • Bluefield (Restructure and revaluate data and customizations for the move to S/4 HANA)
    • Scenarios Covered
    • SAP Rehosting (Lift and Shift)
    • Considerations for S/4 HANA (Greenfield/Brownfield/Bluefield)
    • Bolt on system environment
    Activities: Day 1:
    • Current Landscape Assessment
    • EWA Reports review
    • Azure Migrate Assessment
    Day 2:
    • Bolt On Systems and Integrations review
    • High Level Wave Planning
    • Review and Walkthrough of the deliverables
    Deliverables
    • Azure Migrate Assessment Report
    • High Level Solution Architecture
    • Azure ROM Estimate
    • Approach and High-Level Migration Plan.
    • High Level Duration and Migration Cost
    Client Commit
    • Stakeholders Availability (SAP Basis, Managed Services and Application Teams)
    • -2 x 2 hour Workshops

plans.displayName: 2 Month Free Trial of Road Direct's Temporary Traffic Management (TTM) Software
plans.description:
Introducing a custom designed web-based system specifically created for the Temporary Traffic Management (TTM) industry to view all your job bookings remotely from any device and any location.
We have covered all of the essential steps from booking a job to invoicing it, including TMP management, recording time & equipment used on-site and much, much more!
eBoard is a cloud-based SaaS (software as a service) system, which means nothing to install. Simply use your web browser of choice.
We are here to support your onboarding process and offer several services to make this process as smooth and quick as possible.

plans.summary: AlphaBOLD’s Power BI Migration Assessment bridges the gap, ensuring a smooth and successful transition to maximizing the potential of Power BI.
plans.description:
2-Week Assessment: Power BI Migration

BI Platform Migration Crossroads- Lost in Translation?

Migrating from a legacy Business Intelligence (BI) platform to Microsoft Power BI can unlock a wealth of new data insights and functionalities. However, navigating the migration process can be complex.

Are you facing challenges in translating your existing data and dashboards to the Power BI platform? Concerned about data inconsistencies, lost functionality, or user adoption during the migration?

AlphaBOLD’s Power BI Migration Assessment bridges the gap, ensuring a smooth and successful transition to maximizing the potential of Power BI.

AlphaBOLD’s Power BI Migration Assessment: A Roadmap to Success

Our comprehensive Power BI Migration Assessment provides a clear roadmap for a seamless transition from your existing BI platform.

Assessment Process:

  1. Source Platform Discovery: We'll gain a deep understanding of your current BI platform, including data sources, data lineage, existing reports, and user workflows.
  2. Data Inventory and Analysis: Our team will thoroughly assess your data structure, identifying potential inconsistencies and recommending strategies for data cleansing, data transformation, and unification within Power BI.
  3. Functionality Mapping: We'll map your existing functionalities to equivalent capabilities in Power BI, ensuring a smooth transition for your users.
  4. User Adoption Planning: Our assessment dives into user needs and preferences, informing a tailored training and adoption plan to maximize user comfort and success with Power BI.
  5. Cost-Benefit Analysis: We'll provide a transparent cost-benefit analysis, outlining potential resource savings and return on investment associated with migrating to Power BI.

Deliverables:

  • Detailed Migration Plan: A comprehensive roadmap outlining the migration process, with defined timelines, resource requirements, and key milestones.
  • Data Transformation Strategy: A tailored plan for cleansing, unifying, and optimizing your data for seamless integration with Power BI.
  • Functionality Gap Analysis: A clear report outlining any functionalities from your current platform that may require alternative solutions within Power BI.
  • User Adoption and Training Plan: A customized plan to ensure user comfort and proficiency with Power BI, fostering a smooth transition and maximizing user engagement.
  • Migration Cost Estimation: A transparent analysis of potential costs associated with the migration, along with estimated ROI based on Power BI's functionalities and efficiencies.

Benefits:

  • Reduced Migration Risk: Our assessment minimizes potential roadblocks and ensures a smooth transition by proactively identifying and addressing key migration challenges.
  • Data Optimization and Standardization: Gain a clean, unified data foundation within Power BI, enabling future scalability and improved data analysis.
  • Maximized User Adoption: A user-centric approach and training plan pave the way for seamless user transition and efficient utilization of Power BI functionalities.
  • Informed Investment Decisions: Our cost-benefit analysis provides valuable insights to help you make informed decisions regarding the migration process and its potential return on investment.

Partner with AlphaBOLD for a successful Power BI migration and unlock the full potential of Microsoft's industry-leading BI platform.

  • User Adoption and Training Plan: A customized plan to ensure user comfort and proficiency with Power BI, fostering a smooth transition and maximizing user engagement.
  • Migration Cost Estimation: A transparent analysis of potential costs associated with the migration, along with estimated ROI based on Power BI's functionalities and efficiencies.

Benefits:

  • Reduced Migration Risk: Our assessment minimizes potential roadblocks and ensures a smooth transition by proactively identifying and addressing key migration challenges.
  • Data Optimization and Standardization: Gain a clean, unified data foundation within Power BI, enabling future scalability and improved data analysis.
  • Maximized User Adoption: A user-centric approach and training plan pave the way for seamless user transition and efficient utilization of Power BI functionalities.
  • Informed Investment Decisions: Our cost-benefit analysis provides valuable insights to help you make informed decisions regarding the migration process and its potential return on investment.

Partner with AlphaBOLD for a successful Power BI migration and unlock the full potential of Microsoft's industry-leading BI platform.

plans.displayName: 2 Week Cognitive Services Proof of Concept
plans.summary: Prove the value of adding Azure Cognitive Services to your Power App- and Power Virtual Agent-based solutions with this POC
plans.description:
Are you interested in enhancing the capabilities and performance of your Power App- and Power Virtual Agent-based solutions with AI? Azure Cognitive Services can help.

Azure Cognitive Services provides AI-driven Speech, Language, Vision, and Decision-making capabilities that can be integrated with PowerApps and Power Virtual Agents to provide enhanced functionality and flexibility. As an example, adding language and decision-making capabilities provided by Cognitive Services to a customer-facing chatbot powered by Power Virtual Agent can allow the bot to more intelligently and accurately process the customer's request, allowing it to provide a more accurate response and improve customer experiences and satisfaction.

With this offer, organizations can leverage the expertise of Fractal Analytics consultants to implement a Cognitive Services POC in just 2 weeks.

To achieve this, Fractal Analytics experts will conduct a workshop with your organization to assess business goals and outcomes. After the workshop, Fractal will take the results of the workshop and leverage them to deliver:

  1. Ten days of Cognitive Services development
  2. One Cognitive Services POC
  3. One dashboard visualizing the POC’s function in Power BI

plans.summary: Grant Thornton is offering a consulting service in which we engage with your organization through a three-phased assessment to help your organization optimize its Azure Environment.
plans.description:
We leverage a three-phased approach to engage, assess, and recommend the best path forward for your organization:

Engage: We will begin by understanding the goals and objectives for your environment. We will review your data sources and security monitoring practices. We will require read-access to your Azure subscriptions.

Assess: Grant Thornton will monitor your Azure consumption over a six business day period and identify areas of optimization, performance, and configuration trends.

Recommend: Grant Thornton professionals will meet with you to share our findings and provide recommendations based on best practice. We will deliver a clear roadmap to articulate what steps your organization should take to ensure it is maximizing its Azure environment.

plans.displayName: 2 Weeks Assessment: Migrating Oracle to Azure Database for PostgreSQL
plans.summary: Quadrant simplifies database migration with QMigrator, assessing risks, costs, and strategy for a smooth shift to PostgreSQL, ensuring minimal downtime, data integrity, and optimized cloud performance
plans.description:
Database migration can be a complex and time-consuming process for any IT team exploring to do it by themselves, and without proper Assessment and migration plan the decision making gets even harder, this is where Quadrant adds the value by bringing a team of experts and established processes and automation tools like QMigrator to speed up the Assessment and provide accurate migration plan by analyzing and evaluating the Applications and Databases that needs to be migrated from on-Premise to the cloud.

More and More organizations are shifting to open-source databases like PostgreSQL in the cloud to benefit from.

  • Improved manageability.
  • High Scalability.
  • High availability and business continuity.

Architecture Evaluation

We evaluate architecture of your Applications, Interfaces and Workloads in relation to Databases in scope and propose future Application architecture solutions on Cloud.

Assessment of your Oracle Databases

The first step is to assess the size and complexity of the Oracle database. QMigrator scans the Oracle source database and workloads and helps us to provide precise estimation of the migration effort. This assessment will help to determine the potential challenges migrating to PostgreSQL and formulate migration strategy.

Application Assessment

Application assessment is to determine if any changes are required due to change of database. This may include updating configuration settings, modifying the application code, Data Accees Layer changes or updating embedded SQL.

After the Above Steps are complete, we will create a detailed Assessment Executive Summary report based on the QMigrator automated outputs and assessment team observations, which includes timelines, resources, contingency measures, and financials including infrastructure cost based on the on-prem capacity utilization. Our Assessment report also includes alternate migration methods, testing and validation procedures, and post-migration support, enabling you to take appropriate decisions on the following aspects as well.

Database Migration and Integration

Rehosting : Whether a Lift and Shift be the right approach for the database migration with minimal or no code changes

Re-Platforming : Whether moving from Licensed Databases to Open-Source Database like Azure PostgreSQL benefits your organization.

Rearchitecting : Whether Database architecture changes like partitioning, Hyperscale, NoSQL, Microservice or ADL is the way forward.

Our Executive Assessment Summary also represents the comparison of current architecture of your Applications, Interfaces and Workload impacts to future Application architecture on Cloud.

Benefits of an Assessment

  • Identification of risks and challenges : Assessment helps to identify potential risks and challenges associated with the migration, such as data loss, downtime, compatibility issues, or performance problems.
  • Evaluation of the migration method : The assessment evaluates the suitability of the migration method and tools for the specific migration scenario. It helps to select the optimal migration strategy based on the size, and complexity.
  • Cost estimation : The assessment provides an estimate of the costs associated with the migration, including licensing, hardware, software, and labor costs.
  • Data mapping and schema conversion : The assessment identifies the differences between the source and target database platforms and maps the data types in the source database to their equivalent data types in the target database. It also identifies schema differences and determines the best approach to convert the schema from the source to the target database.
  • Application assessment : The assessment evaluates the application that uses the database to determine if any changes are required to support the migration. which includes modifying the application code, or updating scripts.
  • Testing and validation : Outlines the testing and validation plan to ensure that the migrated data is accurate and consistent with the source database. This may include functional and performance testing, as well as user acceptance testing.
  • Migration plan development : Based on the assessment findings, a detailed migration plan is developed that includes timelines, resources, and contingency measures.

Overall, a database migration assessment provides valuable insights into the migration process, identifies potential risks, and challenges, and helps to develop a detailed migration plan. It ensures that the migration is cost-effective, minimizes downtime, and maintains data integrity.

The Timeline mentioned in this offering may vary depending on several factors one of the prime factors is the database size and associated code objects, however an initial assessment will give the near accurate timeline.

plans.summary: Application modernization and migration | Low-code and no-code app development
plans.description:
Application innovation is at our door, with the demand for always-on, faster, more secure, and user-friendly applications has never been stronger. But are you ready to leverage the powerful of scalable, rapid application development in order to meet customer needs, improve employee productivity, and shorten time-to-market?

As strategic technology partners and an 11-year Microsoft Gold Partner, we understand the hassle of understanding where to start in modernizing, migrating, or developing apps for businesses today.

Our complimentary 2-week consultation and assessment gives you the opportunity to figure out where to start and what unique needs your business has that’ll influence what apps you build or what platforms to build them on. Throughout the engagement, we keep in mind your:

• Integration requirements • Existing data sources • How an app platform like Power Platform fits into your IT infrastructure

Based off of our findings and your feedback, we’ll determine and recommend the right steps forward to developing your business apps rapidly through recommendation of a strategic roadmap and right-fit technology.

Assessment deliverables: ✅ Analysis of your business needs, pain points, and unique requirements ✅ What standard or custom integrations you may require ✅ Assessment of current IT landscape to catalogue existing or future applications ✅ Identification of candidate applications for cloud migration ✅ Report and recommended roadmap to modernize, migrate, or build apps on Azure ✅ Recommendation for how we can help you innovate with apps rapidly

Platforms and frameworks we work with:

  1. Microsoft Power Platform
  2. .NET
  3. Angular

Assessment deliverables: ✅ Analysis of your business needs, pain points, and unique requirements ✅ What standard or custom integrations you may require ✅ Assessment of current IT landscape to catalogue existing or future applications ✅ Identification of candidate applications for cloud migration ✅ Report and recommended roadmap to modernize, migrate, or build apps on Azure ✅ Recommendation for how we can help you innovate with apps rapidly

Platforms and frameworks we work with:

  1. Microsoft Power Platform
  2. .NET
  3. Angular

plans.displayName: 2-Day Assessment to Evaluate Dynamics 365 Business Central
plans.summary: Fast-track your Dynamics 365 Business Central implementation with AlphaBOLD's 2-Day Assessment. We can help you achieve an efficient solution that perfectly aligns with your business needs.
plans.description:
2-Day Assessment to Evaluate Dynamics 365 Business Central ERP

Fast-track your Dynamics 365 Business Central implementation with AlphaBOLD's 2-Day Assessment. Gain a thorough readiness analysis, personalized recommendations, and a detailed project plan – all in just 16 hours.

Has your company selected Dynamics 365 Business Central as your next ERP system yet remain worried about implementation pitfalls? Many businesses face roadblocks after selecting Dynamics 365 Business Central. Generic assessments might miss crucial details, leading to inefficient implementations that don't align with your specific needs. AlphaBOLD's 2-Day Assessment bridges that gap.

We can help you achieve an efficient solution that perfectly aligns with your business needs and unique requirements. AlphaBOLD’s Dynamics 365 Business Central assessment presents the ideal first step toward your optimal course of action. Our assessment includes two initial stages of implementation: Evaluation and Analysis.

We craft a personalized roadmap tailored to your business requirements. Additionally, we perform in-depth reviews for your current licensing and offer estimates for corresponding licenses within Dynamics 365 Business Central.

Uncover Hidden Potential with Dynamics 365 Business Assessment

  • Deep Dive, Not Just Evaluation: Our assessment goes beyond a basic review, uncovering opportunities for automation and streamlined workflows.
  • Integration Expertise: We explore how Dynamics 365 Business Central integrates with your existing systems and online channels.
  • Cost Optimization Strategies: Discover how to optimize cash flow with pay-as-you-need user licenses and powerful back-end infrastructure.

Assessment Requisites

  • A complete breakdown of your business’ pain points and manual workarounds
  • Current list of operating companies, locations, organization structure, and consolidations
  • Timeline and budget for potential implementation
  • A complete current systems (Accounting, Warehousing, and Manufacturing) audit

Agenda

Day 1: Evaluation

  • Virtual Executive Consultation: Meet with the executive and leadership team to discuss business objectives and vision for the implementation.
  • Collaborate with Functional Experts: Gain insights into current business processes and their evolution from the setup in your current system.
  • System Review: Analyze documents, interactions, and item characteristics for comprehensive integration.

Day 2: Analysis and Demo

  • Licensing Review: Evaluate your current licensing structure and identify potential optimizations within Dynamics 365 Business Central.
  • New Functionality Exploration: Discover how Dynamics 365 Business Central features can benefit your business.
  • SaaS Model & Roadmap Review: Understand the subscription model and Microsoft's product roadmap.
  • Platform Demo: Get a hands-on look at the Dynamics 365 Business Central interface.

Deliverables

  • Recommendation on the implementation
  • Possible roadmap and next steps
  • High-level understanding of the new SaaS license model and a license transformation guide
  • Discuss the overall viability of Dynamics 365 Business Central implementation for your business
  • A budgetary estimate of the implementation, including ISV extensions

Our proven track record in scaling technology businesses translates to a quick and efficient Dynamics 365 Business Central implementations. Let's unlock lasting benefits for your company!
